DetailsList.Title: What went new in Zoho CRM for December 2025
DetailsList.Description:
✨ December in Zoho CRM was packed with productivity and usability upgrades! ✨
Here’s a quick look at what’s new 👇
🔹 WorkQueue
Bring all your tasks, chores, and activities into one unified interface—so nothing gets lost from your focus.

🔹 Smarter CPQ with Zia
Zia now suggests configuration rules based on observed business patterns. Plus, Price Rules let you personalize pricing using additional conditions.

🔹 ICR (Intelligent Character Recognition)
Create and enrich CRM records in a jiffy by capturing data directly from images. Best part? It’s zero-shot extraction—no prior training required.

🔹 Image-to-Canvas Template Transfer
Turn any image into a Canvas List View design instantly. Save hours of design effort with just a few clicks!

🔹 Global Sets Enhancements
Globally available picklists can now be color-coded for quicker identification and selection.

🔹 Automatic Portal Invites
Enable transparency with ease by configuring automatic portal invites—now supported in single and multiple languages.

🔹 File Movement to Zoho WorkDrive
Schedule and move files from CRM File Storage to Zoho WorkDrive in just one click.

🔹 Zia-Generated Formula Expressions
Describe your formula needs in natural language, and let Zia generate even complex expressions in seconds.

🚀 Keep watching this space for more Zoho CRM updates!

DetailsList.Title: Notes badge as a quick action in the list view
DetailsList.Description: The list view of all modules now has Notes badge as a quick action for each record, in addition to the existing Activity badge. You can add new notes and have quick visibility into the notes associated with each record directly from the list view.

DetailsList.Title: Power up your Kiosk Studio with real-time data capture, Client Scripts, and more!
DetailsList.Description:
We're introducing a powerful set of enhancements to Kiosk Studio in Zoho CRM to make your kiosk flows smarter and more efficient than ever.

- Launch kiosks from anywhere in your CRM using Client Scripts.
- Capture data live during kiosk execution.
- The GetRecords screen has been enhanced to fetch all records from a module, view more records with pagination, find records faster with the new search function and filters, select more records at a time with increased selection limits. The first GetRecords screen loads instantly with no refresh needed.

DetailsList.Title: Improved contact sync flow in Zoho CRM's Google integration
DetailsList.Description:
We've redesigned the sync process to give users more control over what data flows into Google. With this update, you can not just the Contacts module, but any custom module that stores contact information—so even your custom records can appear in Google Contacts.

We've also made testing your integration safe by enabling you to use your sandbox environment to test sync settings before deploying them to your production account.

DetailsList.Title: Auto-invite users to portals based on conditions
DetailsList.Description: You can now set conditions to automatically send invites to users to access a portal in Zoho CRM. When those conditions are met—during record creation or record updates—Zoho CRM will instantly send an invite from the assigned user group to the right contact.

DetailsList.Title: Existing users can now access the WorkDrive-powered file storage experience
DetailsList.Description: Existing users can schedule the migration of their files and folders in the Documents tab and record attachments to WorkDrive. Once the migration is complete, they will have access to a modern user interface, advanced file management capabilities, and more economical storage in Zoho CRM.

DetailsList.Title: Transform your Zoho CRM layouts into print-ready documents with Canvas Print View
DetailsList.Description: Canvas's Print View option lets users convert module data into physical sheets directly from their Zoho CRM accounts.

DetailsList.Title: Contextual assistance in Smart Prompt with Record Assistant and support for more AI models
DetailsList.Description:
Smart Prompt now offers users summaries, key details, and content suggestions directly inside each record through the Record Assistant. When drafting email templates, the Template Assistant helps generate and refine content based on your inputs. Smart Prompt also supports additional AI models, including Gemini, Claude, Cohere, DeepSeek*, and SiliconFlow* so admins can choose the model that best fits their organization’s requirements.

*Available only in the CN DC.

DetailsList.Title: Access the Reports module in Zoho CRM's Android app
DetailsList.Description: You can now access the Reports module in Zoho CRM's Android app and view reports created in the CRM web app. You can also export these reports and send them via email directly from the app.

DetailsList.Title: Create and update records instantly using ICR's new zero-shot field prompting
DetailsList.Description: Zia Vision already comes equipped with intelligent character recognition (ICR) so you can extract data from physical documents. In addition to its existing template-based extraction function, Zia's ICR can now capture and digitize data without any prior training or human intervention at all. Using a vision-language model (VLM), you can seamlessly convert data from paper to digital—just like that!
DetailsList.read_moreTxt: Explore Zero-shot field prompting at Zoho CRM

DetailsList.Title: Multiple file upload support for subforms in Zoho CRM's Android app
DetailsList.Description: Previously, you could only add a single file in the subform file upload field. With this update, you now can add up to five files in your subform file upload field.

DetailsList.Title: Kiosk is now available in Zoho CRM's Android app
DetailsList.Description: You can now access Kiosk flows in Zoho CRM's Android app. Once a kiosk is configured and published in the web version, it can be used in the mobile app via custom buttons, blueprints, home pages, and Canvas.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing swipe actions for Zoho CRM's Android app
DetailsList.Description: Instead of opening each record one by one, you can now perform actions on records—like editing, cloning, or sending them—by swiping left or right on the record in the list view of any module or in the calendar view of the Meetings and Calendar modules.

DetailsList.Title: What's new in Zoho CRM? | October 2025
DetailsList.Description:
Discover what’s new in Zoho CRM for October 2025! 🚀
This month’s update brings smarter setup controls, better automation, improved mobile features, and more seamless integrations.
✨ Highlights:
• New Setup Homepage with inline search and frequently used tools
• Deploy Custom Views from Sandbox to Production in one click
• WhatsApp added as a follow-up action in Cadences + enhanced permissions
• Rich-text formatting in Notes
• Freshsales support in Data Migration
• Improved Zoho Creator integration with Teamspace & permission controls
• Outlook/Office 365 sync via dedicated Graph API
• Mobile updates: record sharing (Android), meeting location options, subform file uploads, Survey access, and iOS Home button
• Follow Zoho CRM updates on Arattai
Stay tuned for more enhancements coming next month! 🔔

DetailsList.Title: Segment your module data with Zoho CRM For Everyone's split view
DetailsList.Description: The split view in Zoho CRM's next-gen UI gives users the power to break down large sets of records into smaller, categorized tables based on picklist fields, users, or defined criteria. This interactive layout enables users to view and manage multiple sets of data side by side, providing a more contextual, clutter-free, and actionable interface.

DetailsList.Title: Assign multiple owners to requester-created records in CRM For Everyone
DetailsList.Description:
Team module admins can now transfer ownership of new records created by requesters to multiple users within the team module. They can choose up to five users to be record owners, with two available approaches:
  • Select the new owners from the list of team module users.
  • Establish an assignment rule for any request raised for that team module.

DetailsList.Title: VoC update: Analyze feedback from customers across the web—even ones not yet added to your CRM
DetailsList.Description: VoC in Zoho CRM now enables you to analyze reviews and responses from all kinds of users and followers from inside and outside your business ecosystem. This gives you a 360-degree view of your CX stance in your market. You can check the pulse of your consumer market, strategize pricing and positioning based on their expectations, or even funnel them into your pipeline after identifying and assessing their expectations.

DetailsList.Title: Integrate your Outlook/Office 365 inbox with Zoho CRM via Graph API
DetailsList.Description: In addition to the existing IMAP and POP options, you can now integrate your Outlook/Office 365 inbox with Zoho CRM via Graph API. Going forward, this integration sets you up to access even smarter, faster, and more connected experiences when it comes to Microsoft services.

DetailsList.Title: Now configure Assignment Rules based on merge fields
DetailsList.Description: In Assignment rules, administrators can now qualify a record for assignment by using merge fields in the criteria, besides manually entered values. This will create more possibilities and flexibility to the record assignment practice.

DetailsList.Title: View lookup module data from CRM Canvas pages
DetailsList.Description: Admins can now add lookup module fields to Canvas detail view and list view pages. These fields are read-only and display the latest data from the linked lookup record. This enables users to access relevant context quickly, without needing to open multiple tabs.

DetailsList.Title: Client Script support for notes
DetailsList.Description: You can now trigger Client Scripts when users attempt to save notes or update existing ones.

DetailsList.Title: New looks and views: Calendar in Zoho CRM got a sleek facelift
DetailsList.Description:
- The Calendar now boasts the same look and feel as the next-gen CRM.
- Activities can now be distinguished at a glance via their new iconographic representations.
- The mini-calendar has been repositioned, and the calendar preference page now features new options.
- New views for users and groups can be created.
- User and group schedules in the organization can be looked up quickly.
- Weekly numbers can be added as labels.
- All-day events can be accessed in one space.
These enhancements simplify schedule management.

DetailsList.Title: New enhancements to email composer settings
DetailsList.Description:
Personalize and streamline your customer interactions while composing your emails. You can now:

- Add custom font types for email content.
- Add custom font sizes.
- Add a default reply-to address.
- Assign multiple email signatures through Zoho CRM's API support.

DetailsList.Title: New enhancements to Zoho CRM's Zoho Creator integration
DetailsList.Description: We've revamped the integration between Zoho CRM and Zoho Creator to align with Zoho Creator's new UI. With enhancements made to both the UI and functionality, you can now assign multiple developers, add users with defined permissions, and manage related lists more efficiently.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing customizable confirmation messages for users who double opt-in via webforms
DetailsList.Description:
Here are two enhancements to webforms:

- Users can now customize the confirmation messages for their double opt-in subscribers.

- Users can customize response emails for requests submitted through webforms.

DetailsList.Title: Homepage availability in Zoho CRM's iOS app
DetailsList.Description: The Zoho CRM Home page is now accessible from the mobile app. Users can switch between different homepages and view their added components directly within the app. Homepage customizations can be made only from Zoho CRM's web app.

DetailsList.Title: Multiple file upload support for subforms in Zoho CRM's iOS app
DetailsList.Description: Previously, users could only add a single file in subform file upload fields. With this update, users can add up to five files at once.

DetailsList.Title: Access the Zoho Survey integration in Zoho CRM's iOS app
DetailsList.Description: Zoho CRM's iOS app now supports the Zoho Survey integration. You can create, send, and take surveys, as well as view responses—all from the mobile app.

DetailsList.Title: The People Data Enrichment feature has been migrated to the Web Amigo extension
DetailsList.Description: The in-product People Data Enrichment feature in Zoho CRM has been migrated to a Marketplace extension. This change ensures better control over personal data handling and offers a more modular, scalable solution via the Web Amigo extension for both existing and new users.

DetailsList.Title: Build responsive record templates using Canvas's grid component
DetailsList.Description: Create visually proportionate and balanced record templates using the grid component. Made of uniformly sized cells and adjustable gutters, the grid component simplifies the design process, and with a breakpoint view, you can render data adaptively.

DetailsList.Title: Advanced scoring factors for multiple scoring rules
DetailsList.Description: We've added new scoring factors for multiple scoring rules to enhance customer insights by including criteria for different communication channels. This update also introduces the ability to capture the Voice of Customers through Zia and assign scores based on sentiments, intent, and competitor mentions.

DetailsList.Title: Update your user image in the Android app
DetailsList.Description: Previously users could only view user images added via the CRM web app, they can now upload or change their user images directly in the Zoho CRM Android app by selecting a photo from their galleries or uploading files.

DetailsList.Title: Client Script support for List Pages in Canvas
DetailsList.Description: Add custom behaviors to List Page(Canvas) with the newly added Client Script support.

DetailsList.Title: Client Scripts enabled for Professional edition users
DetailsList.Description: You can now use Client Scripts in the Professional edition to customize UI behavior and enhance user interactions in Zoho CRM.

DetailsList.Title: Set a venue preference for meetings in the Android app
DetailsList.Description: You can now set a meeting venue preference while creating or editing a meeting in Zoho CRM Android app. Choose the mode or venue of your meeting—online, in-office, or client location—and keep you meetings accurately organized.

DetailsList.Title: Augment the power of VoC analyses by factoring in online reviews and responses from anywhere
DetailsList.Description: In addition to usual sources, connect your online reviews, discussions, messages, and more with Zoho CRM and include them as custom sources for VoC analyses. This way, you can funnel in unsolicited feedback and opinions about your business and act accordingly.

DetailsList.Title: Quick enhancements to Zoho CRM's Reports feature
DetailsList.Description:
- Include or exclude record IDs in the following places: Export preference, scheduled reports settings, and email sending options.
- Add related records' IDs from the column selector to display in the report and their exports.
- Choose a record currency to display in reports in addition to your native currency.
- Track recently deleted reports via audit logs.

DetailsList.Title: Translation support for new data entities in Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Data entities like web tabs, layouts, sections, wizards, and wizard screens and segments are now available for translation in Zoho CRM. All you have to do is to export the language file, provide the equivalent terms for these entities, and import them into CRM to reflect these entities in your desired language.

DetailsList.Title: Group values using categories in analytical components
DetailsList.Description: Admins can now create categories to group values within analytical components and enhance data analysis. This feature supports picklist, currency, number, decimal, and percent fields, which simplifies the visualization of grouped data across multiple components and improves overall data insights.

DetailsList.Title: Refine your CRM dashboards using filters and and download underlying data
DetailsList.Description:
Dashboard filters refine all relevant dashboard components in one go. Instead of manually tweaking each component or switching to a different tool, users can now use dashboard filters to get the view they need instantly from Zoho CRM's Dashboards tab.

In addition, you can download a component's underlying data in CSV and Excel (XLS) formats.

DetailsList.Title: Share records within your organization in Zoho CRM's Android app
DetailsList.Description: In addition to the existing URL-sharing feature, users can now share records publicly with the entire organization or privately with specific users, roles, or groups. Once shared, users can easily revoke access anytime directly from the mobile app and exert full control over shared records.

DetailsList.Title: Optional field support for blueprints in the Android app
DetailsList.Description: With this update, users can now use optional fields in blueprint transitions in the Android app. Users only have to fill out mandatory fields immediately, and can leave optional fields blank or complete them later. Use the "Save as Draft" option to save your progress even if not all fields are filled.

DetailsList.Title: Access the Zoho Survey integration in Zoho CRM's Android app
DetailsList.Description: Zoho CRM's Android app now supports the Zoho Survey integration. You can create, send, and take surveys, as well as view responses—all via the mobile app.

DetailsList.Title: Group values using categories in analytical components
DetailsList.Description: Admins can now create categories to group values within analytical components and enhance data analysis. This feature supports picklist, currency, number, decimal, and percent fields, which simplifies the visualization of grouped data across multiple components and improves overall data insights.

DetailsList.Title: Catalyst Solutions
DetailsList.Description: Catalyst Solutions provides ready-to-use, customizable solutions to streamline bulk data processing in Zoho CRM. It automates bulk read, process, and write operations.

DetailsList.Title: Refine your CRM dashboards using filters and download underlying data
DetailsList.Description:
Dashboard filters refine all relevant dashboard components in one go. Instead of manually tweaking each component or switching to a different tool, users can now use dashboard filters to get the view they need instantly from Zoho CRM's Dashboards tab.

In addition, you can download a component's underlying data in CSV and Excel (XLS) formats.

DetailsList.Title: Thread view for emails sent from the Cases module in Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: The email thread view is now available for emails sent from the Cases module. This enhancement offers better readability and convenience. With the thread view, it's now easier to check for all replies related to a particular email sent from Zoho CRM's Cases module.

DetailsList.Title: Upgrading the AI model of keyword analyses in VoC
DetailsList.Description: Despite being straightforward, our custom keyword analysis in VoC has lacked context and was potentially confusing for CRM users. Thus, to provide more accurate analyses, VoC will hereafter deconstruct customer responses as keyphrases.

DetailsList.Title: Widgets are now available in the Professional edition
DetailsList.Description: Professional edition users can now create and use widgets to extend CRM functionality and embed custom components.

DetailsList.Title: Widget component support for Zoho CRM's Android app
DetailsList.Description: We've added support for widget components on user-specific home pages in the Android app. With this update, you can now access and use the widgets that were added to your Zoho CRM home page on the web, right from your mobile app.

DetailsList.Title: Widget component support for Zoho CRM's Android app
DetailsList.Description: We've added support for widget components on user-specific home pages in the Android app. With this update, you can now access and use the widgets that were added to your Zoho CRM home page on the web, right from your mobile app.

DetailsList.Title: Update your user image in the Zoho CRM iOS app
DetailsList.Description: Previously, you could only view user images added via the CRM web app. You can now upload or change your user image directly from the Zoho CRM iOS app by selecting a photo from your gallery or uploading a file.

DetailsList.Title: Kiosks are now available in the Zoho CRM iOS app
DetailsList.Description: You can now access Kiosk flows from the Zoho CRM iOS app. Once a Kiosk is published and set up in the web version, it can be used in the mobile app via record detail views, custom buttons, Blueprints, and Canvas.

DetailsList.Title: WhatsApp deep linking in Zoho CRM iOS app
DetailsList.Description:
The Zoho CRM iOS app now supports WhatsApp deep linking, making it easier to send messages directly through WhatsApp from your CRM account. Users can initiate a WhatsApp message in the following ways:

- By tapping the mobile number in a record's business card or details page.
- By selecting the "Send text message" option in the record's More actions.

DetailsList.Title: Create formula-based criteria to stop time-based formulas from executing.
DetailsList.Description: To determine how long a record has stayed in a particular stage, admins can stop a formula by setting criteria. This is applicable for formulas that are constructed using the "Now" function in their syntax.

DetailsList.Title: Automatically refresh formula fields with the "Now" function to view real-time values
DetailsList.Description: Formula fields that include the "Now" function in their syntax run computations based on the present time. However, due to technical constraints, these fields previously rendered real-time results only when the record was manually edited or updated via automated actions made to the record. The good news is that for scenarios that require constant processing of the formula, admins can now easily enable automatic refreshing for fields whenever the record is viewed.

DetailsList.Title: Dynamic display support for Zoho CRM for Android
DetailsList.Description: You can now customize the fields that appear in your list view for each module. Choose up to nine fields to be displayed in the list view of each module and organize them into headings, subheadings, and items. This makes it easy to access the key details you need quickly—right from your list view.

DetailsList.Title: Kiosk Studio: GetRecord as a standalone component, cloning kiosks, new kiosk actions, and more
DetailsList.Description:
We've made Kiosk Studio more user friendly with the following new additions:
- Create GetRecord as a standalone, reusable component in your kiosks.
- View GetRecord details without the mandatory selection options in kiosks.
- View record details from screens, include data from the Users module, and select logged-in user as the email recipients in your kiosks.
- Use new actions like Open Link, Open Record, Clone Kiosks, and Reorder Buttons, and enjoy newly added email field support.

DetailsList.Title: New looks and views: Calendar in Zoho CRM got a sleek facelift
DetailsList.Description:
- The Calendar now boasts the same look and feel as the next-gen CRM. 
- Activities can now be distinguished at a glance via their new iconographic representations.
- The mini-calendar has been repositioned, and the calendar preference page now features new options.
- New views for users and groups can be created.
- User and group schedules in the organization can be looked up quickly.
- Weekly numbers can be added as labels.
- All-day events can be accessed in one space.

These enhancements simplify schedule management.

DetailsList.Title: Create category columns in reports
DetailsList.Description: Drawing context from reports with large data sets can be challenging and time-consuming. By creating category columns, you can easily organize report data into groups or categories for quick inference and analysis.

DetailsList.Title: Client Script Commands
DetailsList.Description: Users can now execute client scripts anywhere in Zoho CRM using Client Script Commands, which are accessible via the command palette or personalized keyboard shortcuts. These commands enhance productivity and user experience.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing "Previous" and "Next" operators for enhanced date-based filtering
DetailsList.Description: Two new comparators—"Previous" and "Next"—have been added to the filter panel to enable more precise date-based filtering.

DetailsList.Title: Upsert missing data into migrated databases in Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: After migrating to Zoho CRM, if there's any data you forgot to map or migrate, or if the process accrued new data in the legacy system, administrators can update or insert it back into Zoho CRM using the "upsert" operation. By upserting legacy data, the timeline of those records are preserved to maintain the integrity of the native data.

DetailsList.Title: New alert when removing synced CRM fields from Zoho Analytics
DetailsList.Description: When removing synced modules or fields from Advanced Analytics in the Zoho Analytics configuration in Zoho CRM, a pop-up alert will prompt users to disassociate these components in Analytics first before proceeding with the removal.

DetailsList.Title: Create custom rollup summary fields in Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Summarize data across related records by selecting specific modules, applying functions like Sum or Average, and adding criteria to filter relevant data. Custom rollup summary fields enable tailored insights and align with unique business needs for more effective data analysis.

DetailsList.Title: Quickly migrate attachments to Zoho CRM without having to restart the process multiple times
DetailsList.Description: You can now continue a migration by uploading skipped attachments without starting over—no need to re-upload the attachment CSV or start a new migration. You can repeat this multiple times until all your attachments are in place.

DetailsList.Title: Create custom rollup summary fields in Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Summarize data across related records by selecting specific modules, applying functions like Sum or Average, and adding criteria to filter relevant data. Custom rollup summary fields enable tailored insights and align with unique business needs for more effective data analysis.

DetailsList.Title: Image upload field support for Zoho CRM's Android app
DetailsList.Description: You can now upload images using the Image upload field in the Zoho CRM Android app. This feature is supported across all modules except the Activities modules.

DetailsList.Title: Zia suggestions for analytics components
DetailsList.Description: By analyzing your data and examining your reports and charts, Zia will provide top-notch suggestions for components in Zoho CRM Analytics that align with your organization's needs and business processes.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing team modules in Zoho CRM's iOS app
DetailsList.Description: Zoho CRM's iOS app now supports team modules, allowing teams whose work doesn't fit into standard CRM modules (like delivery teams, onboarding teams, etc.) to manage their tasks efficiently. Users in these team modules can create and modify records based on their permissions. Users added as requesters can use the My Requests tab to submit requests in team modules.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing team modules in Zoho CRM's Android app
DetailsList.Description:
Zoho CRM's Android app now supports team modules, allowing teams whose work doesn't fit into standard CRM modules (like delivery teams, onboarding teams, etc.) to manage their tasks efficiently. Users in these team modules can create and modify records based on their permissions. Users added as requesters can use the My Requests tab to submit requests in team modules. 
Show Less

DetailsList.Title: Introducing teamspaces in Zoho CRM's Android app
DetailsList.Description: Now that teamspaces are available in Zoho CRM's Android app, you can easily manage team-specific workspaces on the go. Each team has access only to the modules relevant to them, ensuring that your CRM stays organized and free from unnecessary clutter. You can quickly switch between teamspaces, access relevant modules, and navigate folders—all directly from your Android app.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing teamspaces in Zoho CRM's iOS app
DetailsList.Description: Now that teamspaces are available in Zoho CRM's iOS app, you can easily manage team-specific workspaces on the go. Each team has access only to the modules relevant to them, ensuring that your CRM stays organized and free from unnecessary clutter. You can quickly switch between teamspaces, access relevant modules, and navigate folders—all directly from your iOS app.

DetailsList.Title: LINE for Business now integrates with Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: The popular LINE messaging application is now available for integration with Zoho CRM. You can send personalized B2C messages, predefined texts, and attachments to LINE users from the Messages module in Zoho CRM.

DetailsList.Title: Released updated SDKs with V8 API support
DetailsList.Description: Released updated SDKs for the following languages with support for Zoho CRM’s V8 APIs: PHP, Node.js, Java, C#, Python, Ruby, JavaScript, TypeScript, and Scala.

DetailsList.Title: Use MS Teams for daily call operations
DetailsList.Description: Organizations using Microsoft Teams phone system can now integrate it effectively with Zoho CRM for tasks like dialing numbers and logging calls.

DetailsList.Title: Released updated SDKs with V8 API support
DetailsList.Description: Updated Zoho CRM SDKs supporting V8 APIs to v2.0 across PHP, Node.js, Java, C#, Python, Ruby, JavaScript, TypeScript, and Scala. This version includes support for the following new V8 APIs: Get related record counts for records, call preferences, record-level email sharing, data-sharing rules, and get rich text fields.

DetailsList.Title: Zoho CRM V8 APIs Released
DetailsList.Description:
• Zoho CRM's V8 APIs are now live, offering enhanced functionality, improved performance, and expanded capabilities.
  • New APIs include: Get related record counts for records, call preferences, record-level email sharing, data-sharing rules, and get rich text fields. We've also released the V8 API specification in OpenAPI format as part of this release.

DetailsList.Title: Detect anomalies in user performance in the forecast report
DetailsList.Description: Zoho CRM's Forecast report helps businesses monitor the performance of their sales reps and spot anomalies. Whether it's a surge or a dip, Zia can report the sudden changes and notify the forecast manager every week.

DetailsList.Title: Empower CRM users with on-demand insights into customer emotions
DetailsList.Description: Summon customer records based on VoC insights like events, keywords, and responses, and derive personal insights from records via custom kiosk screens. This enhancement serves busy CX agents by providing quick information on customers' states of mind and perceptions without rummaging through records to review their latest responses.

DetailsList.Title: Take control of your canvas layout with the new flex component
DetailsList.Description: Use the flex element in the record detail view to control your layout and its responsiveness in the user interface. This element enables you to organize data dynamically and improve user experience in a canvas.

DetailsList.Title: Client Script: subform events and actions
DetailsList.Description: Client Script now supports subform events and subform-specific APIs, enabling validation, automation, and dynamic updates based on user actions like adding, deleting, or modifying rows.

DetailsList.Title: Rich Text Field support in lower editions: Standard and Professional
DetailsList.Description: The rich text fields support in Zoho CRM which was previously available only in Enterprise and Ultimate editions, is being extended to include Standard and Professional editions to enable small businesses to format text.

DetailsList.Title: Email access in the Cases module
DetailsList.Description: Users can now send individual or mass emails to related contacts directly from the Cases module. Users can easily compose emails by clicking the Send Email button in a case record. The recipient's primary email address will automatically appear, and users can choose from secondary or custom addresses as well. All case-specific emails sent to the associated contact directly from the Cases module in the Email section in the Related List can be viewed and can be filtered by "Sent Emails from CRM" or Emails associated with the contact." Mass emails can also be sent easily from the Cases module by selecting a pre-made template for the same query.

DetailsList.Title: Image upload field support for Zoho CRM's iOS app
DetailsList.Description: You can now upload images using the Image upload field in the Zoho CRM iOS app. This feature is supported across all modules except the Activities modules.

DetailsList.Title: The Zoho CRM Q1 2025 Update Is Here!
DetailsList.Description: Your Zoho CRM just got a powerful upgrade with new features and enhancements designed to boost user experience, productivity, and performance.

DetailsList.Title: Client Script support for portals
DetailsList.Description: Your existing Client Scripts will now automatically function within portals without requiring rewrites or duplication. You can customize Client Scripts to apply portal-wide or to target specific user types or specific users and ensure they align with your business needs.

DetailsList.Title: Client Script: subform events and actions
DetailsList.Description: Client Script now supports subform events and subform-specific APIs, enabling validation, automation, and dynamic updates based on user actions like adding, deleting, or modifying rows.

DetailsList.Title: Exclude users, roles, or territories from forecasting for enhanced context
DetailsList.Description: Administrators or forecast managers can exclude users, roles, or territories from participating in a forecast. This can help ensure targets only get allocated to the relevant entities so that reports will reflect accurate and contextual achievements. If required, these excluded parties can be included again.

DetailsList.Title: Adjust open deal revenue in a forecast report to set realistic expectations
DetailsList.Description: Your open deals hold the promise of your future revenue. However, thanks to external factors, they won't close as quoted. Thus, to avoid misleading expectations for decision-makers, deal owners and their managers can use their assessments to adjust projected revenue.

DetailsList.Title: Field tool tip support for Zoho CRM's iOS app
DetailsList.Description: You can now view field tool tips in the Zoho CRM iOS app. Both static tool tips (shown inside the field) and info tool tips (displayed as an info icon) added from the web version are supported.

DetailsList.Title: Rich text support for multi-line fields in Zoho CRM iOS app
DetailsList.Description: The Zoho CRM iOS app now supports rich text formatting in multi-line fields. Previously, these fields accepted only plain text. With this update, you can format your content using the toolbar that appears when you tap on a supported multi-line field.

DetailsList.Title: Lock dashboards , display large numbers in shortened form, and view record count in KPIs
DetailsList.Description: Shared dashboards can now be locked for increased security. Within each component, you have the option to display large numbers in shorter formats for easier comprehension and comparison. You have the option to show record counts alongside the metric in your KPI components.

DetailsList.Title: What's new in Zoho CRM? | March 2025
DetailsList.Description: Check out the latest enhancements in Zoho CRM this March, including Zia Strategy Influencer, Smart Prompt Builder for custom buttons, Forecast Adjustment, Forecast Hierarchy, Deal Split, and more.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Python SDK supporting V7 APIs to version 5.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
• Introduced new parameters across multiple classes, including GetAttachmentsParam, GetEmailTemplatesParam, ModulesOperations, and UserGroupsOperations
  • Added new fields in layouts, record locking configuration, and PickListValue classes.
  • Renamed methods in DealContactRolesOperations and CadencesExecutionOperations classes.
  • Changed the parameter order from (recordId, moduleAPIName) to (moduleAPIName, recordId) in the addTags and removeTags methods of the TagsOperations class.
  • Support added for new APIs: AuditLogExport, Cadences, DealContactRoles, InventoryConvert, InventoryMassConvert, Layouts, Modules, Rich Text Fields, RecordLockingConfiguration, RecycleBin, UserGroups, UsersTerritories, and ZiaEnrichment.
  • Changed the display_field datatype in the Modules class from String to Object.
  • Introduced new fields: reference_value, deal_category, and show_value in PickListValue.
  • Removed the module parameter from the get_scoring_rule method in ScoringRulesOperations.
  • Deprecated and removed the following methods: UsersTerritories, validate_before_transfer_for_all_territories, validate_before_transfer, delink_and_transfer_from_all_territories, and delink_and_transfer_from_specific_territory.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Python SDK supporting V7 APIs to version 6.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
• Handled error in Utility.getModules for cases where the paramInstance parameter is not passed.
  • Added validation for API parameters and header names and their data types.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded CSharp SDK supporting V7 APIs to version 5.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
• Introduced new parameters across multiple classes, including GetAttachmentsParam, ModulesOperations, and UserGroupsOperations.
  • Added new fields in PickListValue, SectionField, and Sections classes.
  • Renamed methods in DealContactRolesOperations and CadencesExecutionOperations classes.
  • Updated data types: displayField in Modules changed from String to Object, and threadId in EmailRelatedRecords.Email changed from Long to String.
  • Changed the parameter order from (recordId, moduleAPIName) to (moduleAPIName, recordId) in the addTags and removeTags methods of the TagsOperations class.
  • Deprecated and removed the following methods: UsersTerritories, validateBeforeTransferForAllTerritories, validateBeforeTransfer, delinkAndTransferFromAllTerritories, and delinkAndTransferFromSpecificTerritory.
  • Added support for new APIs: AuditLogExport, Cadences, DealContactRoles, InventoryConvert, InventoryMassConvert, Layouts, Modules, Rich Text Fields, RecordLockingConfiguration, RecycleBin, UserGroups, UsersTerritories, and ZiaEnrichment.
  • Enhanced FileStore behavior by updating save and update token methods to prevent duplicate entries in the token store.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded CSharp SDK supporting V7 APIs to version 4.0.0
DetailsList.Description: Updated the CA DataCenter accounts URL.

DetailsList.Title: Custom modules are now available in all editions
DetailsList.Description:
- Custom modules are now available for the Standard and Professional editions, in addition to Enterprise and Ultimate editions.
- The custom module limits for Standard and Professional edition are 10 and 25 respectively.
- The base limits for Enterprise and Ultimate editions have been increased to 200 and 500 respectively.
- User-based restrictions have been removed for Enterprise and Ultimate editions, enabling users to create more custom modules.
- The custom module count includes both organization modules and team modules.

DetailsList.Title: What's new in Zoho CRM | February 2025
DetailsList.Description: Check out the latest enhancements in Zoho CRM this February, including custom modules in basic editions, multi-record selection in CPQ, enhancements in Approval processes, mandatory consent checkbox for email imports and instant updates with the 'Now Function’ and more

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded NodeJS SDK supporting V7 APIs to version 4.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
• Updated FileStore save and update token methods to prevent duplicate entries in the token store.
  • Updated the CA DataCenter Accounts URL.

DetailsList.Title: Multi-select lookup fields in the iOS app
DetailsList.Description: Manage many-to-many relationships on the go with multi-select lookup fields. Easily link multiple records, like events to services or products to orders, and access detailed records for each association from the linked modules.

DetailsList.Title: Send predefined WhatsApp messages from Android devices
DetailsList.Description: You can now access and send predefined WhatsApp messages created on Zoho CRM's web version from the Android app. This makes it easier to respond quickly with consistent, professional messages, right from your phone.

DetailsList.Title: Extended record image support for Android app
DetailsList.Description: Previously, record image support in the Android app was limited to the Leads and Contacts modules. This support has now been extended to include Accounts, Deals, Cases, Solutions, Products, Vendors, and custom modules. To use this feature, ensure that record images are enabled in the module layout in Zoho CRM's web version.

DetailsList.Title: Create formula-based criteria to stop time-based formulas from executing.
DetailsList.Description: To determine how long a record has stayed in a particular stage, admins can stop a formula by setting criteria. This is applicable for formulas that are constructed using the "Now" function in their syntax.

DetailsList.Title: Automatically refresh formula fields with the "Now" function to view real-time values
DetailsList.Description: Formula fields that include the "Now" function in their syntax run computations based on the present time. However, due to technical constraints, these fields previously rendered real-time results only when the record was manually edited or updated via automated actions made to the record. The good news is that for scenarios that require constant processing of the formula, admins can now easily enable automatic refreshing for fields whenever the record is viewed.

DetailsList.Title: Drill down into your customers' voice and derive practical insights
DetailsList.Description: Obtain a list of records that contribute to a plotted value on VoC charts, look at the cohort of customers that share the same opinion, sentiment, or behavior, and devise measures to optimize their experiences right from the drilldown page.

DetailsList.Title: Custom modules are now available in all editions
DetailsList.Description:
• Custom modules are now available for the Standard and Professional editions, in addition to Enterprise and Ultimate editions.
  • The custom module limits for Standard and Professional edition are 10 and 25 respectively.
  • The base limits for Enterprise and Ultimate editions have been increased to 200 and 500 respectively.
  • User-based restrictions have been removed for Enterprise and Ultimate editions, enabling users to create more custom modules.
  • The custom module count includes both organization modules and team modules.

DetailsList.Title: CPQ rules for custom subforms and custom modules in Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: CPQ's capabilities have been extended beyond the default Quotes module to all inventory modules across CRM, as well as custom modules. Additionally, CPQ rules can now be run on custom subforms in a record. [Public early access]

DetailsList.Title: Multi-select lookup fields in the Android app
DetailsList.Description: Manage many-to-many relationships on the go with multi-select lookup fields. Easily link multiple records, like events to services or products to orders, and access detailed records for each association using linking modules.

DetailsList.Title: Catch anomalies in your sales process without configuring causative factors
DetailsList.Description: If your lead is inactive, a step in your process gets skipped, or you detect anomalies in your sales cycle, you can be notified via email, Zoho Cliq, or Zia notifications.

DetailsList.Title: What's New in Zoho CRM? 2024 wrapped
DetailsList.Description:
Reviewing all major updates we've had in Zoho CRM in 2024, we've witnessed Copy Customization, with which you can copy CRM setups across DCs, Kiosk, where you can create and share bite-sized content directly on your CRM pages, Cadences Studio, with better follow-up process that automatically sets tasks for your agents, Canvas - giving your team the freedom to create, and finally, Client Script - for all those custom functions you want to implement.

For 2025, we’re refining workflows and scoring capabilities, streamlining the CommandCenter's usability, enhancing Kiosks and a lot more!

DetailsList.Title: Business messaging using WhatsApp integration just got more contextual
DetailsList.Description: In addition to associating approved message templates as automation actions, sales reps can send Meta-approved templates manually to their leads and customers as B2C chats. Also, new features like threaded replies and previewing audio messages have been added to Zoho CRM's WhatsApp for Business integration. These enhancements add clarity, convenience, and context to your outreach programs.

DetailsList.Title: Accessibility controls have been added to enable users of all abilities
DetailsList.Description: Individual users can leverage 18 accessibility controls to accommodate their unique needs. These new controls are designed to support users with vision impairments, motor disabilities, and those who could benefit from enhanced interaction options. Users no longer have to deal with a "standard" CRM that only works for users without disabilities. Instead, they can perform all their tasks with ease in a CRM that can be configured to match their unique needs.

DetailsList.Title: Choose only the necessary Deal fields during bulk lead conversion in CRM
DetailsList.Description: You can choose and fill only the essential fields from any deal module layout during mass conversion. This lets you conveniently update fields based on your preference. Fields that are not selected here will be populated based on lead conversion mapping.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Python SDK supporting V7 APIs to version 4.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
• Updated FileStore save and update token methods to prevent duplicate entries in the token store.
  • Updated the CA DataCenter Accounts URL.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Java SDK supporting V7 APIs to version 6.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
• Removed the module parameter from the getScoringRule method in the ScoringRulesOperations class.
  • Changed the parameter order from (recordId, moduleAPIName) to (moduleAPIName, recordId) in the addTags and removeTags methods of the TagsOperations class.
  • Renamed methods in the CadencesExecutionOperations class: enrolCadences is now enrollCadences, and unenrolCadences is now unenrollCadences.
  • Updated FileStore save and update token methods to prevent duplicate entries in the token store.
  • Updated the CA DataCenter Accounts URL.

DetailsList.Title: Moderate user access to Strategy Influencer dashboards and enable personalized strategies
DetailsList.Description: Strategy Influencer dashboards can be retained for private access, shared with select people, roles, or groups, or exposed to all users in the organization. These sharing preferences enable Zia to prescribe tailor-made strategies for each user viewing a shared dashboard. Furthermore, admins and leaders in the organization can look at how these strategies are being rendered for each user to evaluate their adherence and relevance.

DetailsList.Title: What's new in Zoho CRM? | December 2024
DetailsList.Description:
Here's a summary of what's new in Zoho CRM for Dec' 24
  • Kiosk Studio is now available in the Professional Edition.
  • Refine your search and pull related data with cross module filtering
  • Voice of the Customer is now available in Advanced filters
  • Enhanced Global search experience
  • Personalization for Double Opt-in users
  • Enhancements in Analytics component
  • Log in to CRM using mobile number

DetailsList.Title: Identify and act upon records with VoC insights using advanced filters
DetailsList.Description: Using the cross-module filtering capability in advanced filters, sales reps can sift through customer records based on actions and corresponding behaviors to find responses and keywords. By doing so, they can derive insights into their customers' attitudes and feelings and target them with action plans

DetailsList.Title: Dynamically filter lookup records based on field values
DetailsList.Description: Zoho CRM now supports dynamic filters for lookup fields, allowing real-time filtering based on the field values in the current module. This ensures more precise data entry, saving time and reducing errors.

DetailsList.Title: Manage permissions for entire subforms
DetailsList.Description: Users can now set permissions (view, create, edit, and delete) for an entire subform to simplify access management. Previously, you could only add field-level permissions and exert control only over specific fields. With this update, users can now manage permissions for the subform as a whole. These permissions also extend to Portals to enable external access with better controls.

DetailsList.Title: CRM portals support SAML-based SSO
DetailsList.Description: Admins can enable SAML-based SSO for portal users to ease the process of logging into the CRM portal. This reduces the need to maintain separate credentials for the portal and to login separately each time users want to access the portal.

DetailsList.Title: Richer search experience in CRM with precise results, followup actions, and AskZia
DetailsList.Description: The global search feature has been enhanced to improve its usability. Users can restrict search to particular modules. They can search by record name or tags. Users can view additional information and take actions right from search results. AskZia can also be accessed within global search.

DetailsList.Title: Quickly summarize email threads using Zia's email intelligence
DetailsList.Description: In addition to summarizing individual emails, Zia can summarize an email thread, directly from the email-related list. This provides the busy reps and managers with the gist of the conversation without much scrolling.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing customizable confirmation messages for users who double opt-in via webforms
DetailsList.Description:
Here are two enhancements to webforms:
- Users can now customize the confirmation messages for their double opt-in subscribers.
- Users can customize response emails for requests submitted through webforms.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded PHP SDK supporting V6 APIs to version 8.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
• Updated FileStore save and update token methods to prevent duplicate entries in the token store.
  • Updated the CADataCenter Accounts URL.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded C# SDK supporting V7 APIs to version 3.0.0
DetailsList.Description: Added support for handling 'text/plain' content type as a file download.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded PHP SDK supporting V7 APIs to version 3.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
• Updated FileStore save and update token methods to prevent duplicate entries in the token store.
  • Updated the CA DataCenter Accounts URL.

DetailsList.Title: Canvas views extended to new modules
DetailsList.Description: Canvas detail view now supports Calls, Tasks, Meetings, Services, and Appointments modules, allowing users to customize and enhance the visual display of these records for improved data interaction and clarity. Additionally, users can now create Canvas list views for Services and Appointments modules.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded PHP SDK supporting V7 APIs to version 3.1.0
DetailsList.Description: Improved token generation in the OAuthToken class.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded PHP SDK supporting V6 APIs to version 8.1.0
DetailsList.Description:
• Updated FileStore save and update token methods to prevent duplicate entries in the token store.
  • Updated the CA DataCenter Accounts URL.

DetailsList.Title: Wizard support in Zoho CRM's Android app
DetailsList.Description: Zoho CRM's Android app now supports wizard layouts for efficient data gathering on mobile. This helps divide long forms into multiple, manageable screens to reduce clutter. Additionally, you can save the record as a draft at any point for later use.

DetailsList.Title: New extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: MeetRecord for Zoho CRM, ABR Procore Extension for Zoho CRM, Convert Lead from Deal for Zoho CRM and more

DetailsList.Title: Cross-screen field support with conditional rules in Wizards and a "back" button for easier navigation
DetailsList.Description: Cross-screen field support is now available in multi-screen wizards, enabling users to set condition rules based on fields filled in previous screens. Previously, conditional rules could only be applied to fields within the same screen. Now, users can show or hide fields on one screen depending on data entered on earlier screens. Additionally, a "back" button has been added at the bottom-left to help users navigate between screens.

DetailsList.Title: CRM portal users can now log in using their mobile phone numbers
DetailsList.Description: Businesses can now invite portal users using their mobile phone numbers. These portal users can log in using their mobile numbers and OTPs. Businesses can customize templates for these portal-related SMS messages. Please note that this enhancement is currently supported only for companies registered in India. Businesses can send portal-related SMSs from their registered sender IDs to customers in India.

DetailsList.Title: Cross module filtering is now supported in CRM
DetailsList.Description: You can now filter by related modules and filter by subforms. Both options are available within advanced filters.

DetailsList.Title: Descriptive reasoning for churn predictions
DetailsList.Description: Zia Churn Prediction now provides detailed reasoning behind each churn score. Instead of just indicating the likelihood of churn, Zia reveals the factors contributing to the score, offering more transparency. A new "Learn More" button in the Churn Prediction widget shows the proportional contribution of each factor, allowing you to understand why a customer may churn and which factors are keeping them engaged.

DetailsList.Title: Record locking supported for products module
DetailsList.Description: You can now lock product records in Zoho CRM to restrict edits and transitions, ensuring data protection and consistency, with manual or automatic locking options available.

DetailsList.Title: Customizable AI solutions through QuickML integration with CRM
DetailsList.Description: You can now harness Catalyst's Quick ML capabilities directly within your CRM accounts by integrating with Catalyst. This will eliminate the need for complex data transfers and empower businesses to create custom ML models and derive actionable insights with ease.

DetailsList.Title: What's new in Zoho CRM? | November 2024
DetailsList.Description:
Here's a summary of what's new in Zoho CRM for Nov' 24
  • Single Sign On option for portal users
  • Cross screen field support using Wizards
  • Enhanced Email access controls
  • 'Open Activity' component in Homepage
  • Category Columns in reports
  • Copy Customization functionality across DCs

DetailsList.Title: Manage WhatsApp Business chats directly from the Zoho CRM Android app
DetailsList.Description: You can now access WhatsApp Business messages directly from the Zoho CRM Android app. With this integration, all your WhatsApp chats are available in the Messages module, making it easier to stay connected with customers on the go. You can reply to messages, share attachments, sort chats by time, and even navigate to related records—all from your mobile device.

DetailsList.Title: New widgets support in the Zoho CRM iOS app
DetailsList.Description: Users can now access several new widgets to enhance productivity, which enable you to manage approvals, track activities, access recent items, customize favorite modules, and view deal statuses—all from your widget screens.

DetailsList.Title: New extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Morning Green Invoice for Zoho CRM, LogixOne EasyQuote for Zoho CRM, Routing Number Validation for Zoho CRM, and more.

DetailsList.Title: Portal user licenses enhancement
DetailsList.Description: Invite up to 1,000 portal users for free across all user types, including Leads, Contacts, Vendors, and custom modules. Add users with the same email domain as the super admin to the Client Portal user type. Create all five portal user types before purchasing licenses.

DetailsList.Title: Expanded translation support for regional languages
DetailsList.Description: Zoho CRM now supports additional languages for key interface elements such as module names, field labels, and picklist values. Untranslated content will remain in the default language, allowing global teams to work more efficiently in their preferred language while maintaining system consistency.

DetailsList.Title: Copy Customization functionality now works across DCs and for previously customized accounts
DetailsList.Description: You can copy a customization from a CRM org in one DC to an org in any other DC, thus reducing the number of source accounts needed to serve clients across the globe. You can also delete configurations in an account and copy customization to it. This can be done up to three times.

DetailsList.Title: Create category columns in reports
DetailsList.Description: Drawing context from reports with large data sets can be challenging and time-consuming. By creating category columns, you can easily organize report data into groups or categories for quick inference and analysis.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Nodejs SDK supporting V7 APIs to version 3.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
• Introduced new parameters across various classes, including page_token in GetAttachmentsParam, paramInstance in getModules (ModulesOperations), and getAssociatedUsersCount (UserGroupsOperations).
  • Added new fields: delete in layouts SectionField and Sections classes, and LockingRules in recordlockingconfiguration. Also added referenceValue, dealCategory, and showValue in PickListValue.
  • Updated data types: displayField in Modules (String to Object) and threadId in Related Records Email (Long to String).
  • Renamed methods: deleteContactRoleRealation to deleteContactRoleRelation (DealContactRolesOperations), enrolCadences to enrollCadences, and unenrolCadences to unenrollCadences (CadencesExecutionOperations).
  • Updated parameter order in addTags and removeTags methods of TagsOperations (recordId, moduleAPIName to moduleAPIName, recordId).
  • Deprecated and removed APIs: UsersTerritories, validateBeforeTransferForAllTerritories, validateBeforeTransfer, delinkAndTransferFromAllTerritories, and delinkAndTransferFromSpecificTerritory.
  • Added support for new APIs: AuditLogExport, Cadences, DealContactRoles, InventoryConvert, InventoryMassConvert, Layouts, Modules, Rich Text Fields, RecordLockingConfiguration, RecycleBin, UserGroups, and ZiaEnrichment.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded PHP SDK supporting V6 APIs to version 7.0.0
DetailsList.Description: Improved SDKException error message handling by ensuring null values are passed as empty strings.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Java SDK supporting V7 APIs to version 5.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
• Introduced new parameters, including page_token in the GetAttachmentsParam class.
  • Renamed the deleteContactRoleRealation method in DealContactRolesOperations to deleteContactRoleRelation.
  • Added new fields: referenceValue, dealCategory, and showValue in PickListValue fields.
  • Updated displayField datatype in Modules from String to Object.
  • Deprecated and removed APIs: UsersTerritories, validateBeforeTransferForAllTerritories, validateBeforeTransfer, delinkAndTransferFromAllTerritories, and delinkAndTransferFromSpecificTerritory.
  • Added support for new APIs: AuditLogExport, Cadences, DealContactRoles, InventoryConvert, InventoryMassConvert, Layouts, Modules, Rich Text Fields, RecordLockingConfiguration, RecycleBin, UserGroups, UsersTerritories, and ZiaEnrichment.

DetailsList.Title: New extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Younique Business for Zoho CRM, Whalesync for Zoho CRM, ClicData for Zoho CRM, and more.

DetailsList.Title: Append or replace tags while importing records
DetailsList.Description: CRM users can append or replace tags in the system by adding them to a spreadsheet and importing the spreadsheet to overwrite existing tags.

DetailsList.Title: Add multiple records to a subform via lookup
DetailsList.Description: Users can now add multiple entries to subforms at once using the 'Add multiple rows' option via lookup, simplifying data entry. A pop-up allows selection of multiple records and editing of column values before adding them to the form. This feature speeds up processes like quote creation by enabling efficient association of multiple products.

DetailsList.Title: Set up multiple auto-response rules to customize webform responses in an enhanced UI
DetailsList.Description: Users can create and activate multiple auto-response rules for both the Contacts and Leads modules and send customized webform responses.

DetailsList.Title: Customize screen titles, configure new fields & actions and merge existing data from your Kiosk studio
DetailsList.Description:
Kiosk Studio now allows users to
  • Add screen title and adjust the screen width for your Kiosk.
  • Configure three new fields for a Kiosk screen: Percentage, URL & Decimal
  • Edit the default path's name in the Kiosk's decision component
  • Configure three new actions in your Kiosk screens : Convert, Add Meeting & Add Calls
  • Merge any existing value from your Kiosk screens or CRM field in the Field Update action.
  • Choose data from picklist fields, multi-line fields and check box fields in the Create Record action.

DetailsList.Title: Rollup summary field in the Android app
DetailsList.Description: You can now access the rollup summary field in Zoho CRM's Android app. This read-only field creates an association between parent and child records to automatically calculate values, such as the total number of notes, tasks, deals, and more. You can easily find the rollup summary field on the record detail page.

DetailsList.Title: Gain full visibility with the new CRM activities homepage component
DetailsList.Description: The activities homepage component offers a consolidated view of all your activities in the CRM system. This boosts visibility, ensures smoother task management, and drives more effective use of the CRM system.

DetailsList.Title: Conduct root-cause analysis using negative triggers from customer responses in VoC
DetailsList.Description: By correlating negative triggers with lost deals and churned customers, VoC can retroactively identify triggers that caused loss. Furthermore, users can subject findings to a thorough analysis of this loss via custom charts.

DetailsList.Title: Empower portal users with access to specific records in the database
DetailsList.Description: In addition to exposing portal users to personal and related records, administrators can expose records with desired attributes in related modules by defining criteria. This targeted record sharing along with clients' direct information elevates portal users' self-service experience.

DetailsList.Title: More flexible validation in CRM
DetailsList.Description: New configuration options have been added to validation rules for increased flexibility. With these options, you can quickly validate individual fields, allow the record to be saved with an alert, and decide where the error messages will be displayed.

DetailsList.Title: Dynamic Display support for Zoho CRM for iOS
DetailsList.Description: You can now customize the fields that appear in your list view for each module. Choose up to nine fields for each module and organize them into headings, subheadings, and items. You can also adjust display options like adding images or actions. This makes it easy to quickly access the key details you need, right from your list view.

DetailsList.Title: Saved filters in Zoho CRM iOS app
DetailsList.Description: Users can now access saved advanced filters in the Zoho CRM iOS app to make finding specific records easier. These advanced filters, created and saved in the Zoho CRM web version, allow users to filter records based on criteria such as record actions, notes, email status, fields, and more. For example, a sales rep can instantly filter leads with recent notes and high deal values to ensure efficient follow-ups while on the go using saved filters.

DetailsList.Title: Customizable Kanban Views for Activities modules
DetailsList.Description: Kanban views in the Activities modules (Meetings, Calls, Tasks, and Appointments) are now customizable. Users can select a picklist field to organize their boards based on their business needs, providing greater flexibility. The new Kanban view replaces the system-defined version, ensuring a more user-defined experience across all Activities modules.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Java SDK supporting V7 APIs to version 4.0.0
DetailsList.Description: Updated the data type of threadId from Long to String in the Email class of Email Related Records.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Java SDK supporting V7 APIs to version 3.1.0
DetailsList.Description: Added a new delete field in the PickListValue class of the Fields API.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Java SDK supporting V7 APIs to version 3.0.0
DetailsList.Description: Updated the data type of IDS from Long to String in the RemoveTagsFromMultipleRecordsParam class.

DetailsList.Title: Aggregate and analyze customer feedback in German, Spanish, and French
DetailsList.Description: In addition to processing customer feedback in the English language, VoC is equipped to process emails, survey responses,  desk tickets, record notes, and social media mentions in German, Spanish, and French.

DetailsList.Title: File storage for new CRM signups is now powered by WorkDrive
DetailsList.Description: The Documents tab is the central repository where all business-related documents are stored, organized, and shared across your organization. Previously, it was powered by Zoho Docs. It is now powered by Zoho WorkDrive. Apart from a more modern UI, users can now connect their CRM org with a current or new WorkDrive account, access this connected WorkDrive account seamlessly through the Documents tab, and view attachments in pre-defined folders in the record owner's My Folders section.

DetailsList.Title: Select recipients from related modules in Cadences
DetailsList.Description: Admins can now choose recipients from related modules when configuring email follow-ups in Cadences.

DetailsList.Title: Access fine-grained reports using the new quick-view filter
DetailsList.Description: The quick-view filter allows CRM users to filter the processed report using fields from the participating records. With this ability, they can derive granular and contextual results​, on-demand.

DetailsList.Title: Zoho CRM SDKs upgraded with v7 API support for Java, PHP, Node.js, Python, TypeScript, Ruby, Scala, and C#
DetailsList.Description: Upgraded our SDKs to support the v7 APIs and added support for the following new APIs: Export Audit Log, Cadence, Record Clone, Duplicate Record Check, Data People Enrichment, Data Org Enrichment, Mass Delete Tags, Picklist Option, and API Fetcher.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Python SDK supporting v7 APIs to version 3.0.0
DetailsList.Description: Updated the Fields meta error response handling in Utility class.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Python SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 8.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- Updated the Fields meta error response handling in Utility class.
- Added support for multiple field update operations in the FieldsOperations class.

DetailsList.Title: Updated pricing for portal user licenses
DetailsList.Description: The new slab-based pricing model reduces your per-user costs as you add more users, offering you a more affordable way to expand your portal and support your business growth.

DetailsList.Title: Facilitate business processes by mandating Kiosks in your Blueprint's transition settings
DetailsList.Description:
Multiple enhancements to Kiosk.
1) Add Kiosks as a mandatory action in your Blueprint's transition settings to create a more streamlined approach to process execution. 
2) Publish Kiosks directly from your Kiosk studio, Add Kiosks to a record's detail view and Create more Kiosks depending on your CRM edition

DetailsList.Title: Zoho CRM V7 API Release
DetailsList.Description: Zoho CRM version 7 APIs are now available, featuring a range of new APIs and updates to the existing ones. New additions include the Records Clone API, Export Audit Log API, API to list available APIs, Picklist Values API, and more.

DetailsList.Title: Zia field predictions now include clear labels and a list of critical fields to improve prediction quality
DetailsList.Description: Users will now see predicted value and probability score as separate entities with clear labels. They will also see critical fields that can be filled to improve prediction quality. This helps users understand and improve field predictions before using them to inform their decisions.

DetailsList.Title: Recycle Bin APIs in Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Users can now retrieve and delete records from the Recycle Bin using our newly introduced Recycle Bin APIs. These are available starting from V6.

DetailsList.Title: The character limit on display for multi-line fields in reports is being constricted
DetailsList.Description: The content length in multi-line fields participating in a report is being constricted to 255 characters to avoid disproportionate UI and to mitigate technical processing issues.

DetailsList.Title: Export filtered audit logs
DetailsList.Description:
Audit logs can now be exported with filtered data based on specific selections. A mandatory time filter (limited to 180 days) is required when exporting filtered logs.

If no logs meet the criteria, the export option will be disabled.

DetailsList.Title: Convert a CRM dashboard into a presentation
DetailsList.Description: Users can convert a dashboard into a Zia presentation. Once the slide deck has been created, users can view their ready-to-present slide deck within the CRM itself. If you are using a paid edition of Zoho Show, you'll also be able to edit the slide deck in Zoho Show.

DetailsList.Title: Contact roles for deals in Zoho CRM's iOS app
DetailsList.Description: Assign specific roles to contacts involved in deals to streamline communication and collaboration. This feature enables you to identify key decision-makers and ensure that discussions involve the appropriate individuals.

DetailsList.Title: Saved filters in Zoho CRM's Android app
DetailsList.Description: Users can now access advanced filters they've saved in the Zoho CRM Android app to make finding specific records easier. These advanced filters—created and saved in the Zoho CRM web version—enable users to filter records based on criteria such as record actions, notes, email status, fields, and more. For example, sales reps who are on the go can use saved filters to filter leads with recent notes and high deal values instantly to ensure efficient follow-ups.

DetailsList.Title: Related List button for Zoho CRM Android app
DetailsList.Description: Users can now quickly access related records such as deals, contacts, tasks, meetings, or products within a record using the new Related List button in the Zoho CRM Android app. This feature allows users to view related data without scrolling through the record details.

DetailsList.Title: Manage Motivator and Increased Component Limits by Edition
DetailsList.Description: The profile permissions for Motivator have been moved to the 'Manage Motivator' section. Previously, this setting was located under 'Modules Customization.' Additionally, the Motivator component limits have been revised across Standard, Professional, and Enterprise editions.

DetailsList.Title: Record sharing within an organization in Zoho CRM's iOS app
DetailsList.Description: In addition to the existing URL sharing feature, users can now share records publicly with the entire organization or privately with specific users, roles, or groups. Once shared, users can easily revoke access anytime directly from the mobile app, providing full control over shared records.

DetailsList.Title: Configure Zia to compute and compile personalized performance decks for CRM users
DetailsList.Description: To measure the productivity and performance of their whole organization, a specific team, or individual users, sales managers instruct Zia to generate personalized insights. They can let Zia select the data itself or indicate which module Zia should assess.

DetailsList.Title: Now configure Assignment Rules based on merge fields
DetailsList.Description: In Assignment rules, administrators can now qualify a record for assignment by using merge fields in the criteria, besides manually entered values. This will create more possibilities and flexibility to the record assignment practice.

DetailsList.Title: Mark actions as optional in blueprint transitions
DetailsList.Description: CRM blueprints can now include optional fields in stage transitions, allowing for more flexibility in meeting various process needs. This enables users to proceed to the next stage even if the optional fields aren't filled.

DetailsList.Title: Setup multiple auto-response rules to customize webform responses in an enhanced UI
DetailsList.Description:
1) Create and activate multiple auto-response rules per module to send customized responses to various webforms.
2) The enhanced Auto-response UI now allows you to create and reorder rules in a more straightforward and efficient manner.

DetailsList.Title: Discover and manage duplicate images with Zia Vision
DetailsList.Description: The Duplicate Image Detection feature in Zia Vision helps you identify duplicate facial images within your CRM records. After identification, you can upload a new image or mark the detection as incorrect.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Java SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 6.0.0
DetailsList.Description: The rollup_summary datatype is now supported in the Records module.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Java SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 5.0.0
DetailsList.Description: You can now perform multiple field update operations simultaneously in the FieldsOperations class to enable users to update more than one field in a single request.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded PHP SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 4.0.0
DetailsList.Description: You can now perform multiple field update operations simultaneously in the FieldsOperations class to enable users to update more than one field in a single request.

DetailsList.Title: Assign records based on users' roles in an organization
DetailsList.Description: Administrators can automate record assignments based on which role each user in their organization belongs to. This user-based assignment expands the scope of record assignment and adds efficiency in queue management.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Python SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 7.0.1
DetailsList.Description: The rollup_summary datatype is now supported in the Records module.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Python SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 6.0.1
DetailsList.Description: Addressed and fixed an issue affecting FileStore functionality in Windows OS.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded PHP SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 5.0.0
DetailsList.Description: The rollup_summary datatype is now supported in the Records module.

DetailsList.Title: Reschedule Actions, use Date Formulas, and more in CRM Workflows
DetailsList.Description:
• You can now modify the execution timing of already scheduled actions in a workflow.
  • The Date Formula Field is now supported for executing workflow rules.
  • We've revised the daily limits set for record creation, including activities.
  • The trigger for ”on creation of a task" now applies to tasks created automatically as well as manually. In cases where a loop might occur, such as a task being created upon the creation of another task, the execution will stop to prevent continuous looping.

DetailsList.Title: Integrate MS Teams with Zoho CRM for faster collaboration
DetailsList.Description: Organizations that rely on MS Teams can benefit from Zoho CRM's integration with it. Once enabled, users can share CRM records and dashboard components with users or channels, get automatic notifications for CRM events, and access CRM data (Leads, Contacts, Accounts, and Deals modules)—all in MS Teams.

DetailsList.Title: CPQ now supported in Zoho CRM's sandbox
DetailsList.Description: CPQ functionalities, including Product Configurator, Price Rules, and Guided Selling, are now available in Zoho CRM’s sandbox environments. This enhancement enables you to create, test, and validate CPQ settings in a controlled sandbox before making them live.

DetailsList.Title: Enhanced wizard creation and summaries in Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: To ensure the accuracy and consistency of data entry, you can now effortlessly generate wizards (by selecting sections and fields from a layout) and view a comprehensive summary of all entered data before finalizing it.

DetailsList.Title: Mobile compatibility control for widgets
DetailsList.Description: Users can access and utilize widgets seamlessly across both web and mobile platforms, enhancing flexibility and productivity in your CRM operations.

DetailsList.Title: New extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Callture Extension, Currency Exchange Rate Updater, Email Verification, Auto Document Merge, and more.

DetailsList.Title: Exclude fields while exporting data
DetailsList.Description: Users can choose to exclude fields while exporting data from their CRM system. Upto 20 fields can be chosen to be excluded in the export action.

DetailsList.Title: Assign records based on users' role in an organization
DetailsList.Description: Administrators can create assignment rules based on the role of users in the CRM organization using the qualifiers: ""belongs to role"" and ""does not belong to role."" This addition will increase the flexibility in queue management.

DetailsList.Title: Optional Field Support for Blueprints on iOS
DetailsList.Description: With this update, users can now use optional fields in blueprint transitions on iOS. Users only need to fill out mandatory fields right away, while optional fields can be completed later or left blank. Use the "Save as Draft" option to save your progress even if not all fields are filled. An alert will notify you if any mandatory fields or checklist items are missing.
