DetailsList.Title: Manage Workloads with Assignment Threshold Alerts on iOS
DetailsList.Description: Zoho CRM iOS app has introduced support for Assignment Threshold alerts. When users exceed their record limit, they will receive an alert on their iOS device notifying them that they have reached their threshold. This helps ensure tasks are evenly distributed and prevents overload.

DetailsList.Title: Identifying and merging duplicate records during lead conversion on iOS
DetailsList.Description: Now, when converting a lead into a contact, account, or deal, the system will automatically check for existing records using unique fields and system-defined fields like email address, company name, and lead name. If a match is found, you’ll be prompted to merge the lead with the existing record, preventing duplicate entries.

DetailsList.Title: Voice-to-text feature for notes in the Zoho CRM Android app
DetailsList.Description: Users can now dictate notes directly into the Zoho CRM Android app, making it easier to capture and manage information on the go. This feature streamlines note-taking and enhances efficiency by enabling you to add details hands-free.

DetailsList.Title: Churn usage data now supports Mixpanel
DetailsList.Description: Zia can now predict Churn based on customers' usage data from Mixpanel, making predictions more accurate.

DetailsList.Title: Enhanced duplicate check for leads in CRM
DetailsList.Description: Users can now check for duplicate leads directly within the Contacts module. Previously, only converted leads could be checked for duplicates, so if a pre-existing lead was added directly to the Contacts module, it could slip through as a duplicate entry. With the enhanced duplicate check, you can now ensure accurate data management and eliminate duplicate leads in the Contacts module.

DetailsList.Title: New extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: ABR Merge Duplicates for Zoho CRM, Google Address AutoComplete for Zoho CRM, WebAmigo - Lead Enrichment for Zoho CRM, and more.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Java SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 4.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- Updated field datatypes: "percentPartialSave" in Blueprint Transition, "convertMapping" in Blueprint Field, "id" in Record FileDetails and Record ImageUpload, and multi_user_lookup type fields in Record.
- Added support for Record Field API Name and datatype.
- Introduced new fields (createdTimeS, modifiedTimeS, createdByS, ownerS, and modifiedByS) in the Record FileDetails class.
- Added new "type" and "ownerId" parameters in the EmailRelatedRecordsOperations class constructor.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded PHP SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 3.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- Updated datatypes for "percentPartialSave" in Blueprint Transition, "convertMapping" in Blueprint Field, and multi_user_lookup type fields in Record,
- Added support for Record Field API Name and datatype.
- Introduced new fields (createdTimeS, modifiedTimeS, createdByS, ownerS, and modifiedByS) in the Record FileDetails class.
- Added new "type" and "ownerId" parameters in the EmailRelatedRecordsOperations class constructor.
- Introduced new "id" and "name" parameters in the GetDownloadAttachmentsDetailsParam class.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded CSharp SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 7.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- Updated datatypes for "percentPartialSave" in Blueprint Transition, "convertMapping" in Blueprint Field, and multi_user_lookup type fields in Record,
- Added support for Record Field API Name and datatype.
- Introduced new fields (createdTimeS, modifiedTimeS, createdByS, ownerS, and modifiedByS) in the Record FileDetails class.
- Introduced new "type" and "ownerId" parameters in EmailRelatedRecordsOperations class constructor.

DetailsList.Title: Enhanced email deliverability in Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: We've unified email domain authentication across Zoho services and simplified the email verification process. DMARC setup suggestions ensure compliance, and a one-click unsubscribe option in all mass emails reduces spam complaints and improves the user experience.

DetailsList.Title: UTM tracking and multilingual support for Zoho Forms's integration with Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Administrators can now track campaign effectiveness with UTM parameters and engage with a global audience via multilingual forms. Configure these settings directly from Zoho CRM when linking forms in email templates.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Python SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 6.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- Changed the datatype of "percentPartialSave" in BluePrint Transition, "convertMapping" in BluePrint Field, "id" in Record FileDetails and Record ImageUpload, and Record multi_user_lookup type fields.
- Added support for Record Field API Name and datatype.
- Added new fields in Record FileDetails: created_time__s, modified_time__s, created_by__s, owner__s, and modified_by__s.
- Added new parameters: "type" and "owner_id" in EmailRelatedRecordsOperations class constructor, "id" and "name" in GetDownloadAttachmentsDetailsParam class, and "ids" in GetAppointmentsRescheduledHistoryParam class.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded NodeJS SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 3.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- Changed the datatype of "percentPartialSave" in BluePrint Transition, "convertMapping" in BluePrint Field, and "id" in Record FileDetails and Record ImageUpload.
- Added support for Record Field API name and datatype.
- Added new fields in Record FileDetails: createdTimeS, modifiedTimeS, createdByS, ownerS, and modifiedByS.
- Added new parameters: "type" and "ownerId" in EmailRelatedRecordsOperations class constructor.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded TypeScript SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 3.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- Updated data types: "phone" and "mobile" fields in Users, "percentPartialSave" in Blueprint Transition, "convertMapping" in Blueprint Field, and "id" in Record FileDetails and Record ImageUpload.
- Added support for Record Field API Name and datatype.
- Introduced new fields (createdTimeS, modifiedTimeS, createdByS, ownerS, and modifiedByS) in the Record FileDetails class.
- Added new parameters: "moveAttachmentsTo" in LeadConverter class, "type" and "ownerId" in EmailRelatedRecordsOperations class constructor, "IDS" in GetAppointmentsRescheduledHistoryParam class, and "ID" and "NAME" in GetDownloadAttachmentsDetailsParam class.

DetailsList.Title: Enhance Zia's churn predictions with usage data
DetailsList.Description: Zia Churn Predictions now supports usage data from platforms like Google Analytics, Mixpanel to improve accuracy. By analyzing customer engagement metrics such as login frequency and product usage, Zia offers more precise churn predictions.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing Canvas record forms in Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Canvas functionality now extends to record forms to enable you to customize and personalize record entries. Tailor layouts, incorporate your branding, and enhance your user experience with intuitive designs. Streamline data entry and boost productivity with flexible, customized forms across all Zoho CRM modules.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded CSharp SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 5.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- Updated the datatypes of "phone" and "mobile" in Users.
- Introduced "moveAttachmentsTo" field in LeadConverter class.
- Added new parameters: "id" and "name" in GetDownloadAttachmentsDetailsParam class, and "ids" in GetAppointmentsRescheduledHistoryParam class.

DetailsList.Title: You can now import data into the Calls module in CRM
DetailsList.Description: You can now import data into the Calls module. This helps you create and update multiple call records simultaneously instead of having to create or update them individually.

DetailsList.Title: Filter your records using multi-select picklist values from a dropdown with additional operators
DetailsList.Description: You can now filter your records using multi-select picklist fields from a dropdown menu. You can also choose from a new set of options: "Includes All," "Includes Any," "Excludes All," and "Excludes Any."

DetailsList.Title: Distribute VoC charts and collaborate with peers at ease
DetailsList.Description: In addition to editing and deleting, users with access to VoC charts can perform a range of actions using the following new controls: cloning, sharing, printing, embedding, and downloading.

DetailsList.Title: CRM sandboxes now support Services and Appointments modules
DetailsList.Description: You can now enable the Services and Appointments modules in your CRM's sandbox, test them, and then deploy them to the production environment.

DetailsList.Title: Subform permission sync for Android
DetailsList.Description: Permissions set for subforms in the Zoho CRM web version are now reflected in the Android app. Users will only see and interact with subform sections according to their assigned permissions (i.e., view, edit, create, delete).

DetailsList.Title: Analytics support in Zia for Android
DetailsList.Description: Zia now supports detailed analytics on Android devices, enabling users to request and receive instant insights into any analytics component directly from their mobile devices. This enhancement provides access to crucial data and helps users make informed decisions on the go.

DetailsList.Title: Analytics support in Zia for iOS
DetailsList.Description: Zia now supports detailed analytics on iOS devices, enabling users to request and receive instant insights into any analytics component directly from their mobile devices. This enhancement provides access to crucial data and helps users make informed decisions on the go.

DetailsList.Title: Unified date format sync for iOS
DetailsList.Description: Changes made to the date format (dd-mm-yyyy) on the Zoho CRM web version will sync automatically with your iOS app.

DetailsList.Title: Dynamic value selection in assignment rule criteira
DetailsList.Description: As part of defining assignment rule criteria, and in addition to filtering records using static values, admins can now also instruct CRM to fetch dynamic values for filtering from specific fields in a given record.

DetailsList.Title: Google Calander sync now available in Sandbox
DetailsList.Description: Sandbox support is now extended for Google Calander. Users can now enable Google Calander sync in sandbox, and once approved by admins, the configuration will be available in their accounts.

DetailsList.Title: Extending UX capabilities to CX using Buttons
DetailsList.Description:
Custom buttons in Zoho CRM now have the following functional enhancements:
- Layout specification: Admins can place buttons in specific layouts to provide more context to the process.
- UI update: To make them easier to manage, the previous "Links and Buttons" tab in each module is now split into two separate tabs: "Links" and "Buttons".
- Portal accessibility: Admins can create new buttons and extend existing buttons for Portal users.
- Kiosk accessibility: Admins can set a Kiosk as a button's action, and likewise extend it for portal users.

DetailsList.Title: Map Zia Event usage data
DetailsList.Description: This update relates to feeding usage data into Zoho CRM to expand the scope of how Zia can use it. We're introducing a new section called Usage Data under Zia. Users can now easily import, edit, and update usage data in Zoho CRM to derive more insights jinto each record's behavior.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded CSharp SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 6.0.0
DetailsList.Description: - Changed the datatype of "percentPartialSave" in BluePrint Transition and "convertMapping" in Blueprint Field.

DetailsList.Title: New extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Bulk Delete Attachments for Zoho CRM, Consulta CNPJ for Zoho CRM, Plata for Zoho CRM, Reward Rally For Zoho CRM, and more.

DetailsList.Title: Achieve smoother and more intuitive project management with the latest enhancements to the Zoho Projects integration
DetailsList.Description: Administrators can now link projects to additional CRM modules such as Products, Cases, and Quotes, and map fields easily. Users can create projects from modules, which admins can configure using simplified permission management features that enable admins to change access levels for different profiles with just a toggle. Additionally, client configuration information is now readily available, improving visibility.

DetailsList.Title: Quickly send emails and sync conversations with custom email addresses in CRM
DetailsList.Description: You can gain a comprehensive view of your email communications by setting up custom email addresses in Zoho CRM to send emails and sync conversations.

DetailsList.Title: Access lead history post-conversion for improved follow-ups in CRM
DetailsList.Description: Upon lead conversion, view a lead's history in contacts, accounts, and deals for a better follow-up process in Zoho CRM.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Java SDK supporting v4 APIs to version 8.0.0
DetailsList.Description: Introduced new parameters (type, index, and ownerId) in the EmailRelatedRecordsOperations class constructor.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Java SDK supporting v4 APIs to version 7.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- Updated Fields meta in the Utility and ModuleFieldsHandler classes.
- Introduced new parameters ("id" and "name") in the GetDownloadAttachmentsDetailsParam class.

DetailsList.Title: Multi-select lookup fields in layout rules
DetailsList.Description: Multi-select lookup fields can now be used in layout rule conditions to trigger actions such as showing fields or sections based on whether the field is empty or not. Additionally, multi-select lookup fields are also supported in the 'Show Fields' section of layout rules.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Java SDK supporting v4 APIs to version 6.1.0
DetailsList.Description: - Introduced "move_attachments_to" field in the LeadConverter class.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded JavaScript SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 2.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- Changed the datatype of "favorite" in CustomView, tabTraversal in Layouts Sections, "phone" and "mobile" in Users.
- Added a new "move_attachments_to" field in the LeadConverter class.
- Added support for the following new APIs: Custom Views, Users Count, and Features.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Python SDK supporting v2.1 APIs to version 3.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- Introduced "ignore_empty" field in BulkWrite RequestWrapper class.
- Resolved dependency package concern.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Python SDK supporting v2 APIs to version 6.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- Introduced "ignore_empty" field in BulkWrite RequestWrapper class.
- Resolved dependency package concern.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Python SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 5.0.0
DetailsList.Description: The datatype of the "timezone" field in the Email Drafts ScheduleDetails and ShiftHours classes, as well as the "time_zone" field in the Users class, have been updated from TimeZone to string.

DetailsList.Title: Kiosk Studio now supports easy retrieval of child module records, support in Canvas record detail pages, and the addition of Zia components
DetailsList.Description: It's now simpler to retrieve child module records in a GetRecords component. Choose "Child module" from the "GetRecords from" dropdown, select the parent record, and get all the records you need. In addition, Kiosks can now be added directly to Canvas record detail pages, and screens in Kiosk Studio can now include Zia insights.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Python SDK supporting v5 APIs to version 2.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- New fields have been added to the BulkWrite FieldMapping, BulkWrite Resource, and LeadConverter classes. - The datatype for the following fields has been updated to string for improved data handling: "namespace", "timezone", "time_zone", "seModule", and "id".
- The "If-Modified-Since" and "IDS" parameters in various methods have been updated to the string datatype.
- Added support for the Mail Merge API.
- Updated constructor and methods in the RecordLockingOperations class.
- The update_variable_by_apiname method in VariablesOperations now includes a new "ParameterMap" parameter.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Ruby SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 3.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- Changed the datatype for the "phone" and "mobile" fields in the Users class.
- Added a new "moveAttachmentsTo" field to the LeadConverter class.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded PHP SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 2.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- Introduced new fields: "moveAttachmentsTo" in the LeadConverter class, "subCategory" in the EmailRelatedRecords Status class, and "availableCount" in the Features Detail class.
- Changed the datatype of the "tabTraversal" field in Layouts Sections and the "favorite" field in CustomViews.
- Added support for the following new APIs: Custom Views, Users Count, and Features.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Ruby SDK supporting v5 APIs to version 2.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- Updated the RecordLockingOperations class constructor and methods.
- The BulkWrite FieldMapping class now includes a new "parentColumnIndex" field, and the BulkWrite Resource class includes a new "fileNames" field.
- Added support for Mail Merge API.

DetailsList.Title: Zia notes summary for CRM records
DetailsList.Description: Zia now provides instant summaries of your CRM notes, helping you quickly catch up on customer interactions. With the "Summarize note(s)" button, you can view an "Overall Summary" for all notes on a record or a "Last Note Summary" for the most recent update.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded NodeJS SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 2.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- The datatype of fields has been modified across various classes: the "favorite" field in CustomViews, "tabTraversal" field in Layouts Sections, and "phone" and "mobile" fields in Users.
- Introduced new fields in the following classes: "moveAttachmentsTo" in LeadConverter, "subCategory" in EmailRelatedRecords Status, and "availableCount" in Features Detail.
- Added support for the following new APIs: Change Sort order of Custom views, Users Count, and Features API.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Java SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 3.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- The LeadConverter class now includes a new field named moveAttachmentsTo.
- The GetDownloadAttachmentsDetailsParam class has been updated with new parameters: id and name.

DetailsList.Title: Simplified sandbox conflict resolution
DetailsList.Description: You can now resolve conflicts directly within Zoho CRM's sandbox during deployment. Conflicts now show detailed information on affected items. Cases such as missing items or duplicate names can be resolved on the Check Dependency page, streamlining the deployment process.

DetailsList.Title: New extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: SharePoint Sync, Logistics Sync, OneDrive extension, and more.

DetailsList.Title: Add and manage tags in the mobile app
DetailsList.Description: With the latest enhancement to the Zoho CRM mobile app, users can now add new tags or associate existing tags to records. Users with module customization permissions can also manage tags directly within the mobile app.

DetailsList.Title: Automate and personalize your CRM follow-ups using Cadences
DetailsList.Description: Cadences in Zoho CRM enable administrators to automate personalized communication sequences tailored to individual customer interactions and behaviors. Ideal for sales and marketing teams, Cadences help streamline complex workflows and ensure consistent, personalized follow-ups, enhancing efficiency and effectiveness in customer relationship management.

DetailsList.Title: Achieve multi-level record prioritization with multiple Kanban views per module
DetailsList.Description: Previously, CRM only supported a single Kanban view per module. This update enables you to create multiple Kanban views and aims to streamline the user experience by making it more convenient and less laborious for users.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Python SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 4.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- Changed the datatype for the "phone" and "mobile" fields in the Users class.
- Added a new "moveAttachmentsTo" field to the LeadConverter class.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Java SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 2.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- The datatypes of the "favorite" field in CustomViews, the "tabTraversal" field in Layouts Sections, and the "phone" and "mobile" fields in Users have been updated.
- Added support for the following APIs: Change Sort order of Custom views, Users Count, and Features API.

DetailsList.Title: Users who only have module editing permissions can now edit modules using the Sheet View
DetailsList.Description: Users with editing permission for a module can now access them via the Sheet View, but they can't create new records through that view.

DetailsList.Title: Enhancements to Zoho CRM's finance suite integrations
DetailsList.Description:
1. Zoho Subscriptions integration updates:
- Zoho Subscriptions is now seamlessly integrated as a dedicated module within CRM, offering direct access and management capabilities.
- Reporting functionalities for Zoho Subscriptions data have been enhanced to provide deeper insights.
- We've introduced new report presets alongside two innovative analytics dashboards.
2. Zoho Books integration improvements:
- We've enhanced user visibility; CRM now fully recognizes and applies all user-level permissions from Zoho Books, except admin-specific permissions.
- The new "Integration Users" role Enables CRM users to manage the Estimates module in Zoho Books—including create, edit, and view functionalities—and grants view access to other modules without the need for additional licenses.

DetailsList.Title: Integrate Google Chat with Zoho CRM for seamless collaboration
DetailsList.Description: Zoho CRM's integration with Google Chat makes it the best companion for salespeople and customer-facing teams that rely heavily on Google Chat for collaboration. From sharing records to getting real-time notifications on customer responses or deviations in your sales trends, Zoho CRM's integration with Google Chat helps you close deals where you collaborate.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded TypeScript SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 2.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- The datatype of the favorite field in CustomViews has been updated from Boolean to Integer.
- The datatype of tabTraversal field in Layouts Sections has been updated from Integer to String.
- Added support for the following new APIs: CustomViews, Users, Features

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Ruby SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 2.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- The datatype of favorite field in CustomViews has been updated from Boolean to Integer.
- The datatype of tabTraversal field in Layouts Sections has been updated from Integer to String.
- Added support for the following new APIs: CustomViews, Users, Features

DetailsList.Title: ServiceNow for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: With the ServiceNow extension for Zoho CRM, you can sync contacts, vendors, purchase orders, products, and cases with Zoho CRM and map them within the Contacts or Leads modules. The extension supports bidirectional synchronization, which occurs in real time.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded C# SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 4.0.0
DetailsList.Description: The datatype of tabTraversal field in Layouts Sections has been updated from Integer to String.

DetailsList.Title: Introduced "delete configuration" option in Zoho Mail add-on settings
DetailsList.Description:
Previously, Zoho CRM didn't offer any specific configuration options related to deleting users, which made certain email addresses unavailable for reuse within the organization. With the recent update, however, administrators now have a "delete configuration" option specifically designed to enable them to delete users.

Before this improvement, closing the authentication pop-up while configuring an account caused the email integration for the specified email address to be stored in the CRM, resulting in an "account already added" error. This issue has been resolved, and now CRM users can retry using the same email address without encountering any error messages.

DetailsList.Title: Kiosk Studio, our latest no-code tool for custom capabilities across CRM
DetailsList.Description: Zoho CRM's no-code customization tool, Kiosk Studio, enables admins to simplify work for their users, customers, and vendors by creating and embedding custom functionalities across the CRM.

DetailsList.Title: Multiple currency support for trial editions, profile-based permissions to manage currencies, action logs and more!
DetailsList.Description:
Introducing enhanced currency features in Zoho CRM! Now, easily manage multiple currencies for global transactions with a user-friendly interface. Key upgrades include :
  • Multi-currency support in trial editions
  • Profile-based permissions
  • Improved setup UI
  • New currency symbols
  • Currency logs
Simplify your financial record-keeping and gain control over transactions effortlessly.

DetailsList.Title: Email intelligence feedback mechanism
DetailsList.Description: Email intelligence employs a robust feedback mechanism that enables users to gather insights on email engagement and effectiveness. This dynamic system enhances communication strategies by analyzing recipient interactions and adapting to optimize future email campaigns.

DetailsList.Title: New extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: OneDrive for Zoho CRM, Payment Terms for Zoho CRM, Shopify to Zoho CRM Extension, Twilio SMS for Zoho CRM, and more.

DetailsList.Title: Blank field preference is available in formula fields
DetailsList.Description: An attribute called "blank value preference" has been added to formula fields. This enables users to determine how blank values in certain fields need to be interpreted.

DetailsList.Title: Export limit increase, email templates in reports, extended grouping options, and more enhancements to Zoho CRM reports
DetailsList.Description:
Some major and minor enhancements in the Reports module include the following:
- Export limit increase
- Export permission for users
- Email templates for scheduled reports
- More options for grouping
The following updates empower users to delve deeper into their data, extract more meaningful insights, and optimize decision-making processes:
- Month granularity
- Day granularity
- Column grouping supports 1x3 and 3x1 matrices
- Text wrap support
- Dynamic column width
- Role support in criteria
- Select all options in fields

DetailsList.Title: Users who only have module editing permissions can now edit modules using the Sheet View
DetailsList.Description: Users with editing permission for a module can now access them via the Sheet View, but they can't create new records through that view.

DetailsList.Title: Zia Presentations is now available for the EU DC
DetailsList.Description: With Zia's analytical and generative intelligence, you can receive turnkey presentations as notifications for your CRM organization each month. Zia will generate useful insights on your leads, deals, accounts, and activities based on transactional patterns. Furthermore, behavioral analyses of your monthly CRM performance, like cohort and quadrant analyses, are also displayed. With this auto-generated deck, you can present the findings directly from CRM without any hassle. This feature is now available for users registered with the EU DC in addition to the US DC.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Python SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 2.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- The datatype of favorite field in CustomViews has been updated from Boolean to Integer.
- The datatype of tabTraversal field in Layouts Sections has been updated from Integer to String.
- Added support for the following new APIs: CustomViews, Users, Features

DetailsList.Title: Enhanced filters, permissions, and multi-language support in Zia Strategy Influencer
DetailsList.Description: Zia Strategy Influencer now supports up to five criteria filters for refined analysis. Users can view and adjust dashboard configurations post-creation, while profile permissions have been expanded to allow all users access. Additionally, multi-language support has been added to align with CRM language settings.

DetailsList.Title: Users Count API
DetailsList.Description: Fetch the total number of users in your organization with the Users Count API, now available for versions 3 and above.

DetailsList.Title: User Licenses Count API
DetailsList.Description: You can now retrieve the count of purchased, active, and available user licenses in your organization using our User Licenses Count API, now available for v6.

DetailsList.Title: Released JavaScript SDK supporting v6 APIs, with support for new APIs
DetailsList.Description: Upgraded JavaScript SDK to support v6 APIs and introduced support for the following new APIs: Unsubscribe Links, Find and Merge API, Get Related, Records of Deleted Record API, Features API, Global Picklist API, and Unblock Email API.

DetailsList.Title: New extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Easy SharePoint for Zoho CRM, Conversion Lead by SignalSight for Zoho CRM, Ringotel Integration for Zoho CRM, and more.

DetailsList.Title: View email conversations from other Zoho CRM users' inboxes in the same organization without configuring your own inbox.
DetailsList.Description:
Users are not required to configure their own inbox in order to view email conversations from the configured inboxes of other Zoho CRM users in their organization.

This is especially useful in scenarios where  users with sensitive information in their inboxes who don't wish to connect their inboxes with Zoho CRM nevertheless need email viewing access.

DetailsList.Title: Public launch of Voice of the Customer (VoC)
DetailsList.Description: Voice of the Customer (VoC) in Zoho CRM provides you actionable insights derived from customer feedback and interactions across multiple channels. VoC was previously available in early access and it is now available publicly to all users.

DetailsList.Title: Use workflow rules to leverage competitor mentions in emails
DetailsList.Description: Workflow rules can be triggered in response to actions associated with mentions of competitors within your email communications. With competitors as criteria, users can track competitor mentions, analyze customer sentiments (negative, positive, neutral), and integrate with email channels. Users can customize workflows to target specific competitors and stay ahead in their industry.

DetailsList.Title: Rich text support for multi-line fields
DetailsList.Description: Rich text support is now available for multi-line fields in Zoho CRM, bringing enhanced formatting capabilities like font styles, colors, and highlighting. This feature boosts readability and visual appeal with expanded character options, a comprehensive text editor, and an enlarged text box. Tailored for Enterprise and Ultimate edition users, it enriches multi-line fields in various modules, with some limitations in views, subforms, and the mobile app.

DetailsList.Title: Detect anomalies in your list views
DetailsList.Description: Zia's new anomaly detection feature in list views notifies CRM users of unusual activities related to prospects or deals, including. This tool identifies deviations from normal trends and alerts users through the Zia Notification panel and a highlight beside the custom view.

DetailsList.Title: Zia suggests the best mode of communication
DetailsList.Description: Zia now suggests the most effective communication method for a given contact, along with the best time to contact them. Found in the "best time to contact" widget, this feature labels each contact's preferred method of communication, thereby optimizing engagement and improving the chances of successful interactions.

DetailsList.Title: Rich text support for multi-line fields
DetailsList.Description: Rich text support is now available for multi-line fields in Zoho CRM, bringing enhanced formatting capabilities like font styles, colors, and highlighting. This feature boosts readability and visual appeal with expanded character options, a comprehensive text editor, and an enlarged text box. Tailored for Enterprise and Ultimate edition users, it enriches multi-line fields in various modules, with some limitations in views, subforms, and the mobile app.

DetailsList.Title: New functions in Zoho CRM's formula builder
DetailsList.Description:
Formula functions in Zoho CRM can boost your application and bring a new level of functionality. Whether you're working with strings, dates, times, or numbers, these formula functions are designed to make your life easier.
The new functions added to the formula builder in Zoho CRM are as follows: IsEmpty, Dayofweek, Dayofyear, CaseInsenitiveEquals, IsPositive, IsNegative, DateBetween, Timestamp, FromTimestamp, Test, Ceil (modified), Floor (modified), Round

DetailsList.Title: Public launch of CPQ for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: CPQ is Zoho CRM's built-in solution for custom quote management. It has been in public early access, but is now available to all users.

DetailsList.Title: Involve your sales reps and set bottom-up sales targets in Zoho CRM forecasts
DetailsList.Description: You can choose whether forecasts in Zoho CRM should follow a top-down or bottom-up model. In bottom-up forecasts, users submit targets based on specific information available to them. These projections are approved, rejected, or revised by managers or the forecasting team. The approved targets are aggregated into targets for different roles, territories, managers, and the organization as a whole.

DetailsList.Title: Beyond months: Zoho CRM now supports custom fiscal year formats
DetailsList.Description: You can now set your CRM's fiscal year to follow the 4-5-4 calendar and other widely used 52-week fiscal year formats.

DetailsList.Title: Migrating from Bitrix to Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Improve the customer management systems by migrating from Bitrix to Zoho CRM. Transferring data is easy and ensures minimal disruption. Additionally, the option to undo or redo the migration adds a layer of flexibility and security.

DetailsList.Title: Extract multiple activities and capture commitments from sent emails
DetailsList.Description: We've extended Zia's activity extraction feature to recognize multiple activities that are mentioned in an email and recommend capturing them. Zia will also detect commitments made in sent emails, like meetings, calls, and tasks, and suggest that users create the activities within Zoho CRM.

DetailsList.Title: Query suggestions in Ask Zia
DetailsList.Description: Ask Zia is now supercharged with advanced query suggestion capabilities, making your interactions with Zoho CRM faster and more intuitive. Simply type front slash "/" in the Ask Zia chat window to get quick and relevant questions based on your CRM usage pattern. Suggestions change dynamically as you provide more input.

DetailsList.Title: Story mode and advanced analytics in Zia Presentation
DetailsList.Description: Zia will now intelligently sequence slides and charts in Zia Presentation into a meaningful narrative, making the presentation more engaging and easier to understand. Additionally, to offer deeper insights into customer interactions and future trends, we've added advanced best time analytics and VoC forecast charts.

DetailsList.Title: Publish a webform as a link or QR code and customize submit button actions
DetailsList.Description:
Versatile publishing:
You can now seamlessly integrate webforms into blogs, emails, and social handles by publishing them as links or QR codes.
Expanded publishing formats:
We've introduced QR codes and links to the existing array of publishing formats for webforms.
Enhanced submit button actions:
Exert greater control with customizable options for the submit button. Whether it's a splash message, a thank-you page, or redirect to a custom URL, make every submission experience uniquely yours.

DetailsList.Title: Exposing webform as link or QR Code and actions on submit customization in CRM
DetailsList.Description:
Exposing webform as link  Add Tags
Versatile Publishing: With our latest update, webforms can be exposed as links or QR codes. Enjoy the flexibility to seamlessly integrate forms into blogs, emails, and social handles. No webpage? No worries! Collect submissions effortlessly with the new link format.
Expanded Publishing Formats: Introducing QR codes and links to the existing array of publishing formats for webforms. Choose what suits your needs best!
Enhanced Submit Button Actions: Take control with customizable options for the submit button. Whether it's a splash message, a thank-you page, or redirection to a custom URL, make every submission experience uniquely yours.

DetailsList.Title: Broaden your feedback collection in VoC
DetailsList.Description: Users can include additional sources such as Notes from leads, contacts, or custom modules and interactions from social media channels in VoC analysis.

DetailsList.Title: Personalize email responses with VoC
DetailsList.Description: Trigger personalized email responses based on keywords and sentiment analysis in customer emails.

DetailsList.Title: Call highlights in Zia's call intelligence
DetailsList.Description: Zia now highlights key phrases and entities such as names, organizations, and emails directly in call transcripts, simplifying call analysis and enabling faster identification of critical information. This feature enhances productivity by helping you quickly find important details from customer conversations.

DetailsList.Title: Final date extension for Activities module deprecation
DetailsList.Description: Instead of manually reconstructing criteria for each component or report, the CRM system will now provide an option for automatically migrating dashboard components and reports to their respective Tasks, Calls, and Meetings modules.

DetailsList.Title: Easily trigger Client Scripts on iOS
DetailsList.Description: With the addition of essential variables and methods like $Page.navigation_data, ZDK.Client.showLoader, ZDK.Client.hideLoader, ZDK.Client.navigateTo, and ZDK.Client.getInput, you can now trigger Client Scripts on the mobile iOS app.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded CSharp SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 3.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- Changed the data type of favorite field in CustomViews from boolean to int.
- This version of CSharp SDK supports the following new APIs: Custom Views, Users Count, and Features.

DetailsList.Title: Easily share record URLs via share extensions
DetailsList.Description: Users can effortlessly share record URLs using share extensions. This functionality enables users to copy, save, and share record URLs quickly across different apps, promoting simplified collaboration and effective information sharing.

DetailsList.Title: Multi-currency support in trial editions, profile permissions to manage currencies, action logs, and more!
DetailsList.Description:
Explore Zoho CRM's upgraded multi-currency feature for effortless global transaction handling. Businesses operating worldwide can easily manage currencies and maintain accuracy. Below are the major enhancements to Zoho CRM's currency feature:
- Multi-currency functionality for trial editions
- Profile-based permissions for managing currencies
- Currency details and logs
- Filtering currencies based on currency status
- Deactivated currency restrictions

DetailsList.Title: Migrate dashboard components and reports between modules
DetailsList.Description: Migrate dashboard components and reports linked with the Activities module to the Tasks, Calls, and Meetings modules. Instead of manually rebuilding the criteria for each component or report, the CRM system will now offer the option to migrate the dashboard components and reports to the corresponding Tasks, Calls, and Meetings modules automatically.

DetailsList.Title: CPQ rules for custom subforms and custom modules in Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: CPQ's capabilities have been extended beyond the default Quotes module to all inventory modules across CRM, as well as custom modules. Additionally, CPQ rules can now be run on custom subforms in a record. [Public early access]

DetailsList.Title: New extensions with LocalReviews, Shopify, and more
DetailsList.Description: LocalReviews for Zoho CRM, Shopify Integration for Zoho CRM, Abstract Email and Phone Validation for Zoho CRM, and more.

DetailsList.Title: Simplify lead management with the Marketo extension
DetailsList.Description: Synchronizing and managing leads is easy with the Marketo extension. Synchronize leads on a daily or weekly basis with a built-in scheduler. Keep all your leads in one place so you can plan various marketing activities, like email campaigns, social media posts, and other forms of digital marketing.

DetailsList.Title: Convert leads from Facebook Lead Ads with LeadChain for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Manage your leads and aim your advertising strategy towards potential leads by transferring your lead data from Facebook Lead Ads in real time and instantly converting them into customers in Zoho CRM. You can also optimize your plan by sending data back to Facebook and re-targeting the users who are most likely to convert—saving you time and effort.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded CSharp SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 2.0.0
DetailsList.Description: Updated Fields meta handling in Utility class.

DetailsList.Title: Released Scala SDK supporting v6 APIs, with support for new APIs
DetailsList.Description: The Scala SDK has been upgraded to support v6 APIs, with support for the following new APIs: Unsubscribe Links, Find and Merge, Get Related Records of Deleted Record, Features, Global Picklist, and Unblock Email.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Scala SDK supporting v6 APIs to version 2.0.0
DetailsList.Description: Updated Fields meta handling in Utility class.

DetailsList.Title: Released Ruby SDK supporting v5 APIs
DetailsList.Description:
- Ruby SDK now supports Zoho CRM APIs version 5.
- Added new keys in FileStore and DBStore objects.
- Added a new key find_user in OAuthToken.

DetailsList.Title: Increased download limit for custom modules
DetailsList.Description: Users can enjoy greater flexibility with Zoho CRM's custom modules, as the download limit has been increased to accommodate up to 200 modules. With this update, Enterprise and Ultimate edition users can create custom modules with more customization and adapt the app to meet their needs.

DetailsList.Title: Released TypeScript SDK supporting v6 APIs, with support for new APIs
DetailsList.Description: TypeScript SDK upgraded to support v6 APIs, with support for the following new APIs: Unsubscribe Links, Merge Records, Get Related Records of Deleted Record, Features, Global Picklist, and Unblock Email.

DetailsList.Title: Released Java SDK supporting v6 APIs, with support for new APIs
DetailsList.Description: Java SDK is upgraded to support v6 APIs, with support for the following new APIs: Unsubscribe Links, Merge Records, Get Related Records of Deleted Record, Features, Global Picklist, and Unblock Email.

DetailsList.Title: Released C# SDK supporting v6 APIs, with support for new APIs
DetailsList.Description: C# SDK upgraded to support v6 APIs, with support for the following new APIs: Unsubscribe Links, Merge Records, Get Related Records of Deleted Record, Features, Global Picklist, and Unblock Email.

DetailsList.Title: Released PHP SDK supporting v6 APIs, with support for new APIs
DetailsList.Description: PHP SDK upgraded to support v6 APIs, with support for the following new APIs: Unsubscribe Links, Merge Records, Get Related Records of Deleted Record, Features, Global Picklist, and Unblock Email.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Java SDK supporting v5 APIs to version 6.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- Updated the RecordLockingOperations class constructor and methods.
- Added the new "parentColumnIndex" field in the BulkWrite FieldMapping class.
- Added the new "fileNames" field in the BulkWrite Resource class.
- Java SDK has been enhanced to support Mail Merge APIs: Send Mail Merge, Sign Mail Merge, and Download Mail Merge.

DetailsList.Title: Grant secure temporary user access to Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Facilitate efficient problem-solving through temporary account access to your Zoho CRM account to ensure prompt customer support across time zones.

DetailsList.Title: Zia Vision now includes a match and detect option, a snapshot view, and other improvements
DetailsList.Description: Users can now use Zia Vision to match and detect entities in an image. In addition, reviewers can now suggest images to train Zia. A snapshot view has been added to give a visual breakdown of training images. Users can also view, add, and remove training images using this view. For now, this enhancement is for US DC users alone.

DetailsList.Title: Color-coded transitions in Blueprints
DetailsList.Description: Any customization made to transitions, such as color coding or re-ordering, will be visible and effective across both desktop and mobile platforms, ensuring consistent and efficient process flow management. In turn, this will enhance the user experience of the blueprint functionality.

DetailsList.Title: Color-coded transitions in Blueprints
DetailsList.Description: Any customization made to transitions, such as color coding or re-ordering, will be visible and effective across both desktop and mobile platforms, ensuring consistent and efficient process flow management. In turn, this will enhance the user experience of the blueprint functionality.

DetailsList.Title: Email domain authentication
DetailsList.Description: The Zoho CRM mobile app now verifies the senders email domain authentication status before sending emails. By ensuring emails are sent securely, this increases the likelihood that the messages will reach the intended recipients and simplifies communication.

DetailsList.Title: Exclude responses from irrelevant email IDs for VoC analysis
DetailsList.Description: Enhance your Voice of the Customer (VoC) insight generation by excluding responses from email IDs that are irrelevant or spam. Responses include emails, surveys, support tickets, and other VoC integrations associated with that email address.

DetailsList.Title: Data Model for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: We've released the Data Model feature, which helps you understand and visualize the overall structure of your CRM data and identify relationships between different entities.

DetailsList.Title: New extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Google Contacts AppiWorks for Zoho CRM, Helpwise for Zoho CRM, C3 - Weather for Zoho CRM, and more.

DetailsList.Title: Released Ruby SDK supporting v6 APIs, with support for new APIs
DetailsList.Description: Ruby SDK upgraded to support v6 APIs, with support for the following new APIs: Unsubscribe Links, Merge Records, Get Related Records of Deleted Record, Features, Global Picklist, and Unblock Email.

DetailsList.Title: Released Python SDK supporting v6 APIs, with support for new APIs
DetailsList.Description: Python SDK upgraded to support v6 APIs, with support for the following new APIs: Unsubscribe Links, Merge Records, Get Related Records of Deleted Record, Features, Global Picklist, and Unblock Email.

DetailsList.Title: Increased download limit for custom modules
DetailsList.Description: Users can enjoy greater flexibility with Zoho CRM's custom modules, as the download limit has been increased to accommodate up to 200 modules. This enhancement offers users greater flexibility in managing their data within the app.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded C# SDK supporting v5 APIs to version 2.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- Added a new column for api_domain in TokenStore object.
- Added a new key named findUser in OAuthToken.
- Data type of IDs parameter has been changed from Long to String in the following classes: GetAttachmentsParam, DeleteAttachmentsParam, DeleteRolesParam, GetAssociatedContactRolesParam, DeleteNotesParam, DeleteScoringRulesParam, DeleteTerritoriesParam, DeassociateTerritoryUsersParam, and DeleteVariablesParam.
- Data type of seModule field in Note class has been changed from Choice to String.
- Data type of if-Modified-Since parameter has been changed from String to OffsetDateTime in the following classes: GetNotesHeader and GetNoteHeader.
- Added support for the following new APIs: Org Photo, Record Locking
- Data type of info field in RescheduleHistory ResponseWrapper has been changed from list to info.
- Data type of namespace field in ScoringRules Signal has been changed from Choice to String.
- Data type of lockedCount field in Tags RecordActionWrapper has been changed from Boolean to String.
- Data type of ID field in Territory class of UsersTerritories resource has been changed from Long to String.
- Added new ParameterMap instance in updateVariableByApiname method in VariablesOperations.

DetailsList.Title: Released C# SDK supporting v5 APIs, with support for new APIs
DetailsList.Description: C# SDK has been improved to support the following new APIs: User Groups, Fiscal Year, Timeline, Transfer and Delete Users, Territories, and Territories Users API.

DetailsList.Title: Automate actions in other apps using Actions by Zoho Flow
DetailsList.Description: Actions by Zoho Flow allows you to add actions in other apps as part of your CRM's workflow rules. Previously, automation across apps would've required the building of custom integrations or the use of an integration platform outside your CRM. Now, these actions can be configured within your CRM.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Java SDK supporting v5 APIs to version 5.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- Added a new key named findUser in OAuthToken.
- Data type of IDs parameter has been changed from Long to String in the following classes: GetAttachmentsParam, DeleteAttachmentsParam, DeleteRolesParam, GetAssociatedContactRolesParam, DeleteNotesParam, DeleteScoringRulesParam, DeleteTerritoriesParam, DeassociateTerritoryUsersParam, and DeleteVariablesParam.
- Data type of seModule field in Note class has been changed from Choice to String.
- Data type of if-Modified-Since parameter has been changed from String to OffsetDateTime in the following classes: GetNotesHeader and GetNoteHeader.
- Added support for the following new APIs: Organization Photo, Record Locking configuration, and Record Locking.
- Data type of info field in RescheduleHistory ResponseWrapper has been changed from List to info.
- Data type of namespace field in ScoringRules Signal has been changed from Choice to String.
- Data type of lockedCount field in Tags RecordActionWrapper has been changed from Boolean to String.
- Data type of id field in Territory class of UsersTerritories resource has been changed from Long to String.
- Added new ParameterMap instance in updateVariableByApiname method in VariablesOperations.

DetailsList.Title: Seamless calendar sync with Zoho Calendar and Zoho Recruit
DetailsList.Description: Zoho CRM now syncs with Zoho Calendar and Zoho Recruit, enabling users to prevent scheduling conflicts by marking slots as unavailable in their CRM calendar based on events from these Zoho products. While occupied slots are visible in CRM as "unavailable," specific event details remain private to the individual user. Changes in Zoho Calendar or Recruit are automatically updated in CRM.

DetailsList.Title: Module data export has been upgraded
DetailsList.Description: You can now export up to 200,000 records in a single export operation. You'll also be able to select the records and fields that need to be exported, include subform data in the export, directly export a list view, and track export history.

DetailsList.Title: Streamline your goals by grouping Zia Strategy Influencer's contributing factors into segments
DetailsList.Description: Zia Strategy Influencer now segments contributing factors for better goal prioritization, offering structured insights and allowing for focused strategy planning and clear identification of key business drivers. This segmentation applies to both Target Contributors and Anomaly Finder components.

DetailsList.Title: In-app language settings
DetailsList.Description: Easily switch between languages within the app using the new in-app language settings feature. Accessible in the Settings menu, this functionality enables users to adjust their language preferences easily using their mobile devices.

DetailsList.Title: VoC permissions are grouped in a dedicated tab
DetailsList.Description: Voice of the Customer (VoC) permissions have been moved to a dedicated tab. We've also introduced record-level insight permissions in the VoC tab.

DetailsList.Title: Guided Selling: an interactive product recommendation system in CRM
DetailsList.Description: Zoho CRM's built-in CPQ engine now facilitates Guided Selling, a process by which the CRM system makes tailored and interactive product recommendations based on the unique needs and preferences of each customer, thereby enabling salespeople to choose for them the most relevant products and create accurate, tailored quotes instantly. [Public early access]

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded TypeScript SDK supporting v5 APIs to version 2.0.0
DetailsList.Description: The file paths for sdk_tokens and resources have been updated to the working directory.

DetailsList.Title: Migrate Services and Appointments modules between two Zoho CRM accounts
DetailsList.Description: We have extended data migration capabilities to include the Services and Appointments modules.

DetailsList.Title: OAuth login support for email relays
DetailsList.Description: Businesses can now configure email relay servers in Zoho CRM for providers such as Gmail, Outlook, and Office365 using the service provider's OAuth login. This enhancement simplifies the setup process and ensures improved security, allowing direct integration via OAuth without storing app-based passwords.

DetailsList.Title: Check shift timing and online status in assignment rules
DetailsList.Description: Assignment rules' familiar radio buttons are evolving into checkboxes, offering users the flexibility to choose both online status and shift timing, which means users can now leverage both parameters to assign tasks or leads based on their team members' availability online and their designated shift timings.

DetailsList.Title: Condition-based aggregate fields in subforms
DetailsList.Description: Admins can now customize aggregate fields in subforms using specific criteria, thereby enhancing data relevance. Aggregate values dynamically update as rows meet or change according to these criteria.

DetailsList.Title: Parallel and multiple transition support in Blueprint
DetailsList.Description: With support for parallel and multiple transitions on mobile devices, users can now use the Blueprint functionality to manage processes flexibly and coordinate operations with ease.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded PHP SDK supporting v5 APIs to version 3.0.0
DetailsList.Description: Added a new column for api_domain in TokenStore object.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Java SDK supporting v5 APIs to version 4.0.0
DetailsList.Description: Added a new column for api_domain in TokenStore object.

DetailsList.Title: Signup forms are now available for CRM portals
DetailsList.Description: External stakeholders can use a portal signup form to add themselves to an organization's portal account. Zoho CRM will validate those who have signed up and only then will they be added into the portal account.

DetailsList.Title: Zia enhancements: Owner suggestions during record creation, reports, and a checking tool
DetailsList.Description:
Zia can now suggest the ideal record owner during manual record creation. The Zia tab has two new additions:

- Zia's suggested owner reports enable you to view the records that Zia has assigned, as well as the subset of those records that have been manually reassigned.
- Check Zia's suggested owners functionality enables you to prompt Zia with values for the different factors that contribute to record ownership.

DetailsList.Title: Saved filter limit increased
DetailsList.Description: The limit on saved filters has been boosted from 5 to 10, so you can create and manage a larger number of custom filters to manage data more efficiently. We've also introduced the ability to reorder your filters according to your preferences to keep them organized and easily accessible.

DetailsList.Title: Zoho CRM's sandbox now supports the Zoho Social integration
DetailsList.Description: Test out your Zoho Social integration in a sandbox in Zoho CRM before deploying the integration to your production environment. This enables you to test out functionalities like monitoring your brand's conversations, adding new leads from your social media pages or handles, automating responses with social workflow rules, and more.

DetailsList.Title: Set workload limits in CRM with assignment thresholds
DetailsList.Description: Create an assignment threshold to set limits on the number of new records that can be assigned to CRM users. You can also automate the periodic reassignment of records that cross this threshold.

DetailsList.Title: Zoho CRM's sandbox now supports the Zoho Survey integration
DetailsList.Description: Integrate Zoho Survey into your CRM's sandbox before deploying it to your production environment. Within the sandbox environment, you can identify issues, practice sending surveys to customers without actually sending emails, and train new sales reps.

DetailsList.Title: Enhanced webform A/B testing with Zia suggestions
DetailsList.Description: Enhancements to Zia's webform A/B testing in Zoho CRM provide invaluable guidance for optimizing user interactions. Zia suggests A/B testing for underperforming webforms and recommends variants for improvement. It offers dynamic traffic allocation, extension recommendations, and informed launch insights. Statistical significance scores ensure confident decision-making.

DetailsList.Title: Client Script Commands
DetailsList.Description: Users can now execute client scripts anywhere in Zoho CRM using Client Script Commands, which are accessible via the command palette or personalized keyboard shortcuts. These commands enhance productivity and user experience.

DetailsList.Title: Condition-based aggregate fields support
DetailsList.Description: Effortlessly aggregate subform data on mobile with our new condition-based aggregate fields feature. Now you can use advanced conditions configured on the web version to aggregate data directly on your mobile device.

DetailsList.Title: Condition-based aggregate field support
DetailsList.Description: Effortlessly aggregate subform data on mobile with our new condition-based aggregate fields feature. Now, you can use advanced conditions configured on the web version to aggregate data directly on your mobile device.

DetailsList.Title: Account suggestions in the Leads module
DetailsList.Description: When entering data into the Company field within the Leads module, users receive intuitive prompts that suggest matching records from the Accounts module. This feature streamlines the process of associating leads with existing accounts and promotes a more efficient process flow.

DetailsList.Title: New extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Stripe Payment Extension for Zoho CRM, Address Verify and Customer Timezone for Zoho CRM, Image Gallery Extension for Zoho CRM, Easy Dropbox for Zoho CRM, and more.

DetailsList.Title: Released TypeScript SDK supporting v5 APIs, with support for new APIs
DetailsList.Description:
- Added a new column for api_domain in TokenStore object. 
- Added support for new APIs: User Groups, Fiscal Year, Timeline, Transfer and Delete Users, Territories, Territories Users, Organization, and Record Locking.

DetailsList.Title: SharePoint for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Access, manage, and organize your SharePoint libraries from within Zoho CRM and create customized folders for your Zoho CRM records. You can store files related to your deals and accounts, and share those files and folders securely with your contacts, leads, and vendors.

DetailsList.Title: Released Python SDK supporting v5 APIs, with support for new APIs
DetailsList.Description:
- Added a new column for api_domain in TokenStore object.
- Added support for new APIs: user groups, fiscal year, timeline, transfer and delete users, territories, territories users, organization photo, and record locking.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded NodeJS SDK supporting v5 APIs to version 3.0.0
DetailsList.Description: Added a new column for api_domain in TokenStore object.

DetailsList.Title: Parallel and multiple transition support in Blueprint
DetailsList.Description: With support for parallel and multiple transitions on mobile devices, users can now use the Blueprint functionality to manage processes flexibly and coordinate operations with ease.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing keyboard shortcuts for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: New keyboard shortcuts for records and modules are now available in Zoho CRM. You now have the flexibility to modify the default key combinations and set up your preferred shortcuts.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded C# SDK supporting v2.1 APIs to version 3.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- Resolved conflicts in the meta class names of user-specific fields.
- Included internal handling for custom fields during insert and update operations to handle cases where cache is not updated.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded NodeJS SDK supporting v5 APIs to version 2.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- Pagination issue fixed in Email Related Records API. Handled datatype for the next_index and prev_index fields.
- Resolved conflicts in the meta class names of user-specific fields.
- This version now supports the delete operation in multi-select lookup, multi-user lookup, image upload, and subform fields in Records API.

DetailsList.Title: Permissions-based access for notes and attachments
DetailsList.Description: Users can now easily view and manage notes and attachments directly from their mobile device, in accordance with their profile permissions. This helps to improve efficiency when accessing and interacting with data on the go.

DetailsList.Title: Permissions-based access for notes and attachments
DetailsList.Description: Users can now easily view and manage notes and attachments directly from the mobile device, in accordance with their profile permissions. This helps improve security and efficiency when accessing and interacting with data on the go.

DetailsList.Title: New extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Email Validation for Zoho CRM, ABR Calendly Extension for Zoho CRM, Trello Integration for Zoho CRM, Eazybe: WhatsApp for Zoho CRM, and more.

DetailsList.Title: Emails from contact roles can be linked to deals in Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Organizations in which all users are using the latest email configuration will be able to connect their users' email discussions with contact roles to corresponding deals, just like how email conversations with contacts are linked to deals.

DetailsList.Title: Enhanced limits for subform fields
DetailsList.Description: Field limits for fields in layout subforms have been increased from 10 to 25, enhancing users' data capture capabilities. Additionally, for decimal, percentage, and currency data types, the limit has risen from 10 to 20 fields. This change applies to both Enterprise and Ultimate editions, and also applies to system subforms.

DetailsList.Title: Enhancements to Motivator
DetailsList.Description: Administrators can now make critical announcements via the TV channel feature, and users can now benefit from precise on-track/off-track target analysis. Dashboard components come with individual refresh capabilities, and team creation has been streamlined for efficiency. Additionally, view settings are now hierarchy-aligned, and both administrators and users can dive deeper into KPI trends with greater date granularity.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing the email credibility report in Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Verify and optimize your organization's email-sending practices based on the insights Zoho CRM provides in the email credibility report. The report includes your credibility score, bounce report, and trend report as graphs to help you mitigate your bounce volume and spam complaints.

DetailsList.Title: Canvas is now supported in sandboxes
DetailsList.Description: Test your Canvas pages in a sandbox environment before deploying them to your production environment to ensure a smooth transition. By testing the interface before rolling it out to all end users, you can iron out the wrinkles and tackle issues in a safe environment with a smaller set of users.

DetailsList.Title: Free product addition, dynamic quantity update, and UI improvements in CPQ
DetailsList.Description:
CPQ for Zoho CRM has been enhanced with three useful capabilities:
- The product configurator and price rule interface has been enhanced to help you filter and search for products just like how you would on a list view page using advanced filters.
- You can automate the addition of free products upon the purchase of a primary product.
- The quantity of automated line items can now be dynamically updated based on the primary quoted item. [Public early access]

DetailsList.Title: Qualtrics for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: With the Qualtrics for Zoho CRM extension, you can help your sales team assist customers more effectively by adding survey templates and sending Qualtrics survey emails automatically. By distributing surveys, you can collect feedback from customers and share it with everyone in your organization.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing customization on the Unsubscribe page
DetailsList.Description:
The following enhancements were made to the Unsubscribe page:
- Users can customize the standard unsubscribe landing page message and display message.
- The merge fields option is available within messages.
- UI edit and delete options are available in a dropdown menu for each link.

DetailsList.Title: Create custom templates for WhatsApp Business integration
DetailsList.Description: New enhancements for the WhatsApp Business integration enable users to create personalized templates under the new "WhatsApp Notifications" tab. After Facebook's approval, these templates can automate messages and integrate with Workflows, Blueprints, and CommandCenter. For conversations within the Messages module, a dedicated tab has been introduced to showcase transactional messages sent to the customer.

DetailsList.Title: Useful enhancements to Mail Merge in Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description:
In addition to standard (Leads, Contacts, Accounts, and Deals) and custom modules, agents can now use Mail Merge for the following inventory modules, too: Products, Sales Orders, Purchase Orders, Invoices, and Quotes.

Below are the changes introduced in this enhancement:
- Image fields from a record's layout can now be used to merge with templates created using the Mail Merge feature in Zoho CRM.
- Create merge templates for Inventory modules.

DetailsList.Title: Revised pricing and support for plugin modules in portals
DetailsList.Description: The price of portal user licenses is now $5/user/month. This was the lowest price in the previous scheme, and now it will be applied to all portal user license purchases. Also, you can now provide access to plugin module records for portal users.

DetailsList.Title: New views to manage record activities
DetailsList.Description: Manage and prioritize activities using the three new views: column, chronological, and tab.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Java SDK supporting v2 APIs to version 2.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
1. Handled Record APIs custom field.
2. Added support for TimeZone data type.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded PHP SDK supporting v5 APIs to version 2.1.0
DetailsList.Description: Fixed an issue with the BulkWrite UploadFile API.

DetailsList.Title: Java SDK supports v5 APIs along with new APIs
DetailsList.Description:
- Java SDK upgraded to support v5 APIs.
- Java SDK improved to support the following new APIs: User Groups API, Fiscal Year API, Timeline API, Transfer and Delete Users API, Territories API, and Territories Users API.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded PHP SDK supporting v5 APIs to version 2.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- Records API: Fixed to support delete operation for multi-select lookup, multi-user lookup, image upload, and subform fields.
- Email-related records API: Introduced API pagination fix to handle next_index and prev_index field datatypes.
- User-specific fields: Resolved conflicts in the meta class names of user-specific fields.

DetailsList.Title: Zia Strategy Influencer: AI-powered insights for setting optimal business goals
DetailsList.Description:
Leverage predictive, prescriptive, and diagnostic insights from five key components for strategic planning and anomaly identification to drive efficient goal achievement:

- Target contributors: Identify contributing factors.
- Anomaly finder: Detect significant deviations.
- Gap analyzer: Analyze disparities.
- Predictor: Highlight key contributors.
- Prescriptor: Provide prescriptive insights for improvement.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Java SDK supporting v5 APIs to version 3.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- Email-related records API: Introduced API pagination fix to handle next_index and prev_index field datatypes.
- User-specific fields: Resolved conflicts in the meta class names of user-specific fields.

DetailsList.Title: Improvements to finding and merging duplicate records in CRM
DetailsList.Description:
We've made the following changes:
- In the find and merge feature's search criteria, users can pick the fields they want and add or remove fields. This helps in finding duplicates they might have otherwise missed.
- The find and merge and deduplication features have been enabled for the Deals and custom modules.
- The created time and created by fields will be populated with the values found in the oldest record among the records being merged.

DetailsList.Title: Added support for multi-user lookup fields
DetailsList.Description: Add and remove multiple users while creating sales records from the mobile app.

DetailsList.Title: Added support for file uploads in subforms
DetailsList.Description: Add attachments to subform entries with the new file upload feature in the mobile app.

DetailsList.Title: Color coding for picklist values
DetailsList.Description: Color coded picklist values are now displayed in the mobile app under record details, module list views, dashboards, and so on.

DetailsList.Title: Validation for email domain authentication
DetailsList.Description: Upon sending an email from the mobile app, the sender's email domain authentication status is validated to improve email deliverability.

DetailsList.Title: Enhanced limits for subform fields
DetailsList.Description: Field limits for fields in layout subforms have been increased from 10 to 25, enhancing users' data capture capabilities. Additionally, for decimal, percentage, and currency data types, the limit has risen from 10 to 20 fields. This change applies to both Enterprise and Ultimate editions, and also applies to system subforms.

DetailsList.Title: New extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Findly for Zoho CRM, Google Address Toolkit for Zoho CRM, Accept Blue Payment Gateway Extension for Zoho CRM, Barcode / QR Code Generator for Zoho CRM, and more.

DetailsList.Title: MiiTel for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Initiate, receive, and synchronize phone call records in Zoho CRM using the MiiTel extension.

DetailsList.Title: Profile-based home page sharing
DetailsList.Description: Users can now share home page components based on both roles and profiles, with the ability to access up to 10 home pages—five allocated to roles and an additional five to profiles.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Java SDK supporting v5 APIs to version 2.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- Handled Record APIs custom field.</break>
- Added support for TimeZone data type.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Shopify sync for Zoho CRM, Domain verifier for Zoho CRM, SQL Server AppiWorks for Zoho CRM, CS-Cart for Zoho CRM and more

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded PHP SDK supporting v4 APIs to version 2.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- PHP SDK now supports TimeZone datatype.
- Enhanced DBStore, FileStore, and OAuthToken classes.
- Changed the field datatype of $timezone in ShiftHour resource.
- Changed user $timezone field type.
- Updated __Construct() for the following: DownloadAttachmentsOperations, DownloadInlineImagesOperations, PortalInviteOperations, and UserTypeUsersOperations.

DetailsList.Title: PHP SDK supports v5 APIs along with new APIs
DetailsList.Description:
- PHP SDK upgraded to support v5 APIs.
- New APIs supported in this version: User Groups API, Fiscal Year API, Timeline API, Transfer and Delete Users API, Territories API, and Territories Users API.

DetailsList.Title: Revamp announcement: The Canvas module view gets an exciting face-lift
DetailsList.Description: The legacy Canvas module view editor has been replaced by the all-new Canvas builder. With this update, administrators and users with Manage Custom View permission can create stellar module views to accommodate data of all kinds in three types of orientations: custom list view, tile view, and table view.

DetailsList.Title: Ask Zia supports custom views and reports
DetailsList.Description: Users can quickly fetch custom views and reports using Ask Zia, Zoho CRM's built-in sales assistant.

DetailsList.Title: Moderate view permissions for notes and attachments within a record
DetailsList.Description: Administrators can now determine which profile can view and access the notes and attachments inside a record. This regulation will help keep top-tiered information visible and accessible only to certain user profiles.

DetailsList.Title: Copy customizations for dashboards
DetailsList.Description: Users can now customize and replicate analytics configurations from the source account to the target account.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Java SDK supporting v4 APIs to version 5.0.0
DetailsList.Description: Email related records API pagination issue fixed: Handled next_index and prev_index field datatype.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Java SDK supporting v4 APIs to version 4.0.0
DetailsList.Description: Records APIs issue fixed: Added support for delete operation in multi-select lookup, multi-user lookup, image upload, and subform fields.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Java SDK supporting v4 APIs to version 3.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- Java SDK now supports TimeZone datatype.
- Enhanced DBStore, FileStore, and OAuthToken classes.
- Changed the field datatype of timezone in ShiftHour resource.
- Changed the attachments field type in SendMail to attachment.
- Updated Class constructor() method for the following operations: DownloadAttachmentsOperations, DownloadInlineImagesOperations, PortalInviteOperations, and UserTypeUsersOperations.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Java SDK supporting v2 APIs to version 2.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- Handled Record APIs custom field.
- Added support for TimeZone data type.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded PHP SDK supporting v4 APIs to version 3.0.0
DetailsList.Description: Records APIs issue fixed: Added support for delete operation in multi-select lookup, multi-user lookup, image upload, and subform fields.

DetailsList.Title: NodeJS SDK supports v5 APIs along with new APIs
DetailsList.Description:
- NodeJS SDK has been upgraded to support v5 APIs.
- New APIs are supported in this version: User Groups API, Fiscal Year API, Timeline API, Transfer and Delete Users API, Territories API, and Territories Users API.

DetailsList.Title: Upgraded Java SDK supporting v4 APIs to version 3.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
- Java SDK now supports TimeZone datatype.
- Enhanced DBStore, FileStore, and OAuthToken classes.
- Changed the field datatype of timezone in ShiftHour resource.
- Changed the attachments field type in SendMail to attachment.
- Updated Class constructor() method for the following operations: DownloadAttachmentsOperations, DownloadInlineImagesOperations, PortalInviteOperations, and UserTypeUsersOperations.

DetailsList.Title: Enable the "subordinates only" profile permission to restrict record assignment and more
DetailsList.Description: For efficient collaboration and precise data control, use the "list subordinates only" profile permission setting to restrict users from assigning or sharing records with other team members. Additionally, the "manage users" permission has been split into "manage all users" and "subordinates only," enhancing the user's data security.

DetailsList.Title: View associated group details on user page
DetailsList.Description: Gain valuable insights and streamline team management by viewing the associations of your CRM users with different groups within the org on the user detail page.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing new parameters to the user-based fields in advanced filters
DetailsList.Description: Records in a module can now be filtered with user-based attributes like roles and groups. This will enable CRM users and administrators to effectively sort records based on ownership.

DetailsList.Title: Rebrand your CRM with custom domain mapping
DetailsList.Description: Zoho CRM now supports custom domain mapping. Rebrand your CRM system and align it with your business's domain name to increase your brand's credibility among your customers.

DetailsList.Title: Revamped Sheet View for enhanced productivity
DetailsList.Description: The improved version of Zoho Sheet View is more user-friendly and quite powerful. It includes support for field validation and error messages, and most importantly, it can trigger automations. That means you'll be able to do your manual tasks in Zoho Sheet View quickly and without errors. Once you save your sheet, you can initiate workflows that will take care of automated tasks.

DetailsList.Title: Upgradation of Java SDK supporting v4 APIs to version 2.0.0
DetailsList.Description: User APIs Issue fixed - Handled phone and mobile field datatype.

DetailsList.Title: Upgradation of PHP SDK supporting v4 APIs to version 1.1.0
DetailsList.Description: PHP SDK has been upgraded to version 1.1.0, now supporting Unicode values.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Exchange Rate Feeds for Zoho CRM, CEQUENS SMS for Zoho CRM,VL SMS for Zoho CRM,Take Blip for Zoho CRM and more.

DetailsList.Title: Smarter data gathering with Query component in Wizards
DetailsList.Description: Now efficiently manage and gather data in your CRM with this smart search field in Wizards, allowing actions based on search results. Configure actions like selecting records, navigating screens, displaying messages, creating new records and so on, depending on your needs.

DetailsList.Title: Checklist For Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: This extension allows Zoho CRM administrators to enable a checklist in the detail view page of a record below the business card.

DetailsList.Title: Released PHP SDK supporting v4 APIs
DetailsList.Description:
Released PHP SDK v1.0.0 to support v4 APIs.
