1. Implemented structural changes to improve the user-friendliness of SDK configuration and initialization processes.
2. Handled Token Persistence
3. Updated UserSignature from Mandatory to Optional.
4. user_mail key in DBStore and FileStore is updated to user_name.
5. PHP SDK improved to support the following new APIs:
AssociateEmail, Backup, BusinessHours, CancelMeetings, DealContactRoles, DownloadInlineImagesofanEmail, DownloadEmailAttachments, EmailSharing, EmailRelatedrecords, FieldMapDependency, fromAddresses, Holidays, MassChangeOwner, MassConvert, MassDeleteCVID, Portals, PortalInvite, ShiftHours, UserGroups, UserTerritories, UserType, UserTypeUsers.

DetailsList.Title: Import PDF files to merge templates with emails
DetailsList.Description: In addition to the existing import file formats (.zdoc, .doc, .docx), users can now import files in .pdf format, add or update fields, and attach them to emails using the Mail Merge feature.

DetailsList.Title: Zia's integration with OpenAI
DetailsList.Description: Use power of OpenAI's generative AI into Zia's AI capabilities. Introducing the Smart Prompt functionality, to assist users in enhancing their communications with leads and customers

DetailsList.Title: Released Java SDK v1 supporting v4 APIs.
DetailsList.Description:
-Released JAVA SDK v1.0.0 to support v4 APIs.
-Implemented structural changes to improve the user-friendliness of SDK configuration and initialization processes.
- Handled token-persistence
- user_mail key in DBStore and FileStore updated to user_name.

DetailsList.Title: Checklists, Widgets, SLA's and more enhancements in Blueprint.
DetailsList.Description:
The Blueprint feature has been enhanced to support the below functionalities on executing from mobile app:
-Continuous Blueprint
-Auto-Transition
-SLA for states
-Parent module fields in "during" transition
-Widgets in "during" transition
-Attachments in "during" transition
-Checklist as related list

DetailsList.Title: Close Zoho account from mobile app.
DetailsList.Description: Users can now close their Zoho account right from within their mobile app.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Mailshake for Zoho CRM, eInforma for Zoho CRM, Merk for Zoho CRM, Jotform Sign for Zoho CRM, and more.

DetailsList.Title: Performance Analysis in Forecast
DetailsList.Description: Analyze the performance of various forecasts with the help of the newly added charts— performance trend report, achievement comparison report, and comparison across forecasts. Added to that, analyze the performances of users and roles in the respective performance pages, know the reasons for the gap in the performances if any, and improve the achievements by following the improvements suggested.

DetailsList.Title: Moderate record accessibility permissions for user fields
DetailsList.Description: In addition to allowing/restricting accessibility for users associated to a record through a user field, administrators can now determine their permission levels as Read only, Read Write, or Full Access, as required.

DetailsList.Title: Behavior fix: Unused formula fields are no longer computed
DetailsList.Description:
What's the bug: Even after removing the formula field from the layout, the formula was executing in the backend causing technical processing issues. If the said formula field was appended as merge fields in any templates, the field was returning computed values.
What's the fix: This stealth processing in the backend is curtailed. Now, even if the formula field is moved back to the layout, it will display the previous value until the value in the participating field is edited/updated.

DetailsList.Title: Customize forecast categories for open deals
DetailsList.Description: Admins can now define up to two new custom forecast categories for open deals, adding flexibility to deal classification. Previously, open deals were limited to default categories: Pipeline, Best case, and Committed. With this enhancement, businesses can fine-tune deal stage categorization to match their unique processes by renaming and color-coding existing forecast categories.

DetailsList.Title: SMS notifications in Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Send transactional SMS messages to your customers' handheld devices directly from your CRM. Set up automations for SMS and much more!

DetailsList.Title: Add fields from the lookup module
DetailsList.Description: In addition to looking up a record from within a record, customers can also look for and associate particular fields from an associated module. This enables them to associate important data easily.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: GoTo SMS texting Extension for Zoho CRM,Mailchimp for Zoho CRM, Workdrive for Zoho CRM,Salesgear for Zoho CRM, and more.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing record locking options for CRM
DetailsList.Description: Now keep records safe from editing or deletion based on specific conditions. Easily set up locking configurations for each module and choose from manual or automatic locking options. Once locked, see details such as reason, date and fields available for edit. You can manually unlock records or have an admin do it, but if you delete a rule, it will unlock all previously locked records.

DetailsList.Title: Workflow for notes
DetailsList.Description: Now configure workflow rules triggered by actions on notes in a module. Choose from several options, set additional conditions, and use note attributes like created time, created by, etc. to select specific notes to trigger your workflows.

DetailsList.Title: SMS Misr for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Make SMS marketing campaigns and SMS advertising better with SMS Misr.

DetailsList.Title: Upgradation of PHP SDK supporting v2.0 APIs to version 6.2.0
DetailsList.Description: The PHP SDK is updated to version 6.2.0 and the error that caused an SDKException due to the presence of /src/ or /src/com/ in the php-sdk path when accessing the JSONDetails.json file is fixed.

DetailsList.Title: Behavior fix: Change in null value computation in formula fields
DetailsList.Description: Thus far, the formula field was considering empty values in the participating fields as "0" and used to return incorrect results. We have fixed this behavior. Now, if a participating field has no value, the formula cannot process the empty value and will display a blank result.

DetailsList.Title: Upgradation of PHP SDK supporting v2.1 APIs to version 7.1.0
DetailsList.Description: The PHP SDK is updated to version 7.1.0 and the error that caused an SDKException due to the presence of /src/ or /src/com/ in the php-sdk path when accessing the JSONDetails.json file is fixed.

DetailsList.Title: Upgradation of NodeJS SDK supporting v2.1 APIs to version 2.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
NodeJS SDK is updated to version 2.0.0 and the following enhancements are made:
1. Supported with CancelMeetings API.
2. Supported with ApplyFeatureExecution for LayoutRules in Record API.
3. Handled Exceptions in ModuleFieldsHandler and field meta changes in Currencies API.
4. Supported with Single Import and ES Module(from node version 14.21.3)
5. Handled Exceptions in SDK.
6. Handled Token persistence, UserSignature, and OAuthToken.
->Supported with 32-char tokenId.
->Supported with name in UserSignature.

DetailsList.Title: Set portal users as owners of Blueprint transitions
DetailsList.Description: Admins can extend blueprint transition permissions to portal users. This ultimately simplifies customer engagement and operational efficiency by minimizing delays in your business processes.

DetailsList.Title: Measure the likelihood of conversions using Zia Scores
DetailsList.Description: Zia takes into account all of the information related to a particular record and calculates a score for that record. This includes record information, details from SalesSignals, related list details, and data from CRM integrations, all of which is retrieved, and analyzed by Zia to arrive at a score that represents the likelihood of conversion for a particular lead/deal.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing Global Sets for easy management of similar picklists
DetailsList.Description: A global set is an admin-defined set of picklist values that can be associated with multiple picklists across modules. With global sets in place, maintenance of similar picklists is no longer a tedious and error-prone activity.

DetailsList.Title: Zoho PageSense for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Integrate Zoho CRM with Zoho PageSense to simplify the lead filtering process. Identify and label high-quality leads based on goals they've accomplished. View recordings of a lead's journey to understand their browsing patterns and identify any potential issues/obstacles.

DetailsList.Title: Bulk delete support in CRM Admin Tools for roles, profiles, and webforms
DetailsList.Description: Administrators can now easily locate and remove unused roles, profiles, and webforms present in a CRM organization using Admin tools. This will help mitigate clutter and manage limits from a single interface.

DetailsList.Title: Zoho Notebook For Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: A powerful solution that enables users to take rich text notes, attach photos, record audio, attach files, and add to-do items

DetailsList.Title: Revamped UI for groups in CRM
DetailsList.Description: Introducing an improved UI for both group creation and management processes. The enhancements include a cleaner UI for group creation, a streamlined process for adding members with a search options for territories, roles, and users, filters for active/inactive users, and a revamped member details page. Users can now categorize selections, and view detailed member information.

DetailsList.Title: Synchronize notes while integrating Zoho Analytics with Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: During Zoho Analytics and Zoho CRM integration, admins can choose to synchronize notes from various modules alongside other sub-fields. This will help bring in more context about the record into CRM.

DetailsList.Title: Mark a subform as required
DetailsList.Description: A new property to mark a subform as required has been introduced. This lets the users utilize subform like an individual form in itself.

DetailsList.Title: Filter lookup records using predefined criteria.
DetailsList.Description: In a lookup field, users can now view, select, and associate only the eligible records that satisfies the lookup criteria.

DetailsList.Title: Voice Recording field in Calls module
DetailsList.Description: Introducing the all new Voice Recording field for feeding your voice recording URLs. You can add the recording URL while logging calls, which upon saving renders your recording in the form of an audio player within the record.

DetailsList.Title: Wizards support in portals
DetailsList.Description: Now extend the wizard experience to your customers, through portals. Configure your portal user types, and select a different wizard for the module layouts. Portal users can then add required details related to a record in multiple wizard pages, as well as save them when needed, thereby avoiding overwhelming and tedious record entries.

DetailsList.Title: Call Transcription and Zia Call Intelligence
DetailsList.Description: Now get audio recordings of your conversations over calls transcribed into text. Configure which calls to be transcribed, and the users for which calls should be transcribed. With the help of its intelligent analyzing abilities, Zia will automatically retrieve information such as summary of the call, sentiment, emotion, as well as intent of the call from your the transcriptions and share the details.

DetailsList.Title: Share a record's URL via share extensions.
DetailsList.Description: Users can now copy the URL of a record, save it to files, or share it with other apps.

DetailsList.Title: Filter lookup records using predefined criteria.
DetailsList.Description: In a lookup field, users can now view, select, and associate only the eligible records that satisfies the lookup criteria.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: ActiveCampaign Connect for Zoho CRM, Sibila for Zoho CRM, Global Call Forwarding CDR Data Link for Zoho CRM, Company Cam Connect for Zoho CRM by Upwise, and more

DetailsList.Title: Upgradation of PHP SDK supporting v2.1 APIs to version 7.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
PHP SDK is updated to version 7.0.0 and the following enhancements are made:
-Supported with Cancelmeetings API and ApplyFeatureExecution for Layout Rule in Record API.
-Handled user-specific modules and field meta changes.
-Modified properties in Currencies API. iso_code, exchange_rate and name keys are made mandatory, other keys are made optional

DetailsList.Title: File upload in subforms
DetailsList.Description: Now you can upload files to your subform entries with Zoho CRM's new File Upload field feature. Add attachments to your subform entries with ease.

DetailsList.Title: Upgradation of Python SDK supporting v2.1 APIs to version 2.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
Python SDK is updated to version 2.0.0 and the following enhancements are made:
-Supported with CancelMeetings API and ApplyFeatureExecution in Record API
-Handled user-specific modules and field meta changes.

DetailsList.Title: Use Zoho CRM's CPQ tool for custom quote management
DetailsList.Description: Zoho CRM's CPQ tool is designed to help sales teams create accurate, customized quotes for their customers based on their specific needs instantly. With CPQ, you can perform line item automation and thereby effectively navigate the challenges of varying product combinations and dynamic pricing by getting the system to automatically add or suggest products as well as make price calculations during quote creation. [Public early access]

DetailsList.Title: Upgradation of Ruby SDK supporting v2.1 APIs to version 2.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
Ruby SDK is updated to version 2.0.0 and the following enhancements are made:
-Supported with CancelMeetings API and ApplyFeatureExecution for Layout Rule in Record API.
-Handled user-specific modules and field meta changes.
-Modified properties in Currencies API. iso_code, exchange_rate and name keys are made mandatory, other keys are made optional.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing lookup filters
DetailsList.Description: Lookup filters allow you to set criteria for displaying only qualifying records during lookup. This makes it easier to associate records and ensures accuracy. You can activate this feature in the layout editor and define criteria to help sales representatives save time and effort.

DetailsList.Title: Migrate data from Bigin to CRM
DetailsList.Description: It is now possible to transfer data from your Bigin organization to Zoho CRM, using a straightforward three-step process. Simply select Bigin in the import section, choose the organization you wish to import from, and allow the system to map your data automatically.

DetailsList.Title: New feature announcement: Discover customer journeys using Path Finder
DetailsList.Description: Path Finder is a robust tool that helps you discover and map customer journeys from across your business landscape. By piecing together real-time interactions at each touchpoints, it will help identify different customer personas and understand their behaviors in your business. It displays three visual charts—Path report, Sankey report, and Journey report to follow their journeys from different perspectives.

DetailsList.Title: Adding context to Zia's Next Best Experience suggestions
DetailsList.Description: Zia considers the incoming emails, reads them, analyzes them, extracts information and then provides suggestions along with some context. With this enhancement, along with the next best experience suggestion, you will be able to see the Last activity. This is to give users context as to what activity was taken into account when giving next-best experience suggestion.

DetailsList.Title: New set of charts added to Zia's prediction analytics
DetailsList.Description: To the existing prediction analytics, we have added a bunch of enhancements where Zia will provide a score for its prediction quality, predict failures, segment failed predictions, perform win/loss analysis, provide a report on users who got the most prediction as failure, and predict deals that are likely to be closed lost based on its current stage.

DetailsList.Title: Segment Zia's recommendations as groups and understand your customer behavior up close
DetailsList.Description: Segmenting Zia's recommendations into groups that have similar characteristics will help managers understand the pattern of such recommendations and equip them to handle the deals more efficiently. Under each segment, the number of records along with the condition for that particular segment is listed.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing failed activities metrics in Zia's Best time to contact analytics
DetailsList.Description: Zia will segment the failed activities under the Best time to contact analytics. Under each segment, the failed call/email count, and condition for each segment will be listed. Zia will also provide analytics on whether calls were answered mostly at the start of the week, mid-week, end of the week or if it was evenly distributed everyday. It will also show if the failed calls were initiated during the best time to connect or some other time.

DetailsList.Title: Zia Subject line suggestion
DetailsList.Description:
Now get Zia suggestions for catchy subject lines for your emails to grab your customer's attention, and enhance the email open rate.
This feature is currently available ONLY for the US, and EU DCs.

DetailsList.Title: Edit action has been supported on accessing a record from Analytics module.
DetailsList.Description: Users can now access and edit the record details page directly from the Analytics module.

DetailsList.Title: Stage component in Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: The stage component, an extension of the funnel-type component in Zoho CRM, tracks conversion, stagnation, and spillage at each process stage, along with direct conversions and overall win rates. It uses picklist fields with history tracking enabled and can be found among available dashboard components.

DetailsList.Title: Upgradation of Java SDK supporting v2.1 APIs to version 4.0.1
DetailsList.Description:
Java SDK is updated to version 4.0.1 and the following enhancements are made:
-Handled user-specific modules and field meta changes.
-Handled Template in SendMail

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: PressOne Africa for Zoho CRM, Plivo Phone Verification for Zoho CRM, ABR Complete Leads System for Zoho CRM, and more.

DetailsList.Title: Upgradation of Java SDK supporting v2.1 APIs to version 3.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
Java SDK is updated to version 3.0.0 and the following enhancements are made:
Supported with CancelMeetings API.
Supported with ApplyFeatureExecution for Record API.
Updated the properties-name, iso_code, and exchange_rate to mandatory, and other properties to optional in Currencies API.

DetailsList.Title: Export/ import canvas with different organizations
DetailsList.Description: Customers can export/ import canvas creations with other organizations by means of unique alphanumeric key. This will transmit all the design elements seamlessly.

DetailsList.Title: Upgradation of Ruby SDK supporting v2.0 APIs to version 6.1.0
DetailsList.Description:
Ruby SDK is updated to version 6.1.0 and the following enhancements are made:
Record API is Supported with applyFeatureExecution.

DetailsList.Title: Upgradation of Python SDK supporting v2.0 APIs to version 5.1.0
DetailsList.Description:
Python SDK is updated to version 5.1.0 and the following enhancements are made:
Record API is Supported with applyFeatureExecution.

DetailsList.Title: Upgradation of NodeJS SDK supporting v2.0 APIs to version 6.1.0
DetailsList.Description:
NodeJS SDK is updated to version 6.1.0 and the following enhancements are made:
Record API is Supported with applyFeatureExecution.

DetailsList.Title: Attach files to a record from Zoho WorkDrive
DetailsList.Description: Files or folders from Zoho WorkDrive can be attached to a record.

DetailsList.Title: Zia custom email intent
DetailsList.Description:
The enhanced email intent analysis by Zia will now capture customized intents specific to businesses. You can configure the custom intents by feeding Zia with sample data or keywords related to the intent.
This feature is currently available ONLY for the US, and EU DCs.

DetailsList.Title: Configure and map scoring rules' parameters as custom field
DetailsList.Description: In addition to the tabulated view of scores in related list, the desired score KPIs can now be added as custom read-only fields inside a record. This enables you to use those fields as criteria parameters across CRM.

DetailsList.Title: Get slots in your CRM calendar blocked automatically
DetailsList.Description: Now get slots in your CRM calendar marked as unavailable automatically, based on the bookings in your Google Calendars, if you have the Google Calendar sync enabled.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing new charts based on user feedback on Zia's recommendations
DetailsList.Description:
The following charts are displayed to assess how Zia recommendations are useful to the CRM users and how well the users deploy Zia's recommendations.
- Overall feedback analytics
- Feedback analytics based on the recommendation type
- Feedback analytics based on the product type
- Feedback contribution
- Missed cross-sell opportunities

DetailsList.Title: Better optimization of module list view.
DetailsList.Description:
The list view of the CRM modules has been optimized for a better user experience.
The sort function has been placed in the list view for easy access.

DetailsList.Title: Better optimization of user related lookup fields
DetailsList.Description: Searching and selection of users from owner lookup field and user lookup field has been optimized for better user experience.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing Zia's Best time to contact analytics
DetailsList.Description:
The Best time to contact is Zia's suggestion on when to contact a prospect or a customer to achieve conversion. To investigate and optimize the experience, Zia, now displays the following analytics:
- Best time to contact analysis summary for leads and contacts
-Individual Analysis: Outgoing Calls and outgoing emails
-Best Time Usage analysis for calls and emails
-Customer interaction heat map
-Call attend rate
-Email open rate
-Best time followers
-Analytics for users who don't follow best time for communication
-Failed activities

DetailsList.Title: Section based workflow rules
DetailsList.Description: Now trigger a workflow rule whenever any field within a particular section is modified.

DetailsList.Title: "Puvi" for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: The font face of Zoho CRM has been changed from Lato to the home grown font type, "Puvi". In addition to the font update, color palette for key features in CRM is also updated.

DetailsList.Title: Use a field as a value to filter reports
DetailsList.Description: In addition to adding static value, a field can be used as a value for a filter criteria in the new reports feature.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description:
Notes Search for Zoho CRM, ABR Email Deliverability Extension for Zoho CRM, Australian Public Holidays for Zoho CRM, Zomani For Zoho CRM,
and more.

DetailsList.Title: Upgradation of PHP SDK supporting v2.0 APIs to version 6.1.0
DetailsList.Description:
PHP SDK is updated to version 6.1.0 and the following enhancements are made:
1. Record API is Supported with applyFeatureExecution.

DetailsList.Title: Upgradation of Typescript SDK supporting v2.0 APIs to version 7.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
Typrscript SDK is updated to version 7.0.0 and the following enhancements are made:
1. Fixed DBStore issue.

DetailsList.Title: Upgradation of Typescript SDK supporting v2.0 APIs to version 6.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
Typescript SDK is updated to version 6.0.0 and the following enhancements are made:
1. Exception handling.
2. Extra key added in tokenstore Id.
3. Resource file name changed.
4. Encoded key value changed.

DetailsList.Title: Upgradation of JAVA SDK supporting v2.0 APIs to version 5.1.0
DetailsList.Description:
JAVA SDK is updated to version 5.1.0 and the following enhancements are made:
1. Record API is Supported with applyFeatureExecution.

DetailsList.Title: Motivator enhancements
DetailsList.Description:
The following enhancements have been made to motivator:
1. Enable the option to show targets based on hierarchy, i.e. users can only view targets that are permitted to them based on their hierarchy.
2. Reorder dashboard components in the all new dashboard grid.
3. Customize dashboard's visibility to share dashboards with groups, roles, and roles and subordinates, alongside the users.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Freeagent Extension for Zoho CRM, GoDial for Zoho CRM, Multi-User RingCentral Texting for Zoho CRM, Neverbounce Connect for Zoho CRM, and more.

DetailsList.Title: Release of Java SDK Beta Version 1.0.0
DetailsList.Description: Java SDK Beta Version 1.0.0-beta for Zoho CRM API 4.0 was released.

DetailsList.Title: Release of PHP SDK Beta Version 1.0.0
DetailsList.Description: PHP SDK Beta Version 1.0.0-beta for Zoho CRM API 4.0 was released.

DetailsList.Title: Updates on Zia's Prediction feature
DetailsList.Description:
The following capabilities are added/ updated to Zia's Prediction feature.
- In light of the introduction of Customer churn prediction, the native prediction feature is renamed as "Field prediction".
- The summary component-learning pattern score, is renamed as "Model Accuracy".
- To view how Zia's learning has fared over different training versions, version history has been introduced. Also, you can compare prediction accuracy of those versions one-to-one.
- The contributing factors of a prediction model can now be moderated with desired fields.

DetailsList.Title: The "Reason for Loss" field in Deals, is now a picklist
DetailsList.Description: The descriptive type field "Reason for Loss" in the Deals module has been changed to a picklist field with predefined loss reasons. You can add new values, edit existing values, or delete them as required. The contents of the descriptive fields for the records that already exist will still be stored in the notes section.

DetailsList.Title: Layout rules and Validation rules for Calls
DetailsList.Description: Users can now execute the layout rules and validations rules configured for the calls modules from the mobile app.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing Zia's Next Best Experience
DetailsList.Description: Zia, with its ability to analyze and evaluate your business, will suggest the next best means of communication at each stage of your open deal. It sets the stage for you to approach your prospects and customers through the right channel at the right time.

DetailsList.Title: New enhancements to workflow rules
DetailsList.Description:
1. Two new instant actions have been added in workflow rules. They are 'Add a meeting' and 'Schedule a call'.
2. The mechanism to add additional fields to an action popup has been changed. Instead of adding system-defined fields, the update lets you choose the desired field to be added.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: LawPay for Zoho CRM, Organization chart for Zoho CRM,Qwilr for Zoho CRM, Linked Pro for Zoho CRM, and more.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing history logs and usage stats in Zia's data enrichment
DetailsList.Description: Monitor data enrichment activities performed by users in your CRM organization as logs under the enrichment history tab. Get to know how enrichment limits are being distributed using graphical charts.

DetailsList.Title: Predict customer churn in your organization using Zia
DetailsList.Description: Using its machine learning capabilities, Zia can predict if your customers will churn out of your business or not, and rate their churn probability. Also, if your business' revenue model is recurring and subscription-based, Zia can tell which product or service your customers are churning out from.

DetailsList.Title: Select the department before sending or taking a survey
DetailsList.Description: Sending and taking surveys directly from a record is now made systematic. Instead of rummaging through the exhausting list of available surveys, you can now choose the right survey based on the department your survey belongs to.

DetailsList.Title: Layout rule action to set mandatory fields to be supported in APIs
DetailsList.Description: With this enhancement, the "Set Mandatory Field" action of Layout Rules will be supported in APIs with version 2.0 and above, i.e. while adding or updating records through APIs, if the criteria for a layout rule are met, the fields will be defined as mandatory and it will not be possible to add or update the record if no values are entered for those fields.

DetailsList.Title: Answer calls directly from the call bar
DetailsList.Description: Calls in queue can now be answered one after the other, directly from the call bar.

DetailsList.Title: More Options for Scheduled Calls
DetailsList.Description: Scheduled calls can now be rescheduled or cancelled from the mobile app. Easily identify the Rescheduled and Cancelled calls with the help of new icons.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Telnyx SMS Extension for Zoho CRM, Zoom Phone for Zoho CRM, Dialfire Extension for Zoho CRM, and more.

DetailsList.Title: Sequence assignment rules in numerical order
DetailsList.Description: In addition to the drag and drop option, users can now reorder assignment rules by ascribing each rule with order numbers.

DetailsList.Title: Migration from Act! and SugarCRM to Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: The database from your former CRM providers - Act! or SugarCRM, can be migrated to Zoho CRM, directly using the respective migration channels present in the data import page.

DetailsList.Title: Send email for confirmation of portal users' email address
DetailsList.Description: On updating the email addresses of the existing portal users, you can now send them emails to get confirmation. They can confirm the change and continue accessing the portal with the existing password.On updating the email addresses of the existing portal users, you can now send them emails to get confirmation. They can confirm the change and continue accessing the portal with the existing password.

DetailsList.Title: Customize email templates for portals
DetailsList.Description: Customization options added for 'Portal Invitation' and 'Confirm Email Address' emails.

DetailsList.Title: Important enhancements in Attachment
DetailsList.Description: Users can now attach a video to a record, multi-select images and files with the help of new picker, and provide access only to a selected set of photos.

DetailsList.Title: PathFinder: Journey orchestration gets more precise
DetailsList.Description: Discover your customers' journeys across multiple touchpoints and channels, and understand how they interact with your brand. Visualize your customers' journeys with intuitive maps. and identify the most successful paths followed by your customers, common dropoff points, etc.

DetailsList.Title: Integrate WhatsApp Business with Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Integrate WhatsApp Business with Zoho CRM and respond to customer queries directly from your CRM organization. Also, send documents and media files from a list of cloud storage options like Google Drive, Sky Drive, Evernote, and Dropbox.

DetailsList.Title: Mail merge is now available for use in iPad and Android tablets' browsers.
DetailsList.Description: The mail merge feature in Zoho CRM can now be used from web browsers on iPad and Android tablets to create and manage templates on the go.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Telebu SMS Country for Zoho CRM, Xero bidirectional integration for Zoho CRM, Map My Contacts for Zoho CRM, Image Gallery for Zoho CRM, and more.

DetailsList.Title: uSonar for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: The uSonar extension gathers data from various tools and stores it under its own database. Once integrated, the uSonar extension automatically fills in 80 different fields about a company's customers by mapping their unique LBC ID with your Accounts module in Zoho CRM, eliminating the need to fill in customer information manually.

DetailsList.Title: Enhancement in Zia Activity Extraction
DetailsList.Description: The activities mentioned in the email correspondence are identified, extracted, and displayed by Zia in the Zia Notification Panel in a chronological order to enhance user experience.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing email emotion analysis by Zia
DetailsList.Description: With the new email emotion analysis, Zia can parse the following emotions from an incoming email: happy, enthusiasm, gratitude, trust, confusion, discontentment, frustration, and neutral. Based on the severity of the emotions observed, you can prioritize email responses effectively.

DetailsList.Title: Zia Consecutive Negative Sentiment alerts
DetailsList.Description: Get Zia notifications for consecutive emails with negative sentiments from customers to serve them better on priority basis. Set the number of consecutive emails to trigger notification, and toggle consecutive negative sentiment alerts at anytime depending on your business needs.

DetailsList.Title: Better optimization of related list
DetailsList.Description: Related modules list has been optimized for faster and better performance.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Referral Factory for Zoho CRM, Abstract Email Validation For Zoho CRM, Google Address Finder for Zoho CRM, Phone and Email Verifier for Zoho CRM, and more.

DetailsList.Title: Conditional rules in Wizards gets new criteria added
DetailsList.Description:
The following criteria are added to the conditional rules in Wizards to gather record information contextually:
1. When to apply the rules
2. Setting fixed value to fields
3. Locking specific records, and allowing special access to certain profiles
4. Showing text components and wizards

DetailsList.Title: Enhanced button customization options in Wizards
DetailsList.Description: Choose from the advanced color options available in the color palette to style buttons in Wizards. You can also choose from the most frequently used color options for the button styles.

DetailsList.Title: User field in subforms
DetailsList.Description: Associate CRM users with subform records directly using the user field. Additionally, you can have fields related to the user, like the user's email address field, in the subforms.

DetailsList.Title: UI enhancements in email compose window
DetailsList.Description:
1. The email compose window can now be resized to compact and be dragged along the screen for ease of reference as you write an email.
2. The recipients' email addresses added in "To", "CC", and "BCC" are now displayed together without hiding the writing space of the compose window.
3. Attachments can now be collapsed to avail more space in the compose window.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing routine messages in AskZia
DetailsList.Description: Configure frequently asked questions as pre-defined routine messages in AskZia and receive recurrent responses on desired intervals, automatically.

DetailsList.Title: Execute client scripts from the mobile app
DetailsList.Description: Users can now execute the configured client script actions in the mobile app based on the client script events.

DetailsList.Title: Execute client scripts from the mobile app
DetailsList.Description: Users can now execute the configured client script actions in the mobile app based on the client script events.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing Deal lookup field in Invoices
DetailsList.Description: Associate deals directly with Invoices with the default deal name lookup field.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Outplay for Zoho CRM, Twilio Phone Number Verification for Zoho CRM, ValueFirst for Zoho CRM, Canvas LMS for Zoho CRM, and more.

DetailsList.Title: Release of NodeJS Beta SDK Version 1.0.0
DetailsList.Description: NodeJS Beta SDK Version 1.0.0-beta for Zoho CRM API 3.0 was released.

DetailsList.Title: Campaign Monitor for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Campaign Monitor is an email marketing software that is equipped with automation tools to build emails and run campaigns. With the Campaign Monitor extension for Zoho CRM, you can synchronize all your campaigns from your Campaign Monitor account to Zoho CRM. You can access synchronized campaigns from the Campaigns module and contact details from the Contacts and Leads modules in Zoho CRM.

DetailsList.Title: Close Zoho account from mobile app.
DetailsList.Description: Users can now close their Zoho account right from within the mobile app.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing Criteria Support in Data Sharing Rules
DetailsList.Description: In data sharing rules, configure sharing preferences based on criteria to share only records that are required.

DetailsList.Title: Minor enhancements on shift hours: Limit update and permission update
DetailsList.Description:
1. The number of shift hours an organization can configure is updated from 30 to 50.
2. Admins and users with Manage Users profile permission can add and view users assigned to a shift.

DetailsList.Title: Notifications in Motivator
DetailsList.Description: Get notified about changes in KPIs, Games, or Targets in the form of notification tiles on your screen all across CRM. You can also check these notifications from the notification panel on Motivator home page. Mark notifications as favorites, filter notifications as required, and much more using the notification panel.

DetailsList.Title: New parameters in advanced filter for Zia Similarity recommendation
DetailsList.Description: Records can now be filtered based on similarity score in the advanced filter. Also, refer to a record as a value and filter similar records available in the module.

DetailsList.Title: test
DetailsList.Description: test

DetailsList.Title: NaijaSMSPortal for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: SMS is a great way to reach your customers directly. NaijaSMSPortal is an SMS provider that offers domestic (Nigeria) SMS services to its users. By integrating the NaijaSMSPortal extension with Zoho CRM, you can send individual or bulk SMS to your leads and contacts directly from your Zoho CRM account. You can also create SMS templates in Zoho CRM that can be selected while sending SMS to users.

DetailsList.Title: Segment records using modules from Finance suite integration
DetailsList.Description: After configuring the Zoho Finance Suite integration, some new modules are added to your CRM account. You can select these modules like Invoices, Sales Orders, Books, etc., as contributing module to segment native CRM records.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Zero Bounce Connect for Zoho CRM, Dataholics for Zoho CRM, IndiaMART Official Plugin for Zoho CRM, Auto Currency Exchange Rate Updater For Zoho CRM, and more.

DetailsList.Title: Release of Python Beta SDK Version 1.0.0
DetailsList.Description: Python Beta SDK Version 1.0.0-beta for Zoho CRM API 3.0 was released.

DetailsList.Title: Upgradation of Java SDK to 2.0.1
DetailsList.Description: Handled "BEST_TIME"(a JSONArray field) in Tasks module in Record API.

DetailsList.Title: Work with map dependencies in Sandbox
DetailsList.Description: Create and map dependencies between different pick-list fields in your sandbox, update existing dependencies, and deploy changes into your production setup.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing Zia Similarity Recommendation
DetailsList.Description: Using Zia Similarity Recommender, discover similar records present in the module. Take cues from similar patterns captured by Zia and pitch that recommendation to prospects and customers for a favorable transaction.

DetailsList.Title: Release of Java Beta SDK Version 1.0.0
DetailsList.Description: Java Beta SDK Version 1.0.0-beta for Zoho CRM API 3.0 was released.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: TradeIndia for Zoho CRM, Gong for Zoho CRM, Plivo SMS Extension for Zoho CRM, Glances for Zoho CRM, and more.

DetailsList.Title: Customize the order of pick list values
DetailsList.Description: The order of how pick list values are listed inside a record, list view, reports, and dashboards can be customized based on the options - Entered order or Alphabetical order.

DetailsList.Title: Responsive designs for Email Templates
DetailsList.Description: Create email templates with responsive designs that adapt to desktop and mobile devices. Additionally, preview their alignment and send test emails to up to five users to check how it renders in real time.

DetailsList.Title: Enhancement in Zia Recommendations
DetailsList.Description: CRM users can share their feedback on whether Zia's recommendations were helpful or not. The option to give feedback will be available as a responsive strip under each recommendation.

DetailsList.Title: Revamped Forecasting in Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description:
The following revamps are made in forecasts:
1. Create multiple and condition based forecasts across different periods.
2. Choose forecast type based on Deal Revenue or Deal Quantity.
3. Choose from the two newly added forecast category - Best Case and Committed Deals.
4. View transparent split of deals in your pipeline for optimal targets.
5. Create continuous forecasts with Zia's calculations and suggestions for targets, based on the historical data of the selected forecasts.
6. Compare different forecasts across years for deeper analysis.
7. Access archived forecasts and never lose forecasts from the past, or upon changing forecast configuration.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing Call Bar functionality for built-in telephony users
DetailsList.Description: View ongoing calls and calls that are queued in your organization using the new call bar popup.

DetailsList.Title: Enhancements and changes in Zoho Campaigns integration
DetailsList.Description:
The following changes and enhancements have been made to the Zoho Campaigns integration:
- Add Topics and the Lawful Basis of communications followed, while setting up a campaign.
- While sending a campaign for review, the ability to check details in the recipients list is enabled. This includes information, such as the number of users from CRM or Campaigns, number of contacts conflicting the topics, total number of eligible recipients, etc.
- If the topic conflicts while sending a campaign, a detailed count of conflicts for each topic can be checked.

DetailsList.Title: Enhancements for Motivator
DetailsList.Description: Create KPIs for email module, have custom dates for all date-based comparison options, and create dashboard components and TV channels with custom period options. Additionally, experience a new way for filtering achievement records.

DetailsList.Title: Tag records in sandbox
DetailsList.Description: The ability to add tags to records in sandbox is introduced. Users can ascribe tags onto records in testing environment and classify them without hampering the live setup.

DetailsList.Title: Upgrade of v2.1 API's PHP SDK to 6.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
1. Internal handling done for mandatory fields during the insert and update operations.
2. Supported Japan DC Environment.

DetailsList.Title: Adding custom colors in tags
DetailsList.Description: Besides the standard colors, tags can now be color coded with custom colors.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Shopify extension for Zoho CRM, Callingly for Zoho CRM, Schweizer for Zoho CRM, Twilio Extension for Zoho CRM and more.

DetailsList.Title: Support for multi-user lookup field
DetailsList.Description: Add and remove multiple users while creating sales record from the app.

DetailsList.Title: Zoho Lens for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: With the Zoho Lens Integration for Zoho CRM, initiate an instant or scheduled remote assistance session from the Contacts or Leads module. During a session, you will be able to guide your customer's sales queries or provide necessary instructions by viewing the live camera stream and using our whole range of annotation tools.

DetailsList.Title: Attach files to a record from Zoho WorkDrive
DetailsList.Description: Files or folders from Zoho WorkDrive can be attached to a record.

DetailsList.Title: Multilingual support with 20 languages for iOS Mobile App
DetailsList.Description:
Here is the list of supported languages.

DetailsList.Title: An option to cancel scheduled meetings
DetailsList.Description: Scheduled meetings can be cancelled from More Options in record details view.

DetailsList.Description: 1. Supported Japan DC Environment.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing translation option for additional values
DetailsList.Description: Translation options are now available for modules, subforms, and related lists, besides the existing options of picklist values and field names.

DetailsList.Title: Feature Limit Update: Zia notifications for Anomaly Detector component
DetailsList.Description:
The number of anomaly detector components, a user can subscribe to in order to receive notifications via Zia, has been increased.
Enterprise: 10 components
Ultimate: 30 components

DetailsList.Description:
1. Internal handling done for mandatory fields during insert and update operations.
2. Supported Japan DC Environment.

DetailsList.Description:
1. 'Record count' field handled as long datatype instead of a string datatype.
2. Internal handling done for mandatory fields during insert and update operations.

DetailsList.Description:

DetailsList.Description:
1. Supported Japan DC Environment.

DetailsList.Title: Add customers as Contact Users in projects
DetailsList.Description: When Projects are created in CRM, customers can be associated with the projects as Contact Users without access to the project portal. However, this association can be moderated between client user and contact user as and when required.

DetailsList.Title: Presenting CRM Webform Analytics Based on URL
DetailsList.Description: CRM now presents detailed page-wise analytics for every page where your web form could be published. You can view stats and charts for key parameters such as visits, submissions and region for each page tracked inside the CRM.

DetailsList.Title: Stay updated with alerts and anomalies on the go
DetailsList.Description: In addition to Zia notification panel, receive AI notifications from your organization on Zoho Cliq, Slack, and email to prioritize your work on the go.

DetailsList.Title: Admin Tools — An Interface for Configuration Management
DetailsList.Description: Admin Tools offers you an efficient interface to view a master list of configurations and delete the ones you don't need anymore.

DetailsList.Title: Share Records with Roles and Groups
DetailsList.Description: In private sharing, records can be shared with roles and groups, in addition to sharing with users.

DetailsList.Title: Import subform from your device
DetailsList.Description: Import subforms into records, add new entries or update existing entries, or both, based on unique IDs.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing advanced Lookup Filter
DetailsList.Description: Additional filters have been added to the lookup field popup to sort, filter, and choose desired value from the results at ease. Furthermore, columns can be added or removed as required.

DetailsList.Title: Zoho TeamInbox for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: The Zoho TeamInbox extension for Zoho CRM makes it easy to view and manage all your emails from Contacts and Leads. With this extension, your sales team can contact leads with context from their previous conversations.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: AdPage integration for Zoho CRM, BluText SMS for Zoho CRM,ABN Extension for Zoho CRM and more.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing Object Detection as part of Zia Vision
DetailsList.Description: In addition to validating images based on a complete match, Zia can now validate an image based on specific objects detected in it.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing Wizards in Sandbox
DetailsList.Description: Wizards is now available in Sandbox. Create wizards and test their performance in a secured sandbox environment and deploy them to production without hassle.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Tellephant's WhatsApp business API for Zoho CRM, Mailchimp Extension for Zoho CRM, Magento 2 for Zoho CRM and more

DetailsList.Description:

a. Assignment Rules
b. Email Templates

d. Inventory Templates
e. Pipeline

DetailsList.Title: Introducing criteria support in contributing modules for segmentation
DetailsList.Description: Criteria can be added to the contribution module to segment records at a granular level.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing Built-in Telephony in Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Build independent telephony system directly onto CRM organization. Buy and manage multiple phone numbers, configure incoming and outgoing call preferences, record calls, and download call reports without any third-party dependencies.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing Zia Recommendation Analytics
DetailsList.Description: Insights like total number of recommendations, number of active recommendations, record conversion rate, recommendation trends, products mostly recommended, and type of recommendations are shown to assess the effectiveness and adoption of these recommendations. The results will help optimize the recommendation configurations.

DetailsList.Title: Add styles into presets
DetailsList.Description: Styles applied on one canvas component can be added to presets and reapplied on other components.

DetailsList.Title: Add and reuse components in Canvas
DetailsList.Description: Desired components from one canvas template can be saved to reusable components and reused on other templates created for different modules.

DetailsList.Title: Bigin for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Bigin is a pipeline-centric CRM built to meet small business needs. With the Bigin extension for Zoho CRM, you can manage deals and tasks across modules of Bigin and Zoho CRM. Using this extension, you can make one-way changes in Bigin from within the Zoho CRM.

DetailsList.Title: Task, Calls, and Meetings to be separate modules
DetailsList.Description: Activities module is split into Tasks, Calls, and Meetings modules for ease of use and work.

DetailsList.Title: Better optimization of Records list in Modules
DetailsList.Description:
-Synchronization and download of records from server has been optimized for faster and better performance.
-Users can sort the records with the help of new custom view-specific sort by settings.
-Group by, Sort by, and Records section under module settings has been removed.
-Records will be automatically downloaded in the background without any user intervention.

DetailsList.Title: Settings for Nearby Pins
DetailsList.Description: Nearby pins can either be grouped or ungrouped with the help of user-specific settings provided in maps.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing failed action metrics and retry option in Workflow Report
DetailsList.Description: In the workflow reports, failed actions such as bounced emails, failed webhooks, and failed functions will be displayed with failure insights of the corresponding records. Option to manually retry those failed actions, exclude actions from retry, and include the previously excluded actions will also be provided.

DetailsList.Title: Enhancements in Scoring Rules
DetailsList.Description: In addition to Leads, Contacts, Accounts, and Deals, scoring rules can also be configured for Custom Modules. Also, touchpoint scores - positive and negative will not be displayed for Accounts, Deals, and Custom Modules.

DetailsList.Title: Enhancements in Zoho CRM Motivator
DetailsList.Description:
Zoho CRM Motivator has been enhanced to include UI-level improvements and customization options directed at helping you achieve better clarity with insights on your team's performance.
1. You can now add detailed KPI insights to your Motivator Dashboard by selecting component type (By user/Trend/Field).
2. You can now edit an ongoing game. The game data will automatically reflect changes in configuration.
3. At the UI level, a tab called "About" has been included in every component — KPI, Game, Target, Team — to easily display basic details about that particular component.

DetailsList.Title: Upload image from your device in Canvas editor
DetailsList.Description: In Canvas, images can be uploaded from the device and reused from the list of recently used images. Additionally, the image component is available as an element.

DetailsList.Title: Enhancement in Email Notifications
DetailsList.Description: Besides the "To" field, recipients can be added in "CC" and "BCC" fields in email notifications to trigger each of them as a single mass email.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Pipechat for Zoho CRM, Bulk SMS for Zoho CRM, Deal to Project converter for Zoho CRM,Stripe subscription management for Zoho CRM and more.

DetailsList.Title: Better optimization of Import
DetailsList.Description: Importing Leads and Contacts from device address book has been optimized for faster and better performance.

DetailsList.Title: BombBomb for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Record video messages, send to leads and contacts via email, and track the insights using BombBomb extension.

DetailsList.Title: Cancel action for Scheduled Meetings
DetailsList.Description: Scheduled meetings can be cancelled from more options in record details view.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing Merge Fields in Wizards
DetailsList.Description: In wizards, merge fields can be added to the text component and acknowledgement message to display relevant and personalized information.

DetailsList.Title: Upgradation of Node JS SDK to 5.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
Node JS SDK has been upgraded to version 5.0.0 and the following changes are made:
a. License has been added.
b. Minor SDK enhancements are made.

DetailsList.Title: Upgradation of Typescript SDK to version 4.0.0
DetailsList.Description: Typescript SDK is enhanced and the SDK initialization is made simple by reducing the required entities.

DetailsList.Title: Upgradation of JavaScript SDK to support v2.1 APIs to version 1.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
JavaScript SDK is updated to version 1.0.0 and the following enhancements are made:
1. Structural changes to aid the process of SDK configuration and initialization user.
2. The following APIs are supported:
a. Assignment Rules
b. Email Templates
c. Field Attachments
d. Inventory Templates
e. Pipeline
f. Send Email
g. Wizard

DetailsList.Title: Upgradation of Javascript SDK to version 3.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
Javascript SDK has been updated and the following enhancements were made:
-Support for custom functions API
-Support for multiple input types in parameter and header

DetailsList.Title: Upgradation of Ruby SDK to version 5.0.0
DetailsList.Description: Ruby SDK is upgraded to version 5.0.0 in which converter for value check has been added.

DetailsList.Title: Client Script
DetailsList.Description: Disable record accessibility for users who are associated with a record through the user look-up field. These users cannot access the record, yet continue to be a part of it as a reference or point of contact.

DetailsList.Title: Regulate record accessibility for user(s) added using the User fields
DetailsList.Description: Disable record accessibility for users who are associated with a record through the user look-up field. These users cannot access the record, yet continue to be a part of it as a reference or point of contact.

DetailsList.Title: Associate data from Subform to Templates
DetailsList.Description: Data from Subforms can be added to Email and Inventory templates.

DetailsList.Title: Save Templates as draft
DetailsList.Description: Save email and inventory templates as draft to modify as required before publishing.

DetailsList.Title: Regulate tickets' visibility in Zoho Desk Integration
DetailsList.Description: The visibility of Desk tickets in CRM records can be moderated to show tickets from all departments or only from departments in which the user is a part of.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Audit Tool for Zoho CRM, Zoho Vault 2 Zoho CRM, IndiaMart for Zoho CRM and more.

DetailsList.Title: Enhancements in Workflow for Calls
DetailsList.Description: When a workflow rule is configured for calls, the options ringing and attended for incoming and outgoing call triggers will be displayed only when a telephony provider is integrated with CRM.

DetailsList.Title: Adding Fiscal Year as a Grouping Parameter
DetailsList.Description: Besides the existing duration, fiscal year can be added as a parameter to group the dashboard components.

DetailsList.Title: Microsoft Sentiment Analysis for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Analyze and score customer reviews, social media comments, discussion forums, etc., as positive or negative sentiments and prioritize them accordingly.

DetailsList.Title: Data encryption for standard modules
DetailsList.Description: Data in all standard modules except Tasks, Calls, and Meetings can be encrypted.

DetailsList.Title: New components in User's Home Page
DetailsList.Description: New sign-ups will view the following additional components in their home page: My Open Deals, My Leads, My Untouched Deals, My Today's Calls, My Deals Closing this Month, and My Pipeline Deals by Stage.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing "Reporting to" field for reporting hierarchy
DetailsList.Description: A field called "Reporting To' will be automatically displayed in places where the user module fields are listed such as reports, criteria, filter, merge fields etc. if the organization's hierarchy is set as reporting.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing Data Storage Purchase Assist
DetailsList.Description: Purchase assist will show an estimated amount of data an org would require, depending on which additional storage can be purchased.

DetailsList.Title: View time left to exhaust storage space
DetailsList.Description: A popup will notify the orgs about the time left before they exhaust the data storage space.

DetailsList.Title: Icons to represent Zia notifications
DetailsList.Description: Zia notifications like predictions, anomalies, and recommendations are each denoted by new icons to represent the particular type of notifications and help with ease of interpretation.

DetailsList.Title: Organize notifications in the Zia Notifications Panel
DetailsList.Description: Organize Zia notifications by starring the important ones. Filter and mark them as as read in bulk. Furthermore, personalize the notification preferences to enable desktop notifications and choose to display only the unread notifications.

DetailsList.Title: Lite user support
DetailsList.Description: Users with 'Lite user license' can access and review the sales data right from the mobile app.

DetailsList.Title: Lite user support
DetailsList.Description: Users with 'Lite user license' can access and review the sales data right from the mobile app.

DetailsList.Title: Upgradation of Python SDK to support v2.1 APIs to version 1.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
Python SDK is updated to version 1.0.0 and the below mentioned enhancements were made:

  • Structural changes to aid the process of SDK configuration and initialization for the users.
  • The following APIs are supported:
    • a. Assignment Rules
    • b. Email Templates
    • c. Field Attachments
    • d. Inventory Templates
    • e. Pipeline
    • f. Send Email
    • g. Wizards

DetailsList.Title: Microsoft QnA Maker for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Create AI bots in Microsoft Cognitive Services and link them to Zoho CRM to quickly access and answer queries.

DetailsList.Description:
Node JS SDK is updated to version 1.0.0 and the below mentioned enhancements were made:

  • 1. Structural changes to aid the process of SDK configuration and initialization user.

    • a. Assignment Rules

DetailsList.Description:
C# SDK is updated to version 1.0.0 and the below mentioned enhancements were made:
