DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: HubSpot Sync for Zoho CRM, Intergrately for Zoho CRM, Aloware for Zoho CRM, TMetric for Zoho CRM, and more.

DetailsList.Title: Delete system defined dashboards and components
DetailsList.Description: Users with Manage Dashboard permission can delete system defined dashboards and components as per business requirement.

DetailsList.Title: Portals for Trial edition users
DetailsList.Description: Enterprise and Ultimate trial edition users can configure portal. A system-defined default portal will be created to which a maximum of 10 users can be invited.

DetailsList.Title: Enhancements in Portals
DetailsList.Description:
The following enhancements are available in Portal:
1. Portal user type UI is categorized into separate tabs: Configuration and Users.
2. Portal users can be filtered using criteria such as: active, confirmed, unconfirmed, and deactivated.
3. System-defined reasons for a failed invitation are available.
4. Portal URL can be edited as and when needed by the admin.
5. Related modules linked through multi-lookup field can be shared with portal users.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing bulk actions in Portals
DetailsList.Description: Actions such as inviting users, deactivating them, transferring users from one portal to another, re-inviting, activating and removing users from a portal can be performed in bulk to save time.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing common deployment logs in Sandbox
DetailsList.Description: View the changes deployed from all sandbox environments in one place under "Common Deployment Logs". Filter them using the sandbox name to quickly view the changes deployed from a particular environment.

DetailsList.Title: Feature Limit Update: Data Encryption
DetailsList.Description:
Number of fields that can be encrypted is increased:
Enterprise: 10 fields/module
Ultimate: 20 fields/module

DetailsList.Title: Use Service status field to filter records in Campaigns module
DetailsList.Description: The "Service status" field can be used to filter records based on recipients' response such as clicked, bounced, registered, etc. This field can be used for campaigns created on Zoho Survey, Zoho Backstage, Zoho Webinar, and Zoho Campaigns.

DetailsList.Title: Motivator available for Professional and above editions
DetailsList.Description:
Motivator available for Professional and above editions

Earlier Motivator was available only for Ultimate edition. Now, its extended for Professional and Enterprise editions too.

DetailsList.Title: PHP SDK Upgraded to 5.0.0 to support external ID and new APIs
DetailsList.Description:
Below mentioned changes were implemented:
1. The SDK initialization is made simple by reducing the required entities.
2. Supported external ID in records and related records.
3. Supported new contact role APIs.

DetailsList.Title: Upgradation of Java SDK to support v2.1 APIs to version 1.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
Java SDK is updated to version 1.0.0 and the below mentioned enhancements were made:

  • Structural changes to aid the process of SDK configuration and initialization for the users.
  • The following APIs are supported:
    • Assignment Rule
    • Email Templates
    • Field Attachments
    • Inventory Templates
    • Pipeline
    • Send Email
    • Wizards

DetailsList.Title: Label and Rename record URL attachments
DetailsList.Description: Record URL attachments can be labelled and renamed for easy identification of the attachments (e.g. https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/customer-requirement-template can be relabelled as Customer-Requirement-Template).

DetailsList.Title: ON24Webinar for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Use ON24Webinar to conduct virtual meetings and webcasts with customers.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Lead Finder for Zoho CRM, MsgBell for Zoho CRM, Slidecast for Zoho CRM, Karix SMS for Zoho CRM and more.

DetailsList.Title: Corporate Number for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Optimize the address information present in CRM by comparing with Internal Revenue Service (IRS) database.

DetailsList.Title: Sansan extension for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Synchronize and share information about business contacts among team members with ease.

DetailsList.Title: Integrate multiple telephony vendors with one CRM account
DetailsList.Description: Multiple telephony vendors can be integrated with single CRM organization account to ease region-wise vendor availability issues. During installation, admins can choose whether an installed vendor is to be used by "all" or "specific" users.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing Multiple Scoring Rules
DetailsList.Description: Score the same record using different criteria and touchpoints to get better insight. Also, understand the overall performance of the record across different processes through collective scores.

DetailsList.Title: View Uploaded files in the Import history
DetailsList.Description: Files uploaded during import can be viewed in the import history along with the file type, file name, and file size. Users can verify the number of migrated files versus the number of uploaded files.

DetailsList.Title: SDKs version 4.0.0 updated to reduce the number of required entities for initialization
DetailsList.Description: Earlier SDK initialization required 6 parameters to facilitate easy access to APIs. It is now reduced to 3 parameters: User Signature, Environment, and Token) to quicken the process. It is available for: Java, PHP, Python, and Ruby.

DetailsList.Title: Set a team logo in Motivator for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Give your team specific logos to provide better identification and relatability among members.

DetailsList.Title: Compare KPIs or Targets in Motivator
DetailsList.Description: Evaluate team, individual, company or time specific performance of KPI or Target parameters to know whether there is an increase or decrease.

DetailsList.Title: Change themes in Motivator for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Switch between light or dark theme using the toggle button to suit your viewing preference.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing Zone Analysis, a new Dashboard component
DetailsList.Description: Use Zone analysis to understand the business data that requires more attention and the one that is doing well with the help of comparative analysis between two parameters.

DetailsList.Title: Product Name and Vendor Name available for field based customizations
DetailsList.Description: Product Name and Vendor Name fields, in the respective modules, can be used while setting Layout rules and Validation rules. These fields can also be marked as "Unique".

DetailsList.Title: Package revamp of Scala SDK to version 1.0.0
DetailsList.Description:
Scala SDK is refurbished to version 1.0.0 and the below mentioned enhancements were made:
1. Addition of contact roles APIs.
2. Restructuring of configuration process to improve user-friendliness.
3. Records APIs and related records APIs upgraded to support external ID feature.
4. Removed mandatory check in external ID operations.
5. The SDK initialization is made simple by reducing the required entities.

DetailsList.Title: Subscribe to CRM editions from mobile app
DetailsList.Description: Users can now subscribe to the Standard, Professional, and Enterprise editions of Zoho CRM from the app settings.

DetailsList.Title: Better optimization of Nearby maps
DetailsList.Description: Plotting Leads, Contacts, and Accounts in nearby maps has been optimized for better user experience. Also, nearby pins will be grouped on zooming out a location on maps.

DetailsList.Title: Better optimization of user related lookup fields
DetailsList.Description: Search and selection of users from owner lookup field and user lookup field has been optimized for better user experience.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Text Messaging Cloud for Zoho CRM,ECB Euro Exchange Rates for Zoho CRM, ANAF Romania for Zoho CRM,Fishbowl for Zoho CRM and more.

DetailsList.Title: LinkedIn Sales Navigator to sunset
DetailsList.Description: On September 30th LinkedIn Sales Navigator extension will be sunset. New and existing users will not be allowed to download or use the extension after this time.

DetailsList.Title: Categorization of Bounce status in Zoho Campaigns integration
DetailsList.Description: Online campaigns created with Zoho Campaigns will be categorized as "Soft Bounced" and "Hard Bounced" instead of Bounced. This can be viewed under Recipient activity, Service status, SalesSignal, and Scoring Rules.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing Prediction Analytics
DetailsList.Description: Understand the analytics that Zia took into consideration to predict an outcome and make informed decisions to change the Prediction configuration to achieve more accurate outcomes.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing Color coding for Picklist values
DetailsList.Description:
Admins can ascribe colors to picklist values in Zoho CRM.
				The color coded values are displayed inside records, on module views, deal pipeline,charts and dashboards, etc., to provide distinction and interpret values at a glance.

DetailsList.Title: SDKs version 4.0.0 modified to reduce the number of required entities for initialization
DetailsList.Description: Earlier SDK initialization required 6 parameters to facilitate easy access to APIs. It is now reduced to 3 parameters: User Signature, Environment, and Token) to quicken the process. It is available for: Java, Node JS, and C#.

DetailsList.Title: Updates in the Latest Email Status filter options
DetailsList.Description: The Latest Email Status advanced filter will display a new option called "Responded", where records of all recipients who replied to the email will be captured. Also, "Opened and Not replied" is now renamed to "Opened and Not responded".

DetailsList.Title: Transform your CRM user experience using Canvas, now available for detail pages
DetailsList.Description: Recreate the CRM record detail page with no-code, easy-to-use design studio that compliments your business, industry, culture, and methods.

DetailsList.Title: Email Summary for Zia
DetailsList.Description: Emails can be summarized automatically by Zia, into a one line abstract. In addition, while viewing the summary, one can reply or forward the email, view or download attachments, get a print preview, and link the email to an existing CRM deal.

DetailsList.Title: Subform fields supported in Map Dependency
DetailsList.Description: Picklist fields from the subforms can be used to create map dependency. Earlier, only fields from the layout were allowed.

DetailsList.Title: Conditional rules and Acknowledgement text in Wizards
DetailsList.Description: Rules can be added to the screens with condition to show fields, show subforms or mark fields as mandatory whenever the condition is satisfied. In addition, an acknowledgement text can be configured and displayed for users on saving of record.

DetailsList.Title: New metrics and charts in Webform Analytics
DetailsList.Description: The individual form analytics will display abandon rate in submissions and average time spent. In the Field based analysis, metrics like: Time Spent on fields, Field correction rate, Field Drop rate, and Field filled order will be available. In addition, submission based on the Device source will be available.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing import of users to CRM
DetailsList.Description: Multiple users can be imported or their existing details can be updated in CRM. Fields like roles and profiles can be included in the import file and associated with the record using the role or profile name or id.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing HIPAA Compliance in mobile
DetailsList.Description: HIPAA compliant fields will be displayed in mobile app along with the option to encrypt the mobile app database.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing Authorization types in Webhooks
DetailsList.Description: New Authorization types - General and Connection can be used to append the Webhook URL. General allows to manually append static authorization like Authtoken, API keys, etc.. in the URL parameters. Connection can be used to migrate existing webhooks in Authtoken to connection to OAuth and also create new ones.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing Header and Body structure in Webhook URL parameter
DetailsList.Description: The webhook URL is divided into header and body parameters. The header parameter includes module and custom parameters where users, org, parameter details etc. are included. The body parameter includes information about the trigger to other application which can be added using the options: None, Form-data, and Raw data.

DetailsList.Title: PHP SDK version 2.2.4 is upgraded to handle null values in Inventory Line Items
DetailsList.Description: The PHP SDK supported to upgrade null values in the Inventory Line Items.

DetailsList.Title: New Request Methods in Webhooks
DetailsList.Description: New request methods like PUT and DELETE are added to the Webhooks in addition to the existing methods (GET and POST). These request methods will update or delete a field value of an existing record.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing multiple Sandbox accounts
DetailsList.Description: Create multiple Sandbox environments to test different configurations in individual accounts. In addition, Sandbox accounts can be populated with CRM data or sample data for testing purpose.

DetailsList.Title: Color coding picklist fields in Meetings
DetailsList.Description: Values of picklist fields can be color coded for the ease of identification. The color coded values will be displayed in the calendar view, list view, related lists, and all relevant places where the meeting values are displayed. Admins can color code values for the org and individual users can also customize the colors according to their preferences.

DetailsList.Title: Trigger automation and process management on imported records
DetailsList.Description: During import the option to trigger automation and process management related configurations has been included. All workflows, blueprint, assignment rule etc. will apply to the imported records based on the criteria, if any.

DetailsList.Title: AliyunSMS for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Get connected right away with Aliyun SMS in Zoho CRM

DetailsList.Title: Python SDK version 2.0.14 has been fixed to handle "invalid request_body" error
DetailsList.Description:
Python SDK version 2.0.14 has been fixed to handle "invalid request_body" error

The recurring problem of "invalid request_body" error in previous version has been improved.

DetailsList.Title: SDKs version 3.0.0 upgraded to remove the mandatory check in External IDs
DetailsList.Description: Earlier, SDKs contained a mandatory check for External IDs in the inventory modules. Since 'ID' is already present as a mandatory field in these module, this mandatory check has been removed from the following versions: Java, PHP, Node JS, C#, Python, and Ruby.

DetailsList.Title: Java SDK version 4.0.1 is upgraded to handle OAuth Token
DetailsList.Description: Earlier, a new ID was generated every time OAuth was refreshed. Now, ID will be generated only when the OAuth field is null.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: SpreadsheetWeb for Zoho CRM, Spin The Wheel for Zoho CRM, Ezeetel for Zoho CRM, CF7 Integration With Zoho CRM and more.

DetailsList.Title: Bisnode for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Keep your business contacts synchronized between Bisnode and Zoho CRM.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing color coding of Tags
DetailsList.Description: CRM records can be differentiated and easily identified by color coding the tags. The background color for the tags can be chosen from a predefined set of colors.

DetailsList.Title: Assign record owner through Workflow
DetailsList.Description: A record can be ascribed an owner via workflow rule when the defined condition is satisfied. Records can be assigned to users, roles, users who create or modify records, or to those mentioned in the Assignment rule criteria.

DetailsList.Title: Support for Contact Role APIs in TypeScript SDK version 2.0.0
DetailsList.Description: TypeScript SDK has been upgraded to support Contact Role APIs. Also, the mandatory check in External ID has been removed from this version.

DetailsList.Title: Supporting Translations in Sandbox
DetailsList.Description: Translations can be tested in the Sandbox environment before deployment. Language files can be translated, imported, deleted, enabled, and deactivated in the Sandbox setup.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing HIPAA Compliance in mobile
DetailsList.Description: HIPAA compliant fields will be displayed in mobile app along with the option to encrypt the mobile app database.

DetailsList.Title: Several SDKs in version 2.0.0 are updated to support External ID in records and related records
DetailsList.Description: External ID will now support the string data type. Also, external IDs will be supported in both records and related records API in the following: Java, PHP, Node JS , C#, Python, and Ruby.

DetailsList.Title: Attaching files from other Cloud Drives
DetailsList.Description: Files can be attached from Google Drive, Box, and OneDrive directly onto the record. The attached files will be available in the Attachment related list of a record.

DetailsList.Title: State and Transition limits increased in CommandCenter
DetailsList.Description: Number of states that can be created is increased from 50 to 70. Number of transitions that can be included in a journey is increased to 110.

DetailsList.Title: UI enhancement in CRM calendar
DetailsList.Description: The aesthetics of CRM calendar is updated. The Day, Week, Month view, and the navigation arrowheads are enclosed in a blue capsule-like outline. The number of user activities will display the activity count on top of the profile image of the users. The rows are alternatively shaded. The outbound call icon is removed from the call activity.

DetailsList.Title: View contact references in Zia recommendation
DetailsList.Description: Zia will show the names and details of other customers who have purchased a similar product. This will help the sales reps to further substantiate the recommended result to a new customer.

DetailsList.Title: Zoho Contracts for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Generate and manage business contracts from the CRM account.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Google Drive for Zoho CRM, EasyPost for Zoho CRM, DataSync for Hubspot and Zoho CRM, Saino SMS for Zoho CRM, and more.

DetailsList.Title: Multi-currency extended to all paid editions
DetailsList.Description: Multi-currencies can be set for Standard, Professional, Enterprise, and Ultimate editions. Also, limits for Enterprise and Ultimate editions are increased to 25 and 50 respectively.

DetailsList.Title: Contact role APIs supported in PHP SDK 1.0.0
DetailsList.Description: PHP SDK is enhanced to support contact role APIs

DetailsList.Title: GoCardless for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Say goodbye to late payments forever. Get paid on time, every time.

DetailsList.Title: Zoho Assist for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: nitiate remote sessions instantly from Zoho CRM by integrating with Zoho Assist.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Zefix Firmenabfrage for Zoho CRM, GoCardless for Zoho CRM, DataSync Application for Monday and Zoho CRM and more.

DetailsList.Title: Display of Map Dependency picklist fields in subform
DetailsList.Description: Subform picklist fields used for establishing map dependency will be displayed in the app.

DetailsList.Title: Display of Map Dependency picklist fields in subform
DetailsList.Description: Subform picklist fields used for establishing map dependency will be displayed in the app.

DetailsList.Title: New actions for Scheduled Calls
DetailsList.Description: Scheduled calls can be Rescheduled, Marked as completed or Cancelled from the record's detail page.

DetailsList.Title: Package revamp of several SDKs to version 1.0.0
DetailsList.Description: The below mentioned SDKs are revamped and renamed as 'zohocrmsdk-2-0' to enhance the functioning of APIs: Java, Node JS, C#, Python, JS, Ruby, and TypeScript.

DetailsList.Title: PHP SDK Version 4.0.0 restructured to support v2.1 APIs and enhance configuration process
DetailsList.Description: PHP SDK upgraded to support the new v2.1 APIs and aid SDK configuration and initialization user-friendly.

DetailsList.Title: Enhancement to fix an existing file processing bug in TypeScript Version 1.1.1
DetailsList.Description: PHP SDK Improved to fix an existing bug that caused "Cannot read property 'hasOwnProperty'" error due to improper file processing in Windows OS.

DetailsList.Title: Enhancement to support new APIs in PHP SDK Version 4.0.0
DetailsList.Description: PHP SDK improved to support the following new APIs such as Assignment Rules, Templates, Send Mail and Pipeline APIs.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing Zia Reasoning in Assignment Rules
DetailsList.Description: Zia will now display the fields, criteria, and parameters used by it to assign record owners. Admins can disable or enable the contributing fields to enhance Zia's owner suggestion skills.

DetailsList.Title: Unique fields used to find similar records
DetailsList.Description: During lead conversion unique fields from Contacts and Accounts will be used to find similar records in addition to the system-defined fields of the Leads module.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing Single Sign-in For Multiple Orgs
DetailsList.Description: The multi-org functionality makes it simpler to login to multiple CRM accounts using single credential across all accounts. CRM users get to be part of multiple accounts through invitation.

DetailsList.Title: Campaign Member Status Supported in Copy Customization
DetailsList.Description: While copying the customizations from one CRM account to another, the Campaign Member Status can also be copied.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing Business Holiday and other enhancements for holidays
DetailsList.Description: Introducing common holiday list for all users across organization called "Business Holidays" that is applied to all users of the org irrespective of the time zone and shifts they work. In addition, users can clone holiday lists.

DetailsList.Title: Important enhancements in Blueprint
DetailsList.Description:
-SLA’s configured for a blueprint state will be notified under record’s detail view.
-Validate fields from primary and related blueprint module in blueprint during transition.
-Perform custom actions using widgets during transition.
-Attachments can be uploaded from mobile during transition.
-Strike off checklists during transition from mobile app.
-Execute continuous blueprint from mobile app without any pause.
-Automatic transitions will be executed automatically in mobile app.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing quick actions under More
DetailsList.Description: Quick actions like Launch Zia, Rearrange Modules, Search Modules, Send Feedback, View Notifications, and Launch Settings are provided under the More option.

DetailsList.Title: HIPAA Compliance with Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Zoho CRM offers features that can be used by organizations to abide by HIPAA rules and regulations.

DetailsList.Title: Create record through workflow scheduled action
DetailsList.Description: Creating record automatically through workflow rule was previously available for instant actions. Now it is available for scheduled action too.

DetailsList.Title: More options in Territory APIs
DetailsList.Description: Using the new set of territory APIs, you can assign, remove, and retrieve the details of territories assigned to Leads, Accounts, Contacts, or Deals.

DetailsList.Title: HIPAA Compliance
DetailsList.Description: New keys related to HIPAA compliance are introduced in Organization API and Fields Metadata API. HIPAA compliance settings allow you to limit access to sensitive health data via APIs.

DetailsList.Title: Supporting External ID field in server and client side languages in following versions (PHP SDK 3.1.0, Node JS SDK 1.1.0, and C# SDK 3.1.0)
DetailsList.Description: External ID field is a custom single line field in a CRM module that can hold a record's unique ID in an external system. It is now supported in the following SDK languages: PHP SDK (3.1.0), Node JS SDK (1.1.0), C# SDK (3.1.0), JavaScript (1.1.0), Java SDK (3.1.0), Ruby SDK (2.1.0), Scala SDK (1.1.0), TypeScript SDK (1.1.0)

DetailsList.Title: Upgrade to Support carry over tags in JavaScript Version 1.1.0
DetailsList.Description: JavaScript SDK enhanced to support carry over tags while converting leads. The carry over tags are those that you choose to carry over while converting the qualified leads to contacts, accounts and deals.

DetailsList.Title: Scala SDK Version 1.1.0 restructured to fix null pointer exception
DetailsList.Description: The null pointer exception that showed error due to no redirect url for self-clients in the previous version has been rectified in this version.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM

DetailsList.Title: New placement for custom button
DetailsList.Description: In addition to the existing locations, a new location for Wizards has been introduced. These buttons can be exclusively used inside Wizards.

DetailsList.Title: Supporting carry over tags in Node JS SDK Version 1.0.4
DetailsList.Description: Node JS SDK will facilitate carry over of tags upon lead conversion.

DetailsList.Title: Supporting date related fields in TypeScript SDK Version 1.0.2
DetailsList.Description: TypeScript SDK can determine date related fields and modify the object accordingly. For instance, a timestamp response will be converted to the DateTime object while a simple Date field response will be converted to Date object.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing TypeScript SDK Version 1.0.1
DetailsList.Description: Launching TypeScript SDK managing your CRM data.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing Scala SDK Version 1.0.0
DetailsList.Description: Launching Scala SDK to manage your CRM data.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: GoToConnect Additional Resources for Zoho CRM, Leaflet for Zoho CRM, Ship Station Order Management for Zoho CRM and more.

DetailsList.Title: Review and validate fields
DetailsList.Description: Review and validate field entries in the Review process from the mobile app.

DetailsList.Title: Smart View as Default View
DetailsList.Description: Smart View will be enabled by default in the Add Forms.

DetailsList.Title: Description field height is increased
DetailsList.Description: The height of the Description field is increased in the Add and Edit Forms.

DetailsList.Title: Copy Notes from View Notes Screen
DetailsList.Description: Notes can be copied from the view notes screen to the clipboard.

DetailsList.Title: Option to 'Assign' records in Related List
DetailsList.Description: Associate records in bulk to a related list with the help of the "Assign" option.

DetailsList.Title: Wizards now support Custom Buttons
DetailsList.Description: Create custom buttons to perform actions such as fetching data from a CRM module, third party application or other Zoho apps.

DetailsList.Title: Customization of Deal Stage History for paid editions
DetailsList.Description: Customization of columns in Stage History is now available for all paid editions (earlier it was available for Enterprise and above). Users with Module customization permission can add, remove, and reorder columns in Stage History related list.

DetailsList.Title: Categorization and filtering of Zia notifications
DetailsList.Description: Notifications will be categorized in to two groups: Workflow Rules and Anomaly Component to bring clear distinction. Also, notifications from different mediums such as competitor alert, prediction, conversation AI, prediction, etc. can be quickly found using the filter option.

DetailsList.Title: Tags added to Leads carried over during conversion
DetailsList.Description: Any tags associated with the lead can be carried over to the respective account, contact or deal when converted using Workflow.

DetailsList.Title: Multi-user and multi-select lookup fields supported in Blueprints
DetailsList.Description: During Transition you can use multi-select lookup fields as well as multi-user fields. These fields can be mandated but cannot be validated.

DetailsList.Title: Blueprint now supports Widgets
DetailsList.Description: Perform custom actions, such as locating an address on a map, blocking a date on a calendar and more via Blueprint using Widgets. Widgets can be used in the During Transition settings.

DetailsList.Title: Automatic Transitions in Blueprint
DetailsList.Description: Use automatic transition to prevent delays and discontinuity of a process. The automatic transition will ensure that records move to the destination state after a specified "Wait" time has elapsed.

DetailsList.Title: Resolved Oauth expiry_time_error in PHP SDK Version 3.0.3
DetailsList.Description: PHP SDK is upgraded to resolve the Oauth expiry_time_error that occurred in few PHP versions.

DetailsList.Title: V2.1 APIs - New version of CRM APIs
DetailsList.Description: Some most-requested and interesting updates are included. For instance: fetching the assignment rules configured in your org, getting the email and inventory templates present in a module, getting the details of different wizards in a layout, etc.

DetailsList.Title: Seikyu Kanri Robo for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Export invoices and billing information from Zoho CRM.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: BulkGate SMS for Zoho CRM, Maqsam for Zoho, OpenCart for Zoho CRM and more.

DetailsList.Title: Products line item is available as Subform<
DetailsList.Description: The product line item in all the Inventory modules is changed to a subform. Users can customize it to suit their business need.

DetailsList.Title: Feature Limit Update: Webhook
DetailsList.Description:
Webhook limit in Workflow is increased:
Enterprise edition: 50,000 calls/day
Ultimate edition: 1,000,000 calls/day

DetailsList.Title: Workflow rule execution upon field update is clubbed with the Edit option
DetailsList.Description: As field updates are equivalent to modifications made to a record, it is now moved under the Edit option as "Specific fields gets modified". Users can define the field and the desired value to execute the rule upon update of a field.

DetailsList.Title: UI enhancement in Date or time based workflow trigger
DetailsList.Description: The date/time based trigger contains labels for each time/date based configuration for easy comprehension and better clarity.

DetailsList.Title: Support for "Request" parameters in custom button for "List view - Utility View" position
DetailsList.Description:
Support for "Request" parameters in custom button for "List view - Utility View" position

Data from fields, headers, parameters, file content, and body can be extracted while writing functions. This will be helpful to capture the cvid, pageno, modulename, and module displayname.

DetailsList.Title: Enhancement to support carry over tags in PHP SDK Version 3.0.2
DetailsList.Description: I PHP SDK enhanced to support carry over tags while converting leads. The carry over tags are those that you choose to carry over while converting the qualified leads to contacts, accounts and deals.

DetailsList.Title: Upgrade to support PSR4 standard and connection time out in PHP SDK Version 3.0.2
DetailsList.Description: PHP SDK improved to support connection timeout and followed PSR4 Standards. PSR4 standard describes specification for autoloading classes from file paths.

DetailsList.Title: Restructuring SDK in Ruby SDK Version 2.0.0
DetailsList.Description: Ruby SDK is upgraded to allow easy access to all the components and implementation of wrapper classes (SDKException, StreamWrapper) etc.

DetailsList.Title: Better optimization of contacts listing
DetailsList.Description: Listing contacts from the address book during import, composing emails etc. has been optimized to be faster.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing JavaScript SDK Version 1.0.0
DetailsList.Description: Launching JavaScript SDK to manage your CRM data.

DetailsList.Title: Alert displayed on hitting the back button in the App
DetailsList.Description: User will be alerted with a display message on hitting the back button in the app for exiting.

DetailsList.Title: Get alerted whenever prospects mention competitors companies in email
DetailsList.Description: Configure Zia Competitor Alert to receive alerts through Cliq, Slack, and Zia notification to learn which of your prospects are discussing about the competitors.

DetailsList.Title: Visual identification of a deal state
DetailsList.Description: State of a deal at a respective stage will be denoted by thumbs up or thumbs down icon to show its won or lost state respectively

DetailsList.Title: Forecast type renamed and mapped with Forecast category
DetailsList.Description: Forecast type in stage probability mapping is renamed to Deal category. It will also be used to determine the current state of a deal. Also, deal category will be mapped with the appropriate forecast category automatically.

DetailsList.Title: Filter deals using deal category
DetailsList.Description: The stage criteria will display deal states: won, lost, and open, using which the deals can be easily filtered.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing new home page view: Manager's Home Page
DetailsList.Description: An exclusive home page called "Manager's Home" for users at reporting roles to track and analyze theirs and their subordinates data. This view will be available only for roles that have subroles under them.

DetailsList.Title: UI enhancements across dashboards
DetailsList.Description: User interface of dashboards has been updated with the following: resizing of KPI components, changes in the background grid size, and an illustration is added when there is no available data.

DetailsList.Title: Number of data in custom view components increased
DetailsList.Description: The number of rows displayed in the custom component in a user's home page is increased from 5 to 10.

DetailsList.Title: Create subform in Inventory Modules
DetailsList.Description: Add a custom subform to the Inventory modules to store details about quotes, invoices, and orders.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: WhatsApp Hub for Zoho CRM, Voxloud for Zoho CRM, LogixOne B2B Portal for Zoho CRM and more.

DetailsList.Title: iOS 14 compatibility
DetailsList.Description: The mobile app is now compatible with iOS 14. Use the Wind down shortcuts to quickly check upcoming schedules.

DetailsList.Title: Primary field of a layout rule available as trigger in other layout rules
DetailsList.Description: The field set as the primary field for a layout rule, can further be included in the "Show Field and "Set Mandatory Fields" actions in other layout rules.

DetailsList.Title: Update picklist field with 'None' value
DetailsList.Description: Picklist fields that are not mandatory can be updated as 'None' through automatic field updates in CommandCenter, Workflow, Blueprint, and Actions.

DetailsList.Title: Module views UI enhancement
DetailsList.Description:
User-interface for list view, Kanban view, and Canvas have been revamped with the following changes:
- The smart filter in list view and Kanban view can be expanded/collapsed
- The create and import record buttons are grouped together.
- Wrap/clip text options to manage alignment of text within fields.

DetailsList.Title: Introducing Remote Sales Office
DetailsList.Description: Remote Sales Office, a bundle of two applications: Zoho Cliq and Zoho Meeting is exclusively designed to help organizations manage their remote teams. It can be purchased from CRM and is also available for a 15-day trial.

DetailsList.Title: Remove system-defined fields – Currency and Exchange Rate from a layout
DetailsList.Description: System-defined Currency and Exchange Rate fields can be removed if a layout that does not any custom currency field. These fields will automatically be added if a custom currency field is inserted to the layout.

DetailsList.Title: Access to Allowed IP Addresses moved from CRM to Zoho Directory
DetailsList.Description: Once configured, the allowed IP addresses was displayed under Setup > User and Control > Users. It is now removed and can be viewed or accessed only from Zoho Directory.

DetailsList.Title: Web tabs available for portal users
DetailsList.Description: Web tabs can be shared with portal users with View permission to allow them access from within CRM.

DetailsList.Title: Products line items as subforms in the inventory modules
DetailsList.Description: The products line items has been changed to subforms in all the Inventory modules to be in sync with the web version.

DetailsList.Title: Supporting multiple extension and SSL verification toggle in PHP SDK Version 3.0.1
DetailsList.Description: PHP SDK enhanced to support SSL verification toggle and multiple extensions in API Response headers.

DetailsList.Title: C# SDK: ZCRMSDK - VERSION 3.0.1
DetailsList.Description: Some most-requested and interesting updates are included. For instance: fetching the assignment rules configured in your org, getting the email and inventory templates present in a module, getting the details of different wizards in a layout, etc.

DetailsList.Title: Supporting Number data type in PHP SDK Version 3.0.1and Node JS SDK Version 1.0.2
DetailsList.Description: Number data type in upgraded to identify if a certain field is an integer or long data type.

DetailsList.Title: Resolved cyclic import issue and null value handling in Node JS SDK Version 1.0.3
DetailsList.Description: Node JS SDK improved to resolve cyclic import issue. An issue that occurs when 2 or more modules reference each other.

DetailsList.Title: Enhancement to handle null values in Node JS SDK Version 1.0.3<
DetailsList.Description: Node JS SDK enhanced to handle null values in the request body without causing any error.

DetailsList.Title: Number data type identification in C# SDK Version 3.0.1
DetailsList.Description: C# SDK is upgraded to identify if a certain Number data type is integer or long data type.

DetailsList.Title: Auto-number field modified to string data in Java SDK Version 3.0.1
DetailsList.Description: Auto-number field type is modified to string data type to facilitate prefix access. Earlier auto-number field was a long data type field.

DetailsList.Title: Option to Search Inventory Templates
DetailsList.Description: Templates can be searched within the Inventory modules using the search option.

DetailsList.Title: Products line items as subforms in the inventory modules
DetailsList.Description: The products line items has been changed to subforms in all the Inventory modules to be in sync with the web version.

DetailsList.Title: Sign Extension for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Use this extension to send business documents in PDF format to the leads or contacts for digital signature.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: IndiaMart Extension for Zoho CRM, Consulta CNPJ Extension for Zoho CRM,Exitty softphone Extension for Zoho CRM and more.

DetailsList.Title: Sharing a record as Public
DetailsList.Description: A record can be shared as public with all users in the organization. Besides this, feed notifications can be sent when the record is shared privately.

DetailsList.Title: Classify records in Campaigns module based on the integration
DetailsList.Description: When integrated with Zoho Backstage, Zoho Campaigns, Zoho Survey or Zoho Webinar, a new field will be introduced in the Campaigns module called "Integration Type". This read-only field will help users to filter records and it can also be used in blueprint, workflow rules, etc.

DetailsList.Title: Lock custom views to restrict modifications
DetailsList.Description: Users with whom a custom view is shared can be restricted from modifying it further by locking it. Admins and users with 'Manage View' permission can lock the custom views.

DetailsList.Title: Edit records using the Wizard layout
DetailsList.Description: Records that are created through Wizard can be edited using the Wizard layout.

DetailsList.Title: Use system defined journeys – Command Center
DetailsList.Description:
The following journeys will be available for users by default when they sign up or when they upgrade to edition that support Command Center:
1. Qualify Leads through call
2. Qualify Leads through email

DetailsList.Title: Segmentation
DetailsList.Description: View segmentation scores of records in your mobile app.

DetailsList.Title: Character limit for Webhook URL increased
DetailsList.Description: Earlier the "URL to notify" field in Webhooks had a character limit of 200, now it is increased to 300.

DetailsList.Title: Python SDK: ZCRMSDK - VERSION 2.0.12
DetailsList.Description:
Issue Fix:
Fixed the "KeyError" in the Get Users operation.

DetailsList.Title: Restructuring SDK in Node JS SDK Version 1.0.0
DetailsList.Description: Node JS SDK is restructured to allow easy access to all the components, implementation of wrapper classes (SDKException, StreamWrapper) etc.

DetailsList.Title: Supporting File Paths across OS in Node JS SDK Version 1.0.1
DetailsList.Description: Node JS SDK is enhanced to support File Paths across operating systems: Mac, Windows, and Linux.

DetailsList.Title: Restructuring of SDK in C# SDK Version 3.0.0
DetailsList.Description: C# SDK is restructured to allow easy access to all the components, implementation of wrapper classes (SDKException, StreamWrapper) etc.

DetailsList.Title: Optimization of Notes
DetailsList.Description: Creating text and voice notes has been optimized for faster and better performance.

DetailsList.Title: Control address information with Maps Consent Settings
DetailsList.Description: Separate Consent alerts will be displayed for Near me maps, Check-in location access, and Map locator for record's address. These settings will allow sharing of address information with map providers.

DetailsList.Title: Mobile Sign-up for China DC
DetailsList.Description: Sign-up to China DC from the mobile app.

DetailsList.Title: Option to switch to China DC
DetailsList.Description: Switch between Unites States and China data centres without changing the device's language.

DetailsList.Title: Control address information with Maps Consent Settings
DetailsList.Description: Separate Consent alerts will be displayed for Near me maps, Check-in location access, and Map locator for record's address. These settings will allow sharing of address information with map providers.

DetailsList.Title: Alert on storage limit
DetailsList.Description: The app will pop an alert if the storage data reaches its limit and will prevent the user from adding new records once the limit is reached.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Whatsapp and Instagram integration by Wazzup, 99 Acres Extension, Pipedream Extension and more.

DetailsList.Title: Get notified about insufficient data in the notification panel – Zia Prediction Builder
DetailsList.Description: If number of records is less than 200, then prediction will not be made and Zia will display "Waiting for data". This will be notified through Zia notification as well as in the prediction detail page.

DetailsList.Title: View prediction summary and other details
DetailsList.Description: Module for which prediction is created, the custom field that will display the prediction results, Zia's learning score, contributing fields, and prediction probability will be shown in the prediction details page. Also, if record count is less than 200 then you will notice "Waiting for data" option.

DetailsList.Title: Sync Products module during Desk Integration
DetailsList.Description: During Desk integration you can sync the Products module too. Earlier, only Contacts and Accounts modules could be synced.

DetailsList.Title: Using Secondary Email field to avoid duplicate in Desk integration
DetailsList.Description: In addition to primary email address, the secondary email address can also be used to identify duplicate records in CRM and Desk.

DetailsList.Title: Visual enhancement in the Setup page
DetailsList.Description: The Setup page heading and the search bar are aligned to the left. The sections have borders around them.

DetailsList.Title: Upgrade edition from CRM profile
DetailsList.Description: The Upgrade Edition link will be available in the Profile menu in the CRM account.

DetailsList.Title: In-app notification for mobile app update
DetailsList.Description: Update your mobile app to the latest version by directly clicking on the notification.

DetailsList.Title: Setting External ID fields in a module
DetailsList.Description: Use field properties to make a single line field into an external field. For a record, the external field can capture information stored in third-party applications. The external ID can be used to upsert API call to search, create, update or delete records.

DetailsList.Title: Chat with record owners via Cliq
DetailsList.Description: Quickly communicate with the record owners (CRM users) over chat, audio call and video calls via Cliq.

DetailsList.Title: Change in Mail Merge limits
DetailsList.Description: Professional, Enterprise and Ultimate edition users can perform 1000 merges/month/org. Additional merges (upto 4000) can be purchased. These limits apply to the mail merge action and print preview action (only while using the mail merge template).

DetailsList.Title: 'None' state in blueprint can be deleted
DetailsList.Description: The 'None' state in Blueprint can be deleted like any other state. Once deleted, it will be listed under the 'Available states' in the 'Info and States' section.

DetailsList.Title: Enter dates in Auto number fields
DetailsList.Description: Dates can be entered in the auto number fields in the desired format, {DD}, {MM}or {MM}{DD}{YY} or more. To enter the dates you need to type # or { in the prefix or suffix fields.

DetailsList.Title: Mandatory quick create forms for new account creation
DetailsList.Description: New accounts creation from the lookup fields present in the Contacts, Accounts, Deals, Quotes, Sales Order, Invoices, and Cases modules can be done only by filling the quick create form.

DetailsList.Title: Workflow rules standard edition update
DetailsList.Description:
The following actions are now supported in the standard edition:
1. Field Update Trigger
2. Delete trigger
3. Field update action
4. Email recipient in alert`

DetailsList.Title: Allow feed notifications for actions occurring automatically
DetailsList.Description: Select the 'Send notifications' option in the Feeds Preference to get notified when records are created, updated or deleted through automation (APIs, Functions, and Integration).

DetailsList.Title: Check the accuracy of the image validation model
DetailsList.Description: You can evaluate the accuracy of the models by uploading some test images. The model will validate the image based on the training data. Based on the test results the model can be trained for correctness.

DetailsList.Title: Zia Recommendation for portal users
DetailsList.Description: Portal users can view recommendations in their portal accounts. The admins can choose a type of recommendation for the portal users. Based on the model Zia will give suggestions.

DetailsList.Title: Hyperlink support for the text fields
DetailsList.Description: If a text field has hyperlinked content, it would take the user to the respective page upon tapping the URL/ hyperlinked text.

DetailsList.Title: Customize the type of recommendations
DetailsList.Description: Types of recommendations are classified into: First time, repeat, relationship, bundle, and sequence. Admins can edit the names according to their business requirement.

DetailsList.Title: CommandCenter in Sandbox and Copy Customization
DetailsList.Description: CommandCenter can be tried in Sandbox before pushing to production account. It can also be copied while performing Copy Customization.

DetailsList.Title: Update in Workflow rules for standard and professional editions
DetailsList.Description:
Following options in Workflow rules are now available for standard edition:
1. Using Field update to execute a rule and in instant and scheduled actions.
2. Trigger upon delete of a record.
3. Sending email to other recipients present in the related module or module.
4. Execution on a Date/Time.
5. Creating Scheduled actions.

DetailsList.Title: Clean-up tool and other updates in data storage
DetailsList.Description: Clean up tool helps clear junk leads, empty recycle bin and remove untouched records. Users will be notified when the data storage limit is exhausted.

DetailsList.Title: Buttons get a new look
DetailsList.Description: Buttons across CRM have been revamped. The new buttons have rounded edges, gradient colors, touch feel, and 3D view. The color of the hyperlink has been modified as well.

DetailsList.Title: Restructuring of SDK in PHP SDK Version 3.0.0
DetailsList.Description: PHP SDK is restructured to allow easy access to all the components, implementation of wrapper classes (SDKException, StreamWrapper) etc.

DetailsList.Title: Restructuring of SDK in Java SDK Version 3.0.0
DetailsList.Description: Java SDK is restructured allow easy access to all the components, implementation of wrapper classes (SDKException, StreamWrapper) etc.

DetailsList.Title: Alert on storage limit
DetailsList.Description: A popup alert will be shown if the storage data reaches its limit to prevent users from adding new records.

DetailsList.Title: Actionable Hyperlinks in the Description Field
DetailsList.Description: Navigate to the respective page by tapping the hyperlinked text in the description field.

DetailsList.Title: Identifying Duplicate Field Entries on Saving a Record
DetailsList.Description: Duplicate fields will be shown near the respective fields during add, edit, and clone when a record is saved.

DetailsList.Title: Hyperlink support for the text fields
DetailsList.Description: If a text field has hyperlinked content, it would take the user to the respective page upon tapping the URL/ hyperlinked text.

DetailsList.Title: Set preferred timezone
DetailsList.Description: Set your preferred timezone from the mobile app from: CRM app settings > Timezone > Set preferred timezone.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Email and Phone Checker, eClassifieds , importUser and more.

DetailsList.Title: MegaMeeting for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Schedule or conduct instant meetings with screen sharing from CRM using the MegaMeeting extension.

DetailsList.Title: ClickMeeeting for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Organize meetings, send invitations, and meeting links from CRM using ClickMeeeting.

DetailsList.Title: StarLeaf for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Schedule or conduct instant online meetings with screen sharing from CRM using the StarLeaf extension. Track the meetings in the record's activity history.

DetailsList.Title: Feature limit update: Workflow rules
DetailsList.Description:
Workflow rules per org: 2500
2500 (maximum 2000 active rules)
Execution limit/org: 50
Workflow rules per module:
Free - 10 (maximum 5 active)
Standard - 30 (maximum 15 active)
Professional - 80 (maximum 40 active)
Enterprise- 125 (maximum 75 active)
Ultimate - 150 (maximum 100 active)

DetailsList.Title: In-app notification for mobile app update
DetailsList.Description: Update your mobile app to the latest version by directly clicking on the notification.

DetailsList.Title: Access Calendar Booking from the setup
DetailsList.Description: For ease of access Calendar Booking has been added to the Setup page under General category. You can also access it by clicking the calendar icon in your CRM account.

DetailsList.Title: Bulk delete records rejected through review process
DetailsList.Description: CRM administrators can mass delete records that were rejected during the review process.

DetailsList.Title: Update in record sharing permissions
DetailsList.Description:
Only those users who have full access for a record can share a record with others.
The record-level sharing will work only if the module that contains the record has the default organization permission set as: Private/Public read.

DetailsList.Title: Feature limit update: Blueprint
DetailsList.Description: Enterprise: Total number of Blueprints that can be created is increased to 50. This includes the default Blueprints.

DetailsList.Title: Create workflows based on recommendations
DetailsList.Description: Set automatic actions to send email alerts, SMS, or assign tasks to the team members when Zia recommends. This will allow you to promptly notify your customers or team members to take quick action.

DetailsList.Title: Enhancement in the Analytics Module
DetailsList.Description: The Analytics module allows to perform the following functions: Change view, share chart, show data, refresh the Dashboard.

DetailsList.Title: Timezone synchronization between the Desktop Site and the Mobile App
DetailsList.Description: Timezone will be synchronized between the desktop site and the mobile app or vice-versa.

DetailsList.Title: Configure Allowed IPs moved to Zoho Directory
DetailsList.Description: New CRM sign-ups can configure allowed IPs only from Zoho Directory. CRM accounts where IPs are already configured can continue to access from Setup > User and Control > Security Control.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: DeDupe, iQuoteXpress SSO , Currency Exchange Rates and more.

DetailsList.Title: ChARM Health for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Convert contacts to patients and manage patient records easily with ChARM Health for Zoho CRM.

DetailsList.Title: New updates in the Analytics Module
DetailsList.Description: Use change view to switch from quick chart to pie chart also share charts with others through external apps. Click on show data to see the record count for a data point in a chart. Also, click refresh to update the dashboards.

DetailsList.Title: Sandbox Supported in Trial Edition
DetailsList.Description: Enterprise and Ultimate edition trial users can create Sandbox accounts.

DetailsList.Title: New fields supported during Blueprint transition
DetailsList.Description: Multi-select and multi user lookup fields are now supported during transition. You can make these fields mandatory.

DetailsList.Title: Java SDK: ZCRMSDK - VERSION 2.1.3
DetailsList.Description: Issue Fix: From this version, the response of the Events API will contain the value "null" instead of an empty string when you do not input values for the optional fields.

DetailsList.Title: Java SDK: ZCRMSDK - VERSION 2.1.2
DetailsList.Description: Issue Fix: Fixed the issue of rendering an improper response while fetching the related records of a module.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Contaque Telephony Extension, Poptin and more

DetailsList.Title: View best time to email in record details page
DetailsList.Description: Along with best time to call, the best time to email can also be viewed in the record details page.

DetailsList.Title: Import tasks in bulk
DetailsList.Description: Import tasks to CRM and associate them with the respective records.

DetailsList.Title: Revision of CRM Portal pricing
DetailsList.Description:
According to the new pricing model:
1. Minimum number of portal users is 1 (earlier it was 50 portal users).
2. Price for purchasing additional portals:
- 1-1000 users: $10/user/month
- 1001 to 10,000 users: $8/user/month
- 10,001 and above users: $5/ user/month

DetailsList.Title: Python SDK: ZCRMSDK - VERSION 2.0.11
DetailsList.Description:
Enhancement:
                  This version supports additional parameters in the Get Records operation.

DetailsList.Title: Option to Deselect Lookup Values
DetailsList.Description: Selected values can be deselected by choosing the 'None' option in the lookup list view.

DetailsList.Title: Actionable Hyperlinks in Notes
DetailsList.Description: Navigate to the respective page by tapping the hyperlinked text in the notes.

DetailsList.Title: Deals and Contacts Email Template in Deals Module
DetailsList.Description: Choose a template from Deals or Contacts modules while sending emails from the deal module to a contact.

DetailsList.Title: PHP SDK: ZCRMSDK -VERSION 2.2.1
DetailsList.Description:
Issue Fix:
                  Fixed inconsistency in the selection of the inventory line items.

DetailsList.Title: Feature limit update: Field update in Workflow and Blueprint
DetailsList.Description: Number of field updates for instant and scheduled actions in workflows and field updates in blueprint is increased from 3 to 5 field updates/action for Professional and above editions.

DetailsList.Title: Java SDK: ZCRMSDK - VERSION 2.1.1
DetailsList.Description:
Enhancement:
                  "Discount" key is included in the inventory line items.

DetailsList.Title: C# SDK: ZCRMSDK - VERSION 2.2.2

Enhancement:
                  This version performs an extra validation before adding data to the request body.

DetailsList.Title: C# SDK: ZCRMSDK - VERSION 2.2.3

Enhancement:
                  This version supports custom log trace listeners.

DetailsList.Title: Browser versions updated for CRM
DetailsList.Description: The browser version (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge, and Opera) for CRM has been upgraded to support advanced functionalities and provide better performance.

DetailsList.Title: Cloning webforms and automatically launching them after A/B testing
DetailsList.Description: Instead of creating a web form again, make a clone of it within the module across layouts. Also, select the option to launch a winner automatically after A/B testing is completed. The winner form can also be launched based on the percentage of submission.

DetailsList.Title: Webforms are now responsive
DetailsList.Description: The webforms will resize themselves according to the screen-size.

DetailsList.Title: New Extensions for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Microsoft Dynamics NAV, WhatsApp Integration for Zoho CRM by Picky Assist, Notes Pro - Rich Text & Bulk Notes and more.

DetailsList.Title: Associate emails with a record using Zoho CRM for Gmail add-on
DetailsList.Description: Associate emails received in Gmail with the respective leads or contacts in CRM using the Zoho CRM for Gmail add-on.

DetailsList.Title: UI enhancements in Kanban View
DetailsList.Description: Several visual changes are made to the UI - checkbox to select a record, Create Activity icon is re-positioned, overdue deal closing date displayed in red, etc. A new field called "Header style" is added to the Kanban view settings, to set mono or random color for the category headers.

DetailsList.Title: Set Wizard layout as default
DetailsList.Description: Admins can set the wizard layout as default, so that the user directly get the wizard layout when they wish to create a record. A wizard layout can be selected as default for a particular profile.

DetailsList.Title: Use Zoho Project administrator's email address to access other user's portal
DetailsList.Description: portal In Zoho Projects integration, instead of ZSC key you need to enter the project admin's email address and request access to other user's portal. The current OAuth method is more secure than the previous method.

DetailsList.Title: Looping and repeating of fields in wizard screens disallowed

DetailsList.Title: Automation actions during find and merge
DetailsList.Description: Automatic actions that are set to trigger upon edit or delete of records, will be carried out on the merged records and the ones deleted after merge. Actions configured in Workflow rules, Blueprint, CommandCenter, Approval process, and Scoring rules will take place.

DetailsList.Title: Access to Subforms and permission to edit records added by others for Portal Users
DetailsList.Description: Portal users can view records associated to them in the related lists. They can also edit the associated records (eg. deals, invoice, orders, etc.) which are added by other CRM users. Additionally, they can edit or delete values in subforms.

DetailsList.Title: Walk Score for Zoho CRM

DetailsList.Title: Clearbit for Zoho CRM
DetailsList.Description: Integrate with Clearbit to auto-populate leads details, such as company, social media, contact number, and more from their email address.

DetailsList.Title: Zoho CRM Analytics App
DetailsList.Description: The CRM Analytics app allows you to access sales dashboards and KPIs from your phone. Agents can refer to key business metrics and share it with their colleagues or clients. The analytics app also supports Zia Voice, so you can ask Zia to show you the right dashboard.

DetailsList.Title: Workflow suggestions by Zia
DetailsList.Description: Zia can identify any activities repeatedly performed by agents, like sending emails, updating a project's status, or allocating tasks, and will make suggestions for automating them using workflows. After Zia suggests the workflows, you can edit them to meet your business's requirements.

DetailsList.Title: Record Owner Suggestions by Zia in Assignment Rules
DetailsList.Description: Zia can analyze the way records are assigned to users and interpret a pattern. She will analyze the existing record assignment pattern, the user's daily workload, and online status, and assigns the record to the best person available.

DetailsList.Title: Zia for Emails (Data Enrichment, Activity Suggestions, and Email Intent )
DetailsList.Description: Zia can pull customer information from email signatures and auto-populate details like company address, designation, phone number and more directly into CRM. She can suggest activities like events, tasks, or calls that are mentioned in the emails. Agents can modify and add the suggested activity based on the business's needsZia can also interpret the intent of an email, and label it as request, query, complaint, or others and more for quick identification.

DetailsList.Title: Support for multi-org deep linking
DetailsList.Description: Access records, web tabs etc. from different organizations by accessing the corresponding link.

DetailsList.Title: Zia Recommendation
DetailsList.Description: Zia can identify and analyze customer data, compare behavioral patterns, and draw similarities between multiple attributes to recommend the right product or service for a set of customers.

DetailsList.Title: Zia Vision
DetailsList.Description: Zia can validate images uploaded in CRM. You can upload images and teach Zia to identify different types of them. You can set actions like sending records or images for a manager's approval, or not creating a record or creating record without an image in case if it finds the image invalid.

DetailsList.Title: Zia Prediction Builder
DetailsList.Description: Zia can predict possible business outcomes based on existing data. For example, Zia can predict the likelihood of winning a deal or converting a lead, or chances of a product being purchased and help modify existing sales and marketing with insights.

DetailsList.Title: Workflow for Emails
DetailsList.Description: Automate a set of actions based on email status. Depending on whether the email is opened, replied, unreplied, or bounced, you can set instant actions like email notifications, field updates, or creating a task or record. You can also set custom actions using webhooks or functions.

DetailsList.Title: Marketing Attribution
DetailsList.Description: Measure campaign ROI and ascribe the highest value to the most deserving campaign with the help of six different attribution models: first touch, last touch, U shape, W shape, linear, and time decay.

DetailsList.Title: Segmentation
DetailsList.Description: Segment your customers based on their purchase patterns using the Recency, Frequency and Monetary (RFM) metrics. Understand their behavioral patterns and determine their lifetime value. Based on the insight, you can align your marketing campaigns to meet customer expectations, and focus more on retaining your loyal customers.

DetailsList.Title: Customize the layout in the Calls Module
DetailsList.Description: Add custom fields to the Standard layout and customize the form to suit the business requirements. It consists of four sections such as: Purpose of Outgoing Call, Outcome of Outgoing Call, Reason for Incoming Call and Call Information. These sections are dynamic and will be displayed based on the type of call.

DetailsList.Title: Workflow rules for Calls
DetailsList.Description: Automate actions such as sending emails or task assignments for incoming, outgoing, missed, scheduled, or deleted calls.

DetailsList.Title: Quadrant Analysis
DetailsList.Description: Group your data into four quadrants based on the attributes defined in the X and Y coordinates. Each quadrant has a significance based on the attributes that one wants to measure, such as Type of Campaign vs Revenue Generated, or Leads created vs Lead Source. This helps you determine how one parameter influences the other.

DetailsList.Title: Cohort Analysis
DetailsList.Description: Monitor the behavioral patterns of customers over a specific time period and get insights, like number of purchases made, the average time taken to close deals, and the highest number of products that were purchased. Use the results to strategize your selling and marketing tactics.

DetailsList.Title: Events renamed to 'Meetings'
DetailsList.Description: In sync with the CRM web version, Events in the Activities module has been renamed to ‘Meetings’.

DetailsList.Title: Web Form A/B Testing
DetailsList.Description: Perform an A/B test to determine which version of your webforms receives the most submissions. Run comparative experiments with different versions of webforms for selective groups of users. Depending on the results, you can publish the best performing webforms.

DetailsList.Title: Web Form Analytics
DetailsList.Description: Use analytics, like the number of submissions received, regions with the highest number of submissions, and which fields are most often filled out by visitors to analyze the performance of your webforms.

DetailsList.Title: Review Process
DetailsList.Description: Review and validate entries made by customers before a record enters CRM. Mark the fields that you want to be reviewed and assign the records entering from webforms, APIs, or manual submissions to a set of reviewers. Also, set SLA to keep track of the delay in reviews. You can send email notifications to the reviewer and the record submitter upon approval or rejection of a record.

DetailsList.Title: CommandCenter

DetailsList.Title: Pipelines

Allow agents to save records as drafts in CRM to revisit.

DetailsList.Title: Zoho Flow
DetailsList.Description: Create custom integrations across different applications and connect them via flow.

DetailsList.Title: Converse
DetailsList.Description: Build a conversation with your team within Zoho CRM

DetailsList.Title: Build a reporting hierarchy for contacts
DetailsList.Description: Assign a reporting manager to the contact and allow the superior to view accounts that are associated with specific contact. Also, the reporting manager can be an alternate point of contact with whom the sales team can contact in absence of the primary contact.

DetailsList.Title: Enhancements in Assignment Rules
DetailsList.Description:
In assignment rules, conditions can be specified for users based on which the records will be assigned.
                  You can also specify the default user to whom the records which do not satisfy those conditions will be assigned. The availability of the user can also be checked based on the online status and shift timing before assigning the records.

DetailsList.Title: Python SDK - ZCRMSDK -Version 2.0.0
DetailsList.Description: Excluded configuration files and provided support for Custom DB.
DetailsList.Readmore_link: Excluded configuration files and provided support for Custom DB.

DetailsList.Title: Create validation rules using functions
DetailsList.Description: Validate data in CRM field across other databases using functions.

DetailsList.Title: Allow Zia to search records
DetailsList.Description: Introducing Zia search for android users. Now find results across modules using Zia's search function. Spot Zia search bar at the bottom of the global search or click the Moreicon insidedetail view.

DetailsList.Title: Track changes made to a picklist field
DetailsList.Description: Track every small update in a picklist field with the help of picklist tracking and keep track of the traversal of the picklist value.

DetailsList.Title: Create validation rules using functions
DetailsList.Description: Validate data in CRM field across other databases using functions.

DetailsList.Title: View and respond to emails
DetailsList.Description: Check and reply to the emails received from customers from the email related list.

DetailsList.Title: Clone your Blueprints
DetailsList.Description: Any existing blueprint can be cloned into other layouts. While cloning, new states and transitions can be added, or states from the existing process can be mapped to the values in the fresh layout.

DetailsList.Title: View, update, and edit Subforms
DetailsList.Description: View, update, edit, delete or undo an action in a subform from your mobile app.

DetailsList.Title: Make calls and mark scheduled calls complete
DetailsList.Description: Make a call or complete a scheduled call from your mobile app. Easily identify the Completed, Scheduled, and Overdue Calls with the help of icons.

DetailsList.Title: Locking and unlocking records in approval process
DetailsList.Description: A record will be automatically locked if someone other than the record owner edits it, such that the criteria mentioned for approval is met upon edit. Additionally, any record that is pending for approval will be unlocked in case the approval process is deleted from the CRM system. Also upon rejection of a record it can be resubmitted within the next 60 days.

DetailsList.Title: Lead conversion mapping for subforms
DetailsList.Description: The subform present in the leads module can be mapped with the subforms present in the Contacts, Accounts, and Deals modules in the respective layouts. During lead conversion, the field values in the subform will be captured accordingly.

DetailsList.Title: Monitor the finance flow of your event in Zoho Backstage
DetailsList.Description: The bar chart of the finance flow is now replaced with a waterfall chart, that displays the rise and fall of revenue generation from your event in Zoho Backstage. The graph captures the cumulative result of details such as: total amount acquired from Sponsors and Tickets, Revenue from Deals, Gross Revenue, Expenditure, and the Net Amount.

DetailsList.Title: Enhancements in refreshing Sandbox
DetailsList.Description: Refresh your Sandbox once in three days to view the latest CRM changes. Also, any changes deployed in the last 6 months will be displayed under the deployment logs after refreshing.

DetailsList.Title: Java SDK - ZCRMSDK -Version 1.0.6
DetailsList.Description: Provided support for Tag APIs. Fixed JSONException (related to subforms) in the getRecord function.

DetailsList.Title: Enhancements in Users API
DetailsList.Description: Add, update, and delete users via API.

DetailsList.Title: Functions Integration Tasks - Migration to v2
DetailsList.Description: Migrate integration tasks in your functions to use v2 APIs using this migration guide.

DetailsList.Title: New JSON key in Get Deleted Records API
DetailsList.Description: Choose whether to trigger workflows upon deletion of record(s).

DetailsList.Title: Zoho Webinar
DetailsList.Description: Zoho Webinar (powered by Zoho Meeting) for Zoho CRM.

DetailsList.Title: Identifying duplicate records during record creation
DetailsList.Description: In the Leads module, whenever a duplicate record is entered the user will be alerted about an existing record. The record's and the record owner's name will be displayed upon hovering the 'view lead' button. If multiple duplicates are present they can be merged.

DetailsList.Title: Find out how Zia got the answer for your question
DetailsList.Description: Explore the path Zia took to answer your questions. You can view the module and the criteria that it applied to get you the answer.

DetailsList.Title: View categories in Dashboards
DetailsList.Description: The dashboards in your CRM account can be categorized as favourites, created by me, shared with me, public, and other user's dashboards.

DetailsList.Title: Customize the CRM setup page
DetailsList.Description: The existing menus and the sub-menus in the setup page can be renamed as per your preference. You can also add other applications as widgets and access them from CRM.

DetailsList.Title: C# SDK - ZCRMSDK - Version 2.0.2
DetailsList.Description: User API supported in C# SDK(create, update, delete, etc.). Convert mapping, section details in module layout, criteria details in module custom-view can be extracted.

DetailsList.Title: PHP SDK - ZCRMSDK -Version 2.0.0
DetailsList.Description: Improved code standards for readability. Provided support for Custom DB and duplicate check fields in upsert records.

DetailsList.Title: Change a record's ownership
DetailsList.Description: Transfer records to other users in the org along with the associated open activities, open contacts, or open deals.

DetailsList.Title: Perform actions from My Jobs
DetailsList.Description: Approve, delegate or reject records and perform blueprint transitions from My Jobs in your mobile app.

DetailsList.Title: Allow customers to book a meeting with you
DetailsList.Description: Allow your customers to book meetings with your teams or particular users by selecting available date and time slots.

DetailsList.Title: Python SDK - ZCRMSDK -Version 1.0.7
DetailsList.Description: Add duplicate check fields using upsert record method.

DetailsList.Description: Make Skype business calls directly from Zoho CRM.

DetailsList.Title: Cisco Webex Teams
DetailsList.Description: Bring people together instantly and effortlessly.

DetailsList.Description: Help your sales team manage their deals in Zoho CRM with the Trello extension.

DetailsList.Title: TeamViewer Meetings
DetailsList.Description: Online meetings made simple. Schedule and join meetings from where you work.

DetailsList.Title: BlueJeans
DetailsList.Description: Cloud-based meetings and large interactive events that are simple, scalable, and secure.

DetailsList.Title: Zoom
DetailsList.Description: Close deals faster with face-to-face video meetings.

DetailsList.Title: Join.me
DetailsList.Description: Create events/meetings using Join.me directly from Zoho CRM.

DetailsList.Title: GoToMeeting
DetailsList.Description: Easily set up online meetings with your contacts, leads, and opportunities.

DetailsList.Description: Create relationships between records by associating a record with multiple records from the related list. These records can be dissociated individually or in bulk.
